name: Haley Stevens
subject: I can't do this alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
what matters to you matters to me

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=556%2E49239%2Ea83aaz)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4447?t=2&akid=556%2E49239%2Ea83aaz)
---
Hi null, it’s Haley!

I've just completed my Made in Michigan tour, where I spoke with many incredible Michiganders all across the state – each one sharing what matters most to their families and communities right now.
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4448?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250email%3Ddpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=556%2E49239%2Ea83aaz)
I listened to every story. And I’m more fired up than ever to fight for working people in the U.S. Senate. **[But I can’t do it alone, I need you to stand with me: Will you take a moment to endorse my campaign before midnight tonight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4448?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250email%3Ddpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=556%2E49239%2Ea83aaz)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4448?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250email%3Ddpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=556%2E49239%2Ea83aaz)
---
This race is personal. I grew up the Michigan way – surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. I helped lead the auto rescue during the Great Recession, helping save over 200,000 jobs right here in Michigan. Then I flipped a red seat blue in 2018 and have delivered real results in Congress for working families.
Now I’m running for Senate because **I believe every Michigander deserves a fighter who shows up, listens, and gets things done.**
But Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, and a GOP super PAC just raised $5 million for him. Polls show I’m the best Democrat to defeat Rogers – and even Republican insiders say I’m the toughest general election opponent they could face.
**We can win this race.** We can keep this seat blue. And we can flip the Senate for Democrats. But it will take all of us.

[**We set a goal of 10,000 grassroots endorsements by midnight – and I’m personally asking you to be one of them:**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4448?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250email%3Ddpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=556%2E49239%2Ea83aaz)
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4448?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250email%3Ddpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=556%2E49239%2Ea83aaz)
---
Thank you for standing with me.

With gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4448?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250email%3Ddpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=556%2E49239%2Ea83aaz) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4447?t=9&akid=556%2E49239%2Ea83aaz)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=10&akid=556%2E49239%2Ea83aaz)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

That’s why Democratic donors across the country have answered our urgent plea, leapt into action, and agreed to 500% MATCH every donation that comes in before midnight. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z63niaebjv2iigbq9tglqacr8c0fi8mh1elkscq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjj62pj6c3h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfh6fpinmtkpjmac3ratlp8otk44c8kqpie6h848_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjj62pj6c3h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0adm4amee0aeudgotsfckhg3gjc42ni4uongkoo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjj62pj6c3h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1vuigmg4nudfmduvdmc7c1n92ncscve4aun04og_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjj62pj6c3h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6246diu94f51992oco28l1614uoft84bmgmm19o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjj62pj6c3h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo5o4gg9170v3kg2dsdvtm56f6evj27mfj758sb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjj62pj6c3h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf5u2t9mv17opgintk89l63c02n2s27tla8gnah8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjj62pj6c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr8psaf8mrfludruohhohgjlimba9od32nvq30vo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjj62pj6c3h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1g8rm8vipt6fvplo38uuce1fltka07jta0p8498_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjj62pj6c3h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Texas, we are NOT alone. Keep fighting!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
They’ve got our back.
When Texas Democrats walked out to stop Trump and Greg Abbott’s blatant power grab, they weren’t running away. They were standing up for democracy . And leaders like Illinois Gov . JB Pritzker are making it clear that Texas isn’t fighting this battle alone.
Pritzker called Abbott a joke and Trump a cheater . He’s right. They cheat to win elections because they know they can’t win on their ideas. They’ll even try to steal congressional seats mid-decade just to cling to power.
But we’re not letting them get away with it. Not in Texas. Not anywhere.
Stop the Texas GOP Power Grab Republicans are trying to rig Texas maps to lock in power for years. We can stop them with organizing, legal action, and voter mobilization—but only if we act now. Chip in to fight back [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]

clean_body: Democrats spent a record-shattering $90 MILLION in Montana's last election | Fellow American, Democrats spent a record-shattering $90 MILLION in Montana's last election , an unbelievable sum of money in Montana. And they’re laying the groundwork to spend EVEN MORE in 2026. Here’s the worst news, we’re not even a fraction of the way there! The only way we can secure Montana’s Republican seat and our Republican Majority is through the support of patriotic donors like you Fellow American. Democrats have an army of megadonors across the Country and I’m at the top of their target list. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: GIFFORDS
subject: As extreme as it gets…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
There’s a real possibility she could be the next governor.
#

Team, take a look at this picture:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250811-1-b&t=1&akid=10768%2E3935704%2EAkUO5S)
This is Winsome Sears. Winsome is the Republican nominee for Virginia’s governor election in less than 100 days, and she is as extreme as it gets.
Just days after the school shooting in Uvalde which killed 19 children and 2 teachers, she headlined the NRA’s annual conference in the same state.
**At that conference, she blamed the mass shooting on lack of prayer in schools.**
Friend: It wasn’t a lack of prayer that killed those innocent lives. It was an AR-15-style assault rifle -- similar to the rifle she’s posing with in the picture.
But that’s not all. She cheered on Trump’s budget bill -- which takes healthcare away from millions of Americans. She’s taken money from a known Nazi sympathizer.
_And according to election experts, there’s a real possibility she could win this race — with the NRA’s full endorsement._
We are officially less than 100 days until the November 2025 election. Democrats have a huge opening to flip Virginia’s governor seat blue and take back the House of Delegates — but only if we act today.**
[**GIFFORDS PAC is working to reach voters in battleground states and stand up against extremists like Winsome Sears. If you agree with our mission, please pitch in $3 today >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250811-1-b&t=2&akid=10768%2E3935704%2EAkUO5S)

name: Becca Balint
subject: This moment needs to be remembered.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113120712/562710846/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250811_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODhhNjE2Ny1iZjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NVuqliz2R5JygTbY0KeTb5atlDA7sNzgA6JT8b9tn_o=)
---
Peter, Before being elected as Vermont’s Congresswoman, I was a middle school history teacher. I know there is an urgent need to document this moment in our country’s history. Our awareness of what’s going on in Washington cannot be brushed under the rug. Stephen Miller — a Trump aide and probably the most joyless man in America — said that Trump is considering **suspending the writ of _habeas corpus_.** I’m sorry. _What? _ If our right to challenge unlawful detainment in court is suspended, that means that _any of us_ could be locked up with absolutely _zero cause_. This is Trump trying to centralize more power. Peter, there is **nothing** more important than our liberty. So this moment must be remembered — when a wannabe authoritarian threatened the rights of all Americans. The absurdity can get exhausting, but I’m not letting that distract me. I’m focused on what matters: **delivering for Vermonters, defending our rights, and alleviating suffering for regular working families.** While Republicans stay silent about Trump’s chaos and threats against our rights, I’m committed to calling them out every step of the way. **[I don’t work for billionaires, Peter. I work for people like you. clean_body: | = Peter, Before being elected as Vermont’s Congresswoman, I was a middle school history teacher. I know there is an urgent need to document this moment in our country’s history. Our awareness of what’s going on in Washington cannot be brushed under the rug. Stephen Miller — a Trump aide and probably the most joyless man in America — said that Trump is considering suspending the writ of habeas corpus. I’m sorry. What? If our right to challenge unlawful detainment in court is suspended, that means that any of us could be locked up with absolutely zero cause. This is Trump trying to centralize more power. Peter, there is nothing more important than our liberty. So this moment must be remembered — when a wannabe authoritarian threatened the rights of all Americans. The absurdity can get exhausting, but I’m not letting that distract me. I’m focused on what matters: delivering for Vermonters, defending our rights, and alleviating suffering for regular working families. While Republicans stay silent about Trump’s chaos and threats against our rights, I’m committed to calling them out every step of the way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. **Breaking: The DNC is investing $1.5 million to win this year’s New Jersey elections.** Derek, As you read this email, Democrats in New Jersey are in the midst of a sprint to Election Day. In November, New Jersey voters will elect their next governor and state Assembly members. If history is any indication, these will be tight races that could very well come down to a few thousand votes. On top of that, there are other critical races happening down-ballot, in communities across the state. **Winning these races is absolutely critical. # [Trump admin removes climate reports, vows "revisions"](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=170692173&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwNjkyMTczLCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ5MjMzODcsImV4cCI6MTc1NzUxNTM4NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.cO9F6giSgaSStlF_aPIpqpACIK0N6VUDWnJQVulIoOU)
Aug 11
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=170692173&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwNjkyMTczLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NDkyMzM4NywiZXhwIjoxNzU3NTE1Mzg3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.OJJgn-hSs98DBvW7msWR63RAW-cPI_FdK6kEFaZhcho&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcmViZWthaGpvbmVzL3AvdHJ1bXAtYWRtaW4tcmVtb3Zlcy1jbGltYXRlLXJlcG9ydHM_.Tl32bXqO6AGztilKZHenicLQ-ioxZ6OfLFrKa7bPkkg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/trump-admin-removes-climate-reports?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Three days ago, Energy Secretary Chris Wright, a former fossil fuel executive, announced in a CNN interview that the National Climate Assessments (NCAs)--the government's crown‐jewels of climate truth--have been taken offline "because we're reviewing them."
He added, with all the grace of an arsonist offering to supervise the clean‐up, "We will come out with updated reports...with comments on those."
These reports, demanded by law, crafted by hundreds of working scientists, peer‐reviewed, published every four years--gone. Not because they were flawed, but because they stood like mirrors to a burning world.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..tbqhah2eTQDCEfJMnUgdF5PEqIfOMejm1efXMzJ3ewE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170692173)
The administration also pulled all previous NCAs from public view, and fired over 400 scientists who were working on the upcoming sixth installment--an assessment scheduled for 2027 or 2028.
What once guided governors, planners, farmers, might now guide us toward existential disaster.
Scientists are rightly outraged. One researcher likened this bureaucratic erasure to Stalinist practices. These reports don't deserve "comments"--they deserve protection.
There is a peculiar kind of violence in erasing knowledge.
These aren't dusty volumes gathering metaphorical cobwebs. They're the workhorse of climate policy--the best tool we have to grasp how fast our planet is shifting, where it hurts the worst, and what we might do in response.
By wiping them from federal platforms, the administration isn't requesting a reevaluation. It's staging a disappearing act.
Removing these reports isn't a bureaucratic reshuffle. It's an act of willful amnesia, a refusal to see what's happening in the world.
We must resurrect this knowledge, in the public square, in libraries, on blogs, on farmhouses. We must insist that every citizen, every mayor, every small-town engineer, has the right to know what the Earth is telling us.
Because when the government tries to cull the facts, all that's left is the story we choose to tell--and it's our responsibility to make sure it's the truth.
I worked on the 2014 National Climate Assessment while I was a graduate student at LSU. I do not consent to my work being changed.
And We the People do not consent to revisionist history that attacks science and the scientists who tell the truth.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..tbqhah2eTQDCEfJMnUgdF5PEqIfOMejm1efXMzJ3ewE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170692173)

And what if I told you that we can finally send Lauren Boebert packing – but only if grassroots donors like you chip in now to my campaign? We need to raise another $7,500 before midnight tonight if we’re going to defeat Lauren Boebert and flip this seat blue, but right now, we’re still very short. The only way I’ll be able to fight back against the GOP Super PACs and win is if you give right now: [Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – every dollar you can afford before midnight – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57e739f9-6240-4d43-b3b8-86dbd351ac85/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ll never be able to thank you enough for being on this team and joining me on this journey. # Part 4: The Human Cost - Physician Burnout and Dissatisfaction
Beyond the financial and systemic issues, the future of our U.S. healthcare system is facing a systemic crisis of a shortage of supply of qualified physicians.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9e04a864-d4c3-4ce5-b4f7-1af7e77ccd8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Source](https://substack.com/redirect/a4aad254-7ec7-4ac6-99f9-d05ee671c74c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Burnout and employee dissatisfaction are at an all time low for Physicians and other healthcare professionals, which will poses a significant threat to the future supply and accessibility to quality medical care.
**Alarming Rates of Dissatisfaction:** A recent survey conducted by the Doctors Company a nationwide Physician Owned Malpractice Insurance Company revealed an alarming Net Promoter Score (NPS) of -52 for the medical profession, with only 12% of respondents recommending a medical career to others. _**This is even worse for younger physicians (8% of millennials), indicating an existential crisis in the pipeline of future healthcare providers coupled with an increasing demand for medical services as the Baby Boomers hit the Medicare system**_. Moreover, many doctors that normally serve as mentors are actively discouraging someone from pursuing a career in medicine.
The Alarm has been sounded - Our Health Providers are in distress.
**What are the Key Drivers of Physician Dissatisfaction & Burnout**?
Survey comments include: "Patients are openly distrustful, aggressive, and disrespectful", "Trust is low, people believe kids on TikTok and Facebook over physicians, people believe crazy conspiracy theories with no backing. It's actually depressing", " The system is discriminating and pays different fee for same service". "we are close to major catastrophic nationwide healthcare crisis" and "Healthcare has become a for-profit business now run by business people that have profit as their main goal not patient care".
* **Misinformation on Social Media and Patient Distrust:** Internet and Social Media Misinformation. **NOW** patients trust online sources over medical professionals - The physician-patient relationship is being rapidly eroded.
* **High Costs and Lack of Trust:** Physicians are frustrated by the high cost of medical care and drugs and general distrust in the modern healthcare system.
* **Bureaucracy and Administrative Burden:** Healthcare bureaucracy from excessive regulations, health insurance company hurdles (and denials), and the demands for instant access through digital portals divert physicians' time and energy away from direct patient care.
* **For-Profit Mentality:** Many physicians are frustrated in the shift of the for-profit focus and financial hurdles to meet over a patient's well-being - Physicians are starting to feel like "assembly line workers."
* **Malpractice Concerns:** The constant threat of malpractice lawsuits adds another layer of stress and defensiveness to the practice of medicine.

**The Impact of Physician Dissatisfaction and the Future of Medicine:** Physician dissatisfaction and Patient distrust have tangible consequences. This burnout can result in reduced empathy, increased errors, and ultimately, a general decline in the quality of patient care.
Since there is less enthusiasm, the reluctance of current physicians to recommend their profession to others foreshadows a severe shortage of healthcare professionals in the coming years, exacerbating existing access issues and potentially leading to a "major catastrophic nationwide healthcare crisis." This will be a baby boom crisis of epic proportion if this health care ship is not righted soon.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cde56119-0fcd-4a4e-a98f-9b55bbcc7546?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Source ](https://substack.com/redirect/7a2c889b-48bd-4351-a491-86a03888360f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**If doctors could choose how they practiced, were fairly compensated and the bureaucratic noose around the medical profession were lifted we would have a better healthcare system.**_
_**Stay Tuned for - Part 5: The Path to Reform - Competition, Choice, and Patient-Centered Care**_

Alarming Rates of Dissatisfaction: A recent survey conducted by the Doctors Company a nationwide Physician Owned Malpractice Insurance Company revealed an alarming Net Promoter Score (NPS) of -52 for the medical profession, with only 12% of respondents recommending a medical career to others. This is even worse for younger physicians (8% of millennials), indicating an existential crisis in the pipeline of future healthcare providers coupled with an increasing demand for medical services as the Baby Boomers hit the Medicare system. Moreover, many doctors that normally serve as mentors are actively discouraging someone from pursuing a career in medicine. The Alarm has been sounded - Our Health Providers are in distress. What are the Key Drivers of Physician Dissatisfaction & Burnout? Survey comments include: "Patients are openly distrustful, aggressive, and disrespectful", "Trust is low, people believe kids on TikTok and Facebook over physicians, people believe crazy conspiracy theories with no backing. It's actually depressing", " The system is discriminating and pays different fee for same service". "we are close to major catastrophic nationwide healthcare crisis" and "Healthcare has become a for-profit business now run by business people that have profit as their main goal not patient care". Misinformation on Social Media and Patient Distrust: Internet and Social Media Misinformation. NOW patients trust online sources over medical professionals - The physician-patient relationship is being rapidly eroded. High Costs and Lack of Trust: Physicians are frustrated by the high cost of medical care and drugs and general distrust in the modern healthcare system. Bureaucracy and Administrative Burden: Healthcare bureaucracy from excessive regulations, health insurance company hurdles (and denials), and the demands for instant access through digital portals divert physicians' time and energy away from direct patient care. For-Profit Mentality: Many physicians are frustrated in the shift of the for-profit focus and financial hurdles to meet over a patient's well-being - Physicians are starting to feel like "assembly line workers." Malpractice Concerns: The constant threat of malpractice lawsuits adds another layer of stress and defensiveness to the practice of medicine. The Impact of Physician Dissatisfaction and the Future of Medicine: Physician dissatisfaction and Patient distrust have tangible consequences. This burnout can result in reduced empathy, increased errors, and ultimately, a general decline in the quality of patient care. Since there is less enthusiasm, the reluctance of current physicians to recommend their profession to others foreshadows a severe shortage of healthcare professionals in the coming years, exacerbating existing access issues and potentially leading to a "major catastrophic nationwide healthcare crisis." This will be a baby boom crisis of epic proportion if this health care ship is not righted soon. | | ---|---|--- If doctors could choose how they practiced, were fairly compensated and the bureaucratic noose around the medical profession were lifted we would have a better healthcare system. Stay Tuned for - Part 5: The Path to Reform - Competition, Choice, and Patient-Centered Care Please Subscribe and Share | A guest post by| Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. Jonathan served as the Campaign Manager for Dr. Michael Goldstein - CT-04 The Goldstein Substack is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell The Goldstein Substack that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Michael Goldstein ? ?

| | Hi, This is Brigadier General James Emory Mace, U.S. Army (Retired). _**Today, I write to you not as a soldier... _but as a father._**_ I'm a **Purple Heart** veteran, and I’ve seen battle. I’ve worn the uniform. I’ve buried friends who never made it home. **And I’ve felt the sting of a Nation that sometimes forgets what our sacrifices were for.** _**[But my daughter—Congresswoman Nancy Mace—never forgot.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/NCVyTJwOt8YmwtGAyJbiaz5YubDlZPSWvahQUjkyhHAVBSSfWvrPqukurGvnMUNU78cHLiMg73w1FgUbp1a8H_UDp4L1nm7JebLjAOiDYS4TM-nhV6mBleOvGa_IWTQef8anQhPnM3hVloE8XxVVtf7oFCQbyn9dZcAI-aFbv80Cmf51ShhazevXLquGMU62g2NtahjjX-2rBvIt16eBcjoAjR-xhg-P9N9wIeOk4g0wC4tydOWgHi1EcHQthnUxKwvi3M1rZjaV7ltQGJjDhB-Xxu9aUEFaaWXb8n0-ftlyC-xtTbiUFGb8bv9cfNRdI4wq3RUjoNwnFuizQdwPKogmGCG82s95y2A6j7IOza7PVqAxvxqBHaNkOmjfCt-CYJKb86HqrPWiYTc9MaRy6QHmn0GrAwEBEmMNsRdBmTmQSido7elZdyEX2uZgplNxI67wSfPKv4oKIQbrlH1uD2nxJS0rr4yBz97rVtS3mTAdsVJHET6tMHst2ewxfQSAOs02h9CU5KFicURwFIOUVJS4YTvkwNCJu8cXM3OiM7xS8twwnYfXuu0kqBNJ-XP2Xqj7IPTUcqiXQPoXa6IU80R4Ld_O0bdPlHpkAFHK4nux2XmRaJgHSNLmCtbWv9_2_R43E7n0sxFENDwY4eBiIGWDWjGxgxzn8zGsmcXgBcU4SZ2mN--el-ErAChl9zZ81YiD3ohOAuDeifzMggWReH4Q2BgaFjCLt8NxPmRX4v5gOWk04h9XcshPYhfkGHAhWnEaWV22XBbQfxSMVo4Gjniu5q1IqUpCK56oX9exUU7zKS4oF90C86_tCInMnsqOJH0D0A1Pb3MAfnqe5B9eX4LFRm11O-Alj_Mbq930gfUnhfgY9IjAw1agWvGHqQhmQjKq/tsOBP9D5twCJFzFtaDdPyzkZvQYsMLlV/11)**_ Nancy was raised in the shadow of the flag. When Nancy was 17, she dropped out of high school. Most kids in that situation fall apart. But not Nancy.**She picked herself up, took a job at Waffle House, and fought her way back.** **By 21, she became the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s Military College. A place I knew well.**

**Nancy then made it to Congress, where _she represented the people of South Carolina’s First District._** She’s been fighting her whole life; for herself, for her kids, for the truth, and now...for her state. **[Today, Nancy is running for Governor of South Carolina. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

I'm a Purple Heart veteran, and I’ve seen battle. I’ve worn the uniform. I’ve buried friends who never made it home. And I’ve felt the sting of a Nation that sometimes forgets what our sacrifices were for. Nancy was raised in the shadow of the flag. She saw the uniform. She lived with the deployments. She knew the cost. And instead of running from it, she ran toward it. When Nancy was 17, she dropped out of high school. Most kids in that situation fall apart. But not Nancy.She picked herself up, took a job at Waffle House, and fought her way back. By 21, she became the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s Military College. A place I knew well. Nancy then made it to Congress, where she represented the people of South Carolina’s First District. She’s been fighting her whole life; for herself, for her kids, for the truth, and now...for her state. It’s hard sitting back as a father and hearing the terrible things the media and the establishment say about her. I want to ask you something from one parent, one patriot, to another: She’s up against a machine that wants to erase the values of faith-based, service-minded Americans who believe in truth, family, and country. name: Andy Kim
subject: Hunger doesn’t take a summer vacation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
As a father of two young boys – 8 and 9 years old – I know how much kids look forward to summer.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113123043/562718359/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmY4YTlkZS1jMzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h4ecsaIOeG1QuwbiZb287AmiRl73jCVpymXnZpnWLzk=&emci=9145cbf7-a273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=62f8a9de-c376-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26261389)
---

| | As a father of two young boys – 8 and 9 years old – I know how much kids look forward to summer. The school break is supposed to be a time for fun, family, and freedom. But for far too many kids in New Jersey and across the country, summer also brings something else: hunger. **The hard truth is this: hunger doesn't take a summer vacation.** During the school year, many children rely on school meals to get the nutrition they need to grow, learn, and thrive. But when school is out, those meals often disappear, and the support system kids depend on falls away. _That's unacceptable._ We have a responsibility to do better and ensure that no child in this country ever has to go to bed hungry, no matter the time of year. **That's why I'm introducing the Summer Meals REACH Act** – a bill designed to help close the gap in food access during the summer months. This legislation gives local organizations more flexibility and support so they can reach more kids and meet families where they are. This is a national problem, and it demands a national solution. We can solve childhood hunger, but only if we stay focused and keep fighting for the resources our kids deserve. No child should ever go hungry just because school isn't in session. Let's make sure that summer stays a time of joy, not a time of worry. clean_body: As a father of two young boys – 8 and 9 years old – I know how much kids look forward to summer. | | | | As a father of two young boys – 8 and 9 years old – I know how much kids look forward to summer. The school break is supposed to be a time for fun, family, and freedom. But for far too many kids in New Jersey and across the country, summer also brings something else: hunger. The hard truth is this: hunger doesn't take a summer vacation. During the school year, many children rely on school meals to get the nutrition they need to grow, learn, and thrive. But when school is out, those meals often disappear, and the support system kids depend on falls away. That's unacceptable. We have a responsibility to do better and ensure that no child in this country ever has to go to bed hungry, no matter the time of year. That's why I'm introducing the Summer Meals REACH Act – a bill designed to help close the gap in food access during the summer months. This legislation gives local organizations more flexibility and support so they can reach more kids and meet families where they are. This is a national problem, and it demands a national solution. We can solve childhood hunger, but only if we stay focused and keep fighting for the resources our kids deserve. No child should ever go hungry just because school isn't in session. Let's make sure that summer stays a time of joy, not a time of worry. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: Voter Action Project
subject: Just a dangerous ruling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket: New Ruling Cuts Off Key Tool to Protect Minority Voters [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=081125_1&amount=25]
Folks: An update from the federal 8th Circuit on one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
A federal appeals court recently cut off a key avenue for private groups and individuals to bring racial discrimination claims under the Voting Rights Act (VRA). The ruling, which applies in seven states, further weakens the ability of our civil rights law to protect voters, and could lead to the Supreme Court settling the issue.
This goes back to an initial ruling from 2023, the impact of which is pretty simple to understand: That voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, and now confirmed on appeal, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
With former Florida AG Pam Bondi -- a "big lie" spreading MAGA acolyte -- serving as Attorney General, it's clear that the DOJ is not going to protect voting rights over the next four years.
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=081125_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081125_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081125_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081125_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081125_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081125_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081125_1&amount=35]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this new appellate ruling is not overturned by the Supreme Court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=081125_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081125_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081125_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.

Portland, OR 97280

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=gFT45EPTFNL2%2FlnjxQkcEwfBHHh6aZMs2ns%2F2eBzVYfLCsaI2Kbd4d9gN1%2Bd%2FGnPTIzgskQTOpQ%2F8m%2FCBzeJrvh8amb%2BZIju0xfqzpW33B5STm7t4s1kFTshhcpC1n%2BivWvQCrpup9xEStBtAnahYl0dS%2FYKue%2FWFFsj4fkNQnJYqjIZUwAXcULmay5OC6yf4Jyd156ctukwXB63eiCeRxlAtkxrVM0RrL%2BDeR3T6GXhDEBIQnwQIUpi9NrbCY8jnB%2FDS1j1YQHss5uscwZj%2FtxHPjdj3DegMFccO1y1yw0%2FAwHRLhvBASOMy2Ojc8Y%2BV9r5Dtc2bOeT7kyrkUTzYqFBJQpFFkrS4H%2Bu9c8V05cMoM7inVE8qSRBM9Mtg7RDGEoVpEw%2Bes9psgjPUDk22C3SzHkDi7RWZCnVLhsvLZs%3D .

name: Leader Robert Reives (via DLCC.org)
subject: Trump sold out states like yours for a tax giveaway
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
The GOP made millions of Americans collateral damage in their pursuit of a tax giveaway for the ultra-wealthy. They were warned about the devastating consequences – they just didn’t care enough to listen. | | |
---
| |
---|---
MAGA Republicans sold out the states and their communities with the passage of their disastrous budget law. It could be _years_ before we’re able to see the full scale of the damage the GOP has inflicted on our country. But I am personally invested in holding Republicans up and down the ballot responsible for abandoning the American people. **Are you with me?** [A contribution of any amount helps unseat MAGA Republicans and hold the GOP accountable at the ballot box this November, in 2026, and beyond → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdhj0DpW0EC7WglRcqYNogI9EwIBmwSniHdPux6t3Em7shAPEZtL9dZ3J8at_5D1g1w_ga3SnnK8p8G3Ggm6GCFqUCK6_Oq9ffkjXTKz_mPlQqkHQo_eml6LvN_qCuV-amEobvO4FYDXc6sI2G39EdqLh1Fo8OvOSu0mODYovTUVVefIkJnmjEweSpzmorrPdYwo67BOGIoAzUVQBP2FUrzw5s8voQ99FjOu774G4--op7OPH8ummwgDr_aFGElLJxXohd1MoELiJ8tKdp1XdEAwer4B5mwHieAcqAFTtLej5yqGBZQmg8t_1PTxvr58nVmR9wPfF_ne3A2vIbWI8t1HGZQ7p7iywnL-29-eihimeHEAx84zYV-0c5Ix3PGphTlsQzPOA6GBxKMX6vuM0Nu2F7KcCnzDiafUz-aso9WuRKF3lbr9BjFK0uRykquu_1GnkAmS_bE6qJBj-iCUjAQbFf6DVWWeR7DA0p0U-o-L4z_jkNXGNmt9B1I_dP8P0XMwgSYcJRFSarc4x3uA1Xn6J-BHBFy1eM66gNnKVb2U9XlDtaRWlSP5vYmbILUdIqBmyAcXbB4PzW4dlVI8GtTqEsh5BhVjSRc0I9gPDWENAccO2rG9Xq6SQyfrS_ZaHlmK9KYcs0tJviI-cpOOaNwrXHTIJGKZVglGGLcUyQX9oOyOx-IWY2TbEiylsaSMd15A0UzmmAcF43oTRM3BSU7t0RZT0ymKOn01YU3KTXLoeBAQBYwu_3kIhPOZ3ZKGFCw/4iy/ssymhG9iRci-92s7pqDLLA/h0/h001.VBS8QOXobSkuxrqLzDUzCGviLmAGC7rzRsafR1xjm8w)
* * *
The GOP is framing these cuts as a massive win. But here’s the devastating truth: Rural hospitals will be forced to shut down, leaving communities without access to lifesaving care and health care workers unemployed. Nursing homes will close, and seniors will be left struggling without essential services. Prices will rise for people already struggling to make ends meet, and kids will go hungry. Republicans saw 17 million Americans as a line item in their budget. The GOP made millions of Americans collateral damage in their pursuit of a tax giveaway for the ultra-wealthy. They were warned about the devastating consequences – they just didn’t care enough to listen. Now more than ever, access to health care is directly tied to the balance of power in state legislatures. We must protect and expand our Democratic majorities to defend health care, expand economic opportunity, and support working families. Millions of lives depend on this work. [If you’re able, please chip in to help give local Democrats the resources they need to run winning campaigns in places like your community and beyond. Friends, **Trump just announced he is sending the National Guard into Washington, D.C. He 's federalized the police already. And now, armed federal agents from multiple agencies are patrolling the streets of our nation's capital.**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DqXURF8zg34RTtCPw17tI1rRmHsPV8kXCslATSd-SAuN0_9dHkr3Z3FEXZ8EwRsvzFIw2Rkn9OtzUuzbPSGNBQW-xq0tMWyf_493Nvv9CtcHkoJjvmVOJ_qzd3ttzBhCmjI6sYu_pMwiuBfr9JO9DVD7jAZ0xCU3KngQX0lAgLA_7LsRVvU_9SopP74qPCujIk130_JZfDxKEQea-hHgx29cJKa9uT7WPqijlhpVPnTb6gI-rB4fOPDiY6U7fVJEOq1IT7IuEnZAdBkzzrkX4i-LhhicD23ocFaiycL-7cj__mx_cjGID2C3RLHYvxsNggjCZsti1snxmEEjGRlo2GlPB4rvwrr2Of0PKhLnXteE/4iy/cWA4-3yQRA-IzuHKb2is3w/h1/h001.nJ1rpSBKCPIjp4mbe7Yb-R5sOJFrC5JJCMSDEAl7dLg)

They're calling it "crime prevention." But here's the truth: _**violent crime in D.C. is at a 30-year low.**_ **This isn 't about safety -- it's about power.** Trump is testing the limits -- seeing how far he can go, how quickly he can turn the instruments of government into his own personal security force. The endgame? A dictatorship -- and a third term. And he's doing it while distracting from the Epstein scandal -- a scandal so damning that even some of his own supporters were starting to turn on him. Instead of answering questions, he's flexing his power in the streets of D.C. If he can get away with this in our nation's capital, he'll try it in every state, every city, and every rural county in America. _**That 's why No Dem Left Behind is going all-in nationwide -- organizing in battleground states, rural districts, and communities the GOP hopes we'll ignore. From the Midwest to the South, the Plains to the coasts -- it's all gas, no brakes to defend democracy everywhere.**_ **[But we can only do it with you. name: Hallie Shoffner
subject: Let’s retire Tom Cotton –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I want you to be among the first to know...
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9d112ec-4e53-43f0-9bbf-66543f9fee79/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hi Peter, Blue Amp Action said I could reach out with some exciting news. [I’m Hallie Shoffner – a sixth-generation Arkansas farmer – and I want you to be among the first to know I’m running for U.S. Senate.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5264fa32-492f-48bc-90ad-3295c42a2e8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [BE A FOUNDING DONOR](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56b7f0e8-2656-4030-8158-6430ac440175/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I'm stepping up because too many hardworking people in Arkansas and across the country are being shoved to the back of the line. The farmer. The truck mechanic. The single mom pulling a double shift just to make ends meet. And for the last ten years, our current senator, Tom Cotton, has made their lives harder.
* He voted against the Farm Bill – twice,
* Handed tax breaks to billionaires while blue-collar families got squeezed,
* And is more interested in chasing headlines than helping the people who actually make this state run.

Earlier this year, I had to make the hardest decision of my life: I shut down my family's farm, not because we didn't work hard, but because Washington's broken policies made it impossible to keep going. So if I can't farm, I'm going to fight. For families. For fairness. For Arkansas. This campaign is about making Arkansas work for the people who call it home. Folks who wake up early, do their jobs, raise their kids, and ask for nothing more than a fair shot. I'm running to ensure that family farmers aren't left behind, that programs like Medicaid and Social Security remain strong, and that we lower the cost of living so families can move forward, not fall behind. Now here's the truth: To compete in this race, we need to prove Arkansas is in play, and that starts today. [We've set a 24-hour fundraising goal to show the strength of this campaign from the jump. Will you split a donation between our campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us gain the momentum we need to take on Tom Cotton?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9407be14-8b44-49ef-817a-1854943ef101/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a7a7a58-641c-4ed3-b528-a0ac2eda9787/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE $25 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta96fabf6-a1a1-4232-b62d-012af78a9561/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0bc7fc9f-fbe8-40b4-9ac3-53bb0ded920e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I'm not a politician. I'm a farmer. And I'm running this campaign the same way I ran my farm – with grit, with honesty, and with everything I've got. Let's get to work. Hallie
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79ef1252-15b7-4a05-96db-8f8ba45f4691/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

The farmer. The truck mechanic. The single mom pulling a double shift just to make ends meet. And for the last ten years, our current senator, Tom Cotton, has made their lives harder. He voted against the Farm Bill – twice, Handed tax breaks to billionaires while blue-collar families got squeezed, And is more interested in chasing headlines than helping the people who actually make this state run. Earlier this year, I had to make the hardest decision of my life: I shut down my family's farm, not because we didn't work hard, but because Washington's broken policies made it impossible to keep going. So if I can't farm, I'm going to fight. For families. For fairness. For Arkansas. This campaign is about making Arkansas work for the people who call it home. Folks who wake up early, do their jobs, raise their kids, and ask for nothing more than a fair shot. I'm running to ensure that family farmers aren't left behind, that programs like Medicaid and Social Security remain strong, and that we lower the cost of living so families can move forward, not fall behind. Now here's the truth: To compete in this race, we need to prove Arkansas is in play, and that starts today. | | | | | | | | | | I'm not a politician. I'm a farmer. subject: WOW! It Just Hit #12!!
body:
WOW, I received a really cool notification... My FIRST book, "Chasing After The Wind" is out and has reached #12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Pers
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23769084.12381.1.7740b234dbc76f44fc6a8f00e0c1cbcf) |
---
WOW, I received a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23769084.12382.1.715b401c5aaa58e90bab084e4aac5596) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23769084.12383.1.dca37fbe7f4fc9dd30260da1249212a1)_ My goal is to break into the Top 10. Please consider sharing the link with someone you think might be interested in the book! It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23769084.12384.1.5a168e511df2df0527363cfb61556991)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23769084.12385.1.06abfc4269a3665e7a8d43cd4bc96ce4). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23769084.12386.1.8b2dbb7d35df41b7ce0dbe0a8cca293c) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23769084.12387.1.f66ae54f0c8aa15b0c7b8ef2ebc310d7) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23769084.12388.1.4de923214028becc0a71919e320a842b) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=081125_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=081125_1]
🚨🚨🚨BREAKING NEWS🚨🚨🚨
Donald Trump just announced he is deploying the National Guard and taking control of the capital city’s police force.
This is not a drill.
Donald Trump has just ordered federal troops into the streets of our capital city — and seized control of its police force — all over a LIE about crime.
He has crossed the line from dangerous rhetoric to outright authoritarian rule.
This is exactly how democracies die:
* A leader invents a crisis
* Deploys armed forces against his own people
* Seizes control of local law enforcement
If we don’t fight back now, there may be no going back.
We have a limited amount of time show Trump and his enablers that the American people will not stand by while he uses the military to intimidate and control a sovereign city. Every second we wait, this power grab becomes the “new normal.” Rush $10 now so we can help Democrats launch emergency ads, mobilize rapid response teams, and protect our democracy from Trump’s escalating authoritarianism. name: Tim Walz
subject: The future that MAGA Republicans want
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Minnesotans have proven what’s possible when we lead with courage, compassion, and grit.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113126277/562727602/1983880196?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWJhNGM3Zi1jOTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJMQNthvgzcIOHyOYGLGoUbSlqQkU1ifA3dDbMvrRQA=)
---
Peter,

Minnesotans have proven what’s possible when we lead with courage, compassion, and grit. We’ve fought tooth and nail to protect the most vulnerable Minnesotans and made our state one of the best to start a family.
Together, we’ve delivered real results:
* Free school meals for every child
* Competitive, high-paying jobs across our state
* The strongest expansion of labor rights in the nation
* Groundbreaking investments in family and medical leave
* Unprecedented funding for public education
* Major strides in cutting child poverty

But Donald Trump, Scott Jensen, and their MAGA allies want to strip back all the progress we’ve made.

body:
This is time-sensitive.
| | | Hey team -- It's Pat, the Research Director here at the DSCC. I'll cut to the chase: **We NEED you to represent Pennsylvania in our Democratic Strategy Interview for 8/11/25.**

**[I'll tell you more in a moment, but before I do, will you share your answers real quick? >>](http://go.dscc.org/go/21871?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250811-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250811-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20925%2E9716520%2E1fsyfB)**

| **[START YOUR INTERVIEW](http://go.dscc.org/go/21871?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250811-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250811-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20925%2E9716520%2E1fsyfB)**
---

If I've learned anything in politics, it's that getting a head start isn't just important -- it's _crucial._ Victories only happen when we start well _before_ the elections. **And that means today.**

But we also need the right kind of head start. That's why **_not everybody's getting this email._** It's only going to top Democrats with a proven track record of making a difference in our country. **This is your chance to shape our vital 2026 Senate strategy, and believe me, it'll be very hard to get it right without your help.**

Today's survey closes at 11:59 PM, and **I don't have your response on file yet! So please, click this personal link to enter your Democratic Strategy Interview by taking the survey now: [www.dscc.org/DemStrategyInterview/#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/21871?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250811-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250811-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20925%2E9716520%2E1fsyfB) **

**[START YOUR INTERVIEW](http://go.dscc.org/go/21871?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250811-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250811-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20925%2E9716520%2E1fsyfB)**
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a part of this team,

Pat
DSCC Research Director

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.</span

name: Nikki, Team Benson
subject: Dark money is flooding this race — and we need to respond
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=592%2E181023%2E5WjPc7)
Hi team, it’s Nikki — Jocelyn’s campaign manager.
Did you see the news?
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250811_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=592%2E181023%2E5WjPc7)
A nonprofit quietly backing Mike Duggan’s campaign is already spending big on TV ads, social media, and billboards. Here’s the thing: **This “nonprofit” is tied to a JPMorgan Chase executive with deep pockets and major influence.**
This group is designed to avoid transparency, take unlimited corporate money, and hide who’s really bankrolling Duggan’s run.
Let’s be clear: **dark money donors are trying to buy this election.** And they’re backing Duggan because they know he won’t stand up to corporate interests the way Jocelyn will.
If we want to compete with these unlimited contributions, we need to show the strength of our grassroots movement.
[**Will you pitch in $10 or more today to help Jocelyn Benson fight back against the corporate PACs and dark money and win this race?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q32025.plcv4o&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250811_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=592%2E181023%2E5WjPc7)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q32025._u867d&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250811_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=592%2E181023%2E5WjPc7)

---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q32025.koEtbW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250811_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=592%2E181023%2E5WjPc7)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q32025.z9_9cy&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250811_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=592%2E181023%2E5WjPc7)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/605?c0=jmb-em-q32025.Z1Qyci&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250811_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=592%2E181023%2E5WjPc7)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250811_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=592%2E181023%2E5WjPc7)
---
Unlike Duggan, Jocelyn’s not relying on corporate PACs or billionaires. She’s counting on real people — from every county in Michigan — who want a Governor that puts _democracy_ and _people_ first.
Let’s show that no amount of dark money can drown out a people-powered campaign.
Thank you for standing with us,
Nikki
Campaign Manager
Team Benson

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.

Here’s the thing: This “nonprofit” is tied to a JPMorgan Chase executive with deep pockets and major influence. This group is designed to avoid transparency, take unlimited corporate money, and hide who’s really bankrolling Duggan’s run. Let’s be clear: dark money donors are trying to buy this election. And they’re backing Duggan because they know he won’t stand up to corporate interests the way Jocelyn will. If we want to compete with these unlimited contributions, we need to show the strength of our grassroots movement. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Unlike Duggan, Jocelyn’s not relying on corporate PACs or billionaires. She’s counting on real people — from every county in Michigan — who want a Governor that puts democracy and people first. Let’s show that no amount of dark money can drown out a people-powered campaign. Thank you for standing with us, Nikki Campaign Manager Team Benson

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: He joined at 15. He returned a hero.
body:
Take home the sand he fought on

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zji626dt2vsteqio3jisor4u4gmngcbv8qap2pe8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm8pb4cjh2bs)
---
Dear Friend, Jake was just a kid from the country. He grew up on a farm two miles outside of Hope, Minnesota. He couldn't afford movie tickets and nearly quit high school to help his family. At 15, he and his cousin walked into the local armory and lied about their age. "Just say 18, Jake," his cousin whispered. So he did. **That 's how Jake joined the National Guard -- a boy with dirt on his boots, answering the call to serve his country.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8as9kucsf3utudlusdpdomhtinldsditaq9uo50_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm8pb4cjh2bs)
---
By the time he was 22, Jake was helping plan the largest amphibious invasion in history. He landed on Omaha Beach with the First Division on D-Day. Water up to his chin. Bullets flying. A million land mines underfoot.He huddled behind a small berm while two German machine guns pinned him down from both sides. Jake lit a cigarette -- the only comfort he had. Then turned to a soldier behind him and said:_" Hey buddy, you got a match?"_

No answer. He turned."There was no head under the helmet," Jake told us.Later that night, back at camp, he gave his foxhole to a friend. A stray piece of shrapnel split the rifle on Jake's bed clean in two."That would've been my head," he said.**Friend,****__****these****are the stories we hear all the time at the American Veterans Center.** _These_ are the heroes we walk beside._These_ are the stories we need to capture before it's too late.**Friend, passing on their stories to the next generation matters.** Our freedom came at a price -- and we can NEVER afford to forget it. _**[Will you stand with the American Veterans Center to preserve and pass on these D-Day stories to the next generation? As thanks for your gift of $44 or more today, I'll send you a keepsake of vial of sand from the hallowed beaches of Normandy.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc1ur9f2g77bvic2bj2ho97e28ene4eqp35deduo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm8pb4cjh2bs)**_
---
[ **Donate $44 to receive your Normandy Beach keepsake**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq56qa1cvk5i9975d0k3678s2333m5cdu81fl8j8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm8pb4cjh2bs)
---
Friend, hundreds of World War II veterans have trusted the American Veterans Center and patriotic Americans like _you_ to honor their generation since AVC's founding in 1995. **_In fact, AVC 's World War II Veterans Committee was specially formed so our World War II heroes could help advise and direct our programs._**Today, I'm grateful that a small number of those same heroes still work closely with us ... and I'm honored to work every day to commemorate those who have since passed._**[To help the American Veterans Center continue to honor our D-Day heroes this month, please make your gift of $44 or more today- and I'll send you a keepsake vial of sand from Normandy.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoe49mggr2145elpjald0uth6sesob1ccq8i7ie8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm8pb4cjh2bs)**_
---
[ **Donate $44 to receive your Normandy Beach keepsake**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqjckmerjfberg728qbnpj9mh1oaoi5ilitiapho_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm8pb4cjh2bs)
---
Your support is what enables American Veterans Center to preserve the story of these brave veterans. Together, we can make sure every generation understands the meaning of sacrifice. Jake didn't ask for attention. He just did what had to be done. _**[Let's make sure he, and every hero like him, is never forgotten.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zip5f5igvjmrtkg3hhb7d30ga1qn90uj41msp310_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm8pb4cjh2bs)**_ Tim Holbert
President
American Veterans Center __[P.S. Jake was just a boy when he joined. But he became part of something so much bigger. Help us share his story-- and honor the greatest generation while we still can. Thank you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziifd0m85augk2qqietilhti35jo073ost7pv85o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm8pb4cjh2bs)__
---
[ **Donate $44 to receive your Normandy Beach keepsake**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhci91tk9bsguodunqgq4js7rm5tibnl4pdch80o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm8pb4cjh2bs)
---

name: Wes Moore
subject: ⛰️🏖️From Mountain Maryland to the Eastern Shore
body:
My secret to refocus, decompress, and reconnect...
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=443%2E1086043%2EH-UJ35)
Peter, I love hiking.
Whether I’m up in Mountain Maryland or down on the Eastern Shore, my hikes have become important bookends for my weeks.
They’re moments for me to reconnect with myself in nature. With my family. And – even if it sometimes takes a treat or two – our dog Tucker, too. 🐶
**[If you’re with me in this work to make progress for our beautiful state, I would be so grateful if you chip in today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250811-1?refcode=em-20250811-1&refcode2=443_1086043_H-UJ35&akid=443%2E1086043%2EH-UJ35)**
It’s crazy that I’ve ended up spending so much time in the great outdoors. I was a city boy, and growing up, much of what I knew about the woods came from horror movies.
Before I joined the Army, the most time I’d ever spent in the woods was when I’d tried running away from military school in the middle of the night. _Seriously._
But, these days, I relish time with nature. I have a nonstop schedule as the governor of a state of six million people and I spend long stretches away from my family. So, spending time out on the trails gives me a chance to refocus and decompress. It lets me come back to my work ready to fight for the future of Maryland.
We have a lot of that work left to do, and I’ll need all the help I can get from this grassroots team to stay in the fight.
**[Our work in Maryland is more important than ever. Will you chip in any amount today to power our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250811-1?refcode=em-20250811-1&refcode2=443_1086043_H-UJ35&akid=443%2E1086043%2EH-UJ35)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250811-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250811-1&refcode2=443_1086043_H-UJ35&akid=443%2E1086043%2EH-UJ35)**
No matter what it is that you do to clear your mind and rest your soul, I hope you take time to do it, too. And even reply to this email and share your favorite trails!
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250811-1?refcode=em-20250811-1&refcode2=443_1086043_H-UJ35&akid=443%2E1086043%2EH-UJ35)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250811-1&t=2&refcode2=443_1086043_H-UJ35&akid=443%2E1086043%2EH-UJ35)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=443%2E1086043%2EH-UJ35)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=443%2E1086043%2EH-UJ35)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

She was done. Done with addiction. Done with the chains of the enemy. And it all happened in the middle of one of Detroit’s most dangerous streets. Moments like this are why we go—why we set up in the hardest places and preach the Gospel with boldness.

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, this weekend, the Holy Spirit moved in a way I’ll never forget. In Detroit, a woman walked to the altar, tears streaming down her face, and dropped a bag of drugs on the stage. She was done. Done with addiction. Done with the chains of the enemy. And it all happened in the middle of one of Detroit’s most dangerous streets. Moments like this are why we go—why we set up in the hardest places and preach the Gospel with boldness. HEAR THE TESTIMONY ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | This weekend—August 16 in Chicago and August 17 in Minneapolis —we’re believing for the same life-changing encounters. But we can’t do it without you. Your gift today helps us cover the costs to bring worship, the Word, and the hope of Jesus right into the heart of these cities. Will you help us make it happen? Every soul is worth it. Even if it’s just for the one. Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

Abigail feels the immense responsibility to deliver for Democrats at the ballot box.
That's why she traveled all across Virginia to hear directly from voters on what should be prioritized in this election and has announced plans to secure our future:
* The _Affordable Virginia Plan_ would lower the cost of healthcare, housing, and utility bills;
* The _Growing Virginia Plan_ would create opportunities through job creation, trade, and business investment;
* The _Strengthening Virginia Schools Plan_ would modernize K-12 schools, provide parents access to high-quality child care, and prepare our kids to succeed in 21st-century jobs;
* _And many more plans are coming soon!_

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113126810/562729701/-1322681089?contactdata=LKnmmiFs1XM+gQKcsTx7od6bgQCiKV+8LIWChSr2M9EXi+7cf9ShesXtQ5o602vctB106ZXhA0oQMlq90LHyva9pufP16N/kiaHms74Zt6tzALQjchZA/ge3M7LNLsyj&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2JmNWE5OTAtY2I3Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rS9-DHNvRkoKedaDcsoJT3jG3Kb__xqsl1OE7XWf16I=&emci=44d3138b-ba76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3bf5a990-cb76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8470899)
Unlike the far-right Republican ticket led by Winsome Earle-Sears, Abigail is committed to making our Commonwealth stronger, safer, and more affordable. Her vision will bring Virginians together and move our Commonwealth forward. She'll protect reproductive rights, fully fund public schools, and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.
**Now, we hope you'll use this link to endorse Abigail Spanberger for Governor:** [_**https://act.abigailspanberger.com/a/endorse-abigail-0811**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113126811/562729702/-1322681089?contactdata=LKnmmiFs1XM+gQKcsTx7od6bgQCiKV+8LIWChSr2M9EXi+7cf9ShesXtQ5o602vctB106ZXhA0oQMlq90LHyva9pufP16N/kiaHms74Zt6tzALQjchZA/ge3M7LNLsyj&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2JmNWE5OTAtY2I3Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rS9-DHNvRkoKedaDcsoJT3jG3Kb__xqsl1OE7XWf16I=&emci=44d3138b-ba76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3bf5a990-cb76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8470899)
