We have a chance to set an example for the nation and we must seize the opportunity. Abigail feels the immense responsibility to deliver for Democrats at the ballot box. That's why she traveled all across Virginia to hear directly from voters on what should be prioritized in this election and has announced plans to secure our future: The Affordable Virginia Plan would lower the cost of healthcare, housing, and utility bills; The Growing Virginia Plan would create opportunities through job creation, trade, and business investment; The Strengthening Virginia Schools Plan would modernize K-12 schools, provide parents access to high-quality child care, and prepare our kids to succeed in 21st-century jobs; And many more plans are coming soon! Unlike the far-right Republican ticket led by Winsome Earle-Sears, Abigail is committed to making our Commonwealth stronger, safer, and more affordable. Her vision will bring Virginians together and move our Commonwealth forward. She'll protect reproductive rights, fully fund public schools, and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington. Now, we hope you'll use this link to endorse Abigail Spanberger for Governor: It's all on the line in November, so let's each pledge our full support. # Governor Braun Praises Century Career Center During Visit: 'On The Leading Edge Of Preparing Students'
---
---
| | Pharos Tribune
Josh Flynn August 6, 2025 [Governor Braun praises Century Career Center during visit: 'On the leading edge of preparing students' | News | pharostribune.com](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/Wr9fb2LjfCguQvNg31ZTJGsJdF-YzM9AdfgdRJVS1R_egInnt3bxUtlo46gdCfVU6jp3UGmq2XUp6rBRVM2KM76KBHGbt30cKlQcq2JWc3ba0_QMB6LyxStuLodWgDTZ3FLzXsvWcWf8d4W_rwTf65xUlPKOyIawCSk4x9EwDxTkvLFVzCQf5lQKTdOq5UKUVZQwH9fMHW3VQpBX4nBk8rXtLUnGpcP9xqAaBmRdtU43RgD4DxI7NXpOS8kxq7bkjqFgWaSsXQj2ixPOKy9jOH4jcFEvl_6gaJCXqf3LKp-2R2JT_qFCUVIFYKmAtx-NYwCHt0NXIo7vzYjzNXsgcrNnrly3HWajftnMorlAsPPX9vBaqetAHvcYNMZlalV73jGgCmOc3rZGXLHOoNu3yvQvcL5luxUArU98H9D4JoIiXmGr-mH7csMIHhdDMPBI6ZQ0qj0u7EYoHZEphu6__oJ1sKHuULStSWDq3b6lNMlWgNa3oDttuXhIOiQoMjNoBH7UufxU-1Wy4pX32pu1c720VVEJSTO6NJ8bkFw96b1tmCtMZyFZs03oucDicx2iVNrOmtjof8wLvO9cjqqyzDBUtDxMg0BQYbF1U8_GpJEDFtstKWbvqjIlVFeOBMCCD_ahZczmDTNiJ1QVrlg-rmqZZEU6X3KhhZiDiAE/hq5ju2RwlKmxUINMGIMS6pFkeZ0HIhy8/11) Anything can happen on the first day of school, even a visit from Indiana governor Mike Braun. Braun visited the Century Career Center Wednesday afternoon and spent nearly an hour touring the facility and talking with Logansport Community School Corporation administrators and city officials. Those present included Superintendent Michele Starkey, state Senator Stacey Donato (R), Logansport Mayor Chris Martin and Deputy Mayor Jacob Pomasl, Logansport police chief Travis Yike and the Logansport Community School Corporation school board. Century Career Center director Robert Iles and assistant director Matt Lange led the tour. Braun took nearly 20 minutes to sit down with Starkey and Iles to learn more about the career center following the tour. “I don’t think I’ve seen a place like this across the state,” the governor said. He frequently compared Logansport to his hometown of Jasper, Indiana. “We have nothing close to this and we have wanted that. I don’t know how you have got (the career center) to this point.” He asked Starkey if the career center was developed from an educational push or from local businesses asking the school corporation to build the center. Starkey said it began from an education standpoint but as time has passed the Century Career Center has built strong partnerships with local businesses and often talk with them about the skills they need their employees to have. Bill Cuppy, Logansport-Cass County Chamber of Commerce president, president of the Cass Logansport Economic Development Organization and vice president of the LCSC school board, said that partnering with local businesses allows the career center to purchase state-of-the-art equipment that is currently being used by manufacturers. This allows graduates to easily adapt when joining the workforce. Braun said that it looked like the Century Career Center was on the leading edge of preparing students who want to pursue a career after high school. “I’m an educator but the four-year degree isn’t for everybody,” Starkey said. “We want to take the opportunities to find where our kids fit. If you are a four-year degree track kid, great. If you want to get an associate’s degree, attend technical school or go right into the job market, we try to find what is best for each kid.” When joined by students in Dave Packard’s radio and TV class, Braun said the state was looking to push bringing film production to Indiana. “We are wanting to compete with Georgia and Kentucky to be the Midwest Hollywood,” he said. Braun asked if the career center had thought about adding a CDL program. “It’s something that probably now pays more than anything,” he said. “We have a need for that in our own community and there are some high schools that have gone aggressively on it. Starkey said that they had talked about it but space at the career center was growing limited. “A truck driving job is one that, next to farming, it has the oldest average age of who is driving the truck,” said Braun. “It’s going to have a lot of need. The whole autonomous driving is not going to be near as quick as what you figure.” The governor also told Starkey and Iles about an easy access portal he wanted to create that would include high demand and high wage jobs, the cost of education for those jobs and whether there was a current need for employees in that field. “It’s something that I think we can put together pretty easily and you’d be welcomed to be part of how we construct it since you seem to have one of the most sophisticated feeder systems that I have seen in the state,” he said. The governor took a group photo outside of the career century before heading for the next destination on his itinerary. Iles said the visit made for an exciting first day of school. “I was very excited and proud to show off what Century has and what we are doing for our students,” he said. “Obviously, having the governor visit is a pretty big deal for the Logansport Community School Corporation and Logansport as a city. I think we put our best foot forward.” He said that Starkey and the school board had put the career center in a position to succeed and for the governor to validate that success was nice. “I was pleased with what we were able to show him,” said Starkey. “We were able to give him an overall great summery of what we offer here at the career center and what we try to do for all of our kids.” Starkey told the governor that a lot of their success comes from stability in the school corporation, from retaining administrators and teachers to school board members. “I really believe that is why we are able to make so many improvements and do what we do for our kids and our community,” she said. “I think that is really important for him to hear and it was very encouraging and reassuring when he called what we were doing ahead of the curve and being visionary which is what we try to do.” The Century Career Center offers 25 different programs to students from seven schools, including programs in agriculture, auto repair, manufacturing and construction, health care and more. If you want to get an associate’s degree, attend technical school or go right into the job market, we try to find what is best for each kid.” When joined by students in Dave Packard’s radio and TV class, Braun said the state was looking to push bringing film production to Indiana. “We are wanting to compete with Georgia and Kentucky to be the Midwest Hollywood,” he said. Braun asked if the career center had thought about adding a CDL program. “It’s something that probably now pays more than anything,” he said. “We have a need for that in our own community and there are some high schools that have gone aggressively on it. Starkey said that they had talked about it but space at the career center was growing limited. “A truck driving job is one that, next to farming, it has the oldest average age of who is driving the truck,” said Braun. “It’s going to have a lot of need. The whole autonomous driving is not going to be near as quick as what you figure.” The governor also told Starkey and Iles about an easy access portal he wanted to create that would include high demand and high wage jobs, the cost of education for those jobs and whether there was a current need for employees in that field. “It’s something that I think we can put together pretty easily and you’d be welcomed to be part of how we construct it since you seem to have one of the most sophisticated feeder systems that I have seen in the state,” he said. The governor took a group photo outside of the career century before heading for the next destination on his itinerary. Iles said the visit made for an exciting first day of school. “I was very excited and proud to show off what Century has and what we are doing for our students,” he said. “Obviously, having the governor visit is a pretty big deal for the Logansport Community School Corporation and Logansport as a city. I think we put our best foot forward.” He said that Starkey and the school board had put the career center in a position to succeed and for the governor to validate that success was nice. “I was pleased with what we were able to show him,” said Starkey. “We were able to give him an overall great summery of what we offer here at the career center and what we try to do for all of our kids.” Starkey told the governor that a lot of their success comes from stability in the school corporation, from retaining administrators and teachers to school board members. “I really believe that is why we are able to make so many improvements and do what we do for our kids and our community,” she said. “I think that is really important for him to hear and it was very encouraging and reassuring when he called what we were doing ahead of the curve and being visionary which is what we try to do.” The Century Career Center offers 25 different programs to students from seven schools, including programs in agriculture, auto repair, manufacturing and construction, health care and more. | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. WWW.INDIANA.GOP. | | 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Chrissy
subject: Education is under attack, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Until recently, Trump was withholding over $7 million already promised to PA-06 schools.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113127148/562731021/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjZiYTk0MS1jYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUl8vFkvfHK8reu8ynfnD4jeApxHiOp2v49tWzVC8G4=&emci=b3356156-4c6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7b6ba941-cc76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek, during his campaign, Trump promised to dismantle the Department of Education entirely. And just six months in, we've seen how far he's willing to go to get the job done.
Schools across PA learned recently that the funds they’d been promised to pay for services to students when they came back this fall, weren’t coming. For schools in PA-06 alone, that was **$7 million**. As teachers were scrambling to figure out how to transport, feed, and supply materials for our kids, I was raising the alarm in Washington.
Thankfully, those funds have now been released but this is yet another case of the President being both the arsonist and the firefighter: He recklessly and dangerously sets something on fire and then likes to be the hero who puts it out. Although this education crisis was averted, **our fight for education is far from over, Derek.**
As a former teacher, I know firsthand how education can open doors and break down barriers. That's why I've worked tirelessly in Congress to advocate for quality education for all, from leading efforts to invest in public schools to supporting teachers.

**But my efforts to expand access to education are being gutted by Trump's GOP allies in Congress, who are backing the mass firings within the Department of Education and making student loans more expensive and harder to get.[Please, will you chip in $5 right away to help me defend public education?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113127149/562731022/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1159-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjZiYTk0MS1jYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUl8vFkvfHK8reu8ynfnD4jeApxHiOp2v49tWzVC8G4=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113127150/562731023/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1159-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjZiYTk0MS1jYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUl8vFkvfHK8reu8ynfnD4jeApxHiOp2v49tWzVC8G4=)
---
My parents always told me that education was the one thing no one can ever take from you, and they were right. And while hard-earned education cannot be stripped away, access and opportunity _can be_. That's what we're seeing today.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113127152/562731025/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1159-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjZiYTk0MS1jYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUl8vFkvfHK8reu8ynfnD4jeApxHiOp2v49tWzVC8G4=)
Our students, educators, and communities deserve better, Derek. That's why I'm committed to doing everything I can to stop the GOP's attacks against public education – but I can't do it without you.
**[Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to help me reach my $5,000 goal so we can continue to protect PA-06 from the Trump administration's disastrous agenda and defend education?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113127155/562731028/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1159-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjZiYTk0MS1jYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUl8vFkvfHK8reu8ynfnD4jeApxHiOp2v49tWzVC8G4=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113127158/562731030/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1159-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjZiYTk0MS1jYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUl8vFkvfHK8reu8ynfnD4jeApxHiOp2v49tWzVC8G4=)

There's work to be done.

Chrissy

Devon, PA 19333

name: Dr. Maxine Dexter
subject: We need to protect our veterans from Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Hey Peter,
Not only are Veterans Affairs (VA) hospitals understaffed, but many essential programs have been slashed—and now, Donald Trump is coming for veterans’ reproductive care.
The president is trying to ban abortions at all VA hospitals—in any state—which would be the most extreme abortion ban of any federal health provider in the country.
The ban doesn’t make any exceptions for rape or incest.
It’s yet another example of Donald Trump betraying our veterans.
Unlike him, I trained as a physician at the VA, and am now a proud member of the House Veterans’ Affairs Committee. I will not stand by while Trump makes it so that the people who fight for our freedom are less free than other Americans.
That’s why I am proud to help introduce the Reproductive Freedom for Veterans Act to protect veterans’ control over their bodies.
Will you add your voice to the fight? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/B3-ith_FpkyEU41-L0KEVw2]
SIGN OUR PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/B3-ith_FpkyEU41-L0KEVw2]
This isn’t the first time Donald Trump tried to meddle with veterans’ health insurance. Let’s review:
Earlier this year, he...
❌ Gutted more than 30,000 jobs at the VA and lost more than 680 physicians and 1,880 nurses.
❌ Slashed Medicaid programs when more than 1.6 million veterans are enrolled.
❌ Cut SNAP when nearly 1.2 million veteran households receive food assistance.
We promised our veterans the best care possible in exchange for their service.
Instead, Trump’s legislation will cost our veterans their freedom and their dignity.
We need to build resistance and fight back. Will you chip in what you can to support our work? Every bit makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250811_VAaccess_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_250811_VAaccess_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_250811_VAaccess_act]
Enraged,
Maxine

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: He joined at 15. He returned a hero.
body:
Take home the sand he fought on

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1hjjr21jt854k8j3bn0vp8qa52vkicfaiijkftg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm4ob4clh2bs)
---
Dear Friend, Jake was just a kid from the country. He grew up on a farm two miles outside of Hope, Minnesota. He couldn't afford movie tickets and nearly quit high school to help his family. At 15, he and his cousin walked into the local armory and lied about their age. "Just say 18, Jake," his cousin whispered. So he did. **That 's how Jake joined the National Guard -- a boy with dirt on his boots, answering the call to serve his country.**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm53ebk3k36u0ttm6jk37j8ulb1oi8596a8308uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm4ob4clh2bs)
---
By the time he was 22, Jake was helping plan the largest amphibious invasion in history. He landed on Omaha Beach with the First Division on D-Day. Water up to his chin. Bullets flying. A million land mines underfoot.He huddled behind a small berm while two German machine guns pinned him down from both sides. Jake lit a cigarette -- the only comfort he had. Then turned to a soldier behind him and said:_" Hey buddy, you got a match?"_

No answer. He turned."There was no head under the helmet," Jake told us.Later that night, back at camp, he gave his foxhole to a friend. A stray piece of shrapnel split the rifle on Jake's bed clean in two."That would've been my head," he said.**Friend,****__****these****are the stories we hear all the time at the American Veterans Center.** _These_ are the heroes we walk beside._These_ are the stories we need to capture before it's too late.**Friend, passing on their stories to the next generation matters.** Our freedom came at a price -- and we can NEVER afford to forget it. _**[Will you stand with the American Veterans Center to preserve and pass on these D-Day stories to the next generation? As thanks for your gift of $44 or more today, I'll send you a keepsake of vial of sand from the hallowed beaches of Normandy.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu3s3tj8gp03cc7ft565ui4ova4jv72tag7l8360_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm4ob4clh2bs)**_
---
[ **Donate $44 to receive your Normandy Beach keepsake**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8fjg5l9ms82dtqcb8v3aonprv5sbcmavuqj9oug_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm4ob4clh2bs)
---
Friend, hundreds of World War II veterans have trusted the American Veterans Center and patriotic Americans like _you_ to honor their generation since AVC's founding in 1995. **_In fact, AVC 's World War II Veterans Committee was specially formed so our World War II heroes could help advise and direct our programs._**Today, I'm grateful that a small number of those same heroes still work closely with us ... and I'm honored to work every day to commemorate those who have since passed._**[To help the American Veterans Center continue to honor our D-Day heroes this month, please make your gift of $44 or more today- and I'll send you a keepsake vial of sand from Normandy.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zevcme83nd15r5f7q6u0bc2pm0m2dcongdugl3co_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm4ob4clh2bs)**_
---
[ **Donate $44 to receive your Normandy Beach keepsake**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgfvq4r5l7ne05km1k5ibbcuegt8nlt96rd5mt1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm4ob4clh2bs)
---
Your support is what enables American Veterans Center to preserve the story of these brave veterans. Together, we can make sure every generation understands the meaning of sacrifice. Jake didn't ask for attention. He just did what had to be done. _**[Let's make sure he, and every hero like him, is never forgotten.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmo9705dhdrpapgh4fm0511mltuk1sl1cc8q3j1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm4ob4clh2bs)**_ Tim Holbert
President
American Veterans Center __[P.S. Jake was just a boy when he joined. But he became part of something so much bigger. Help us share his story-- and honor the greatest generation while we still can. clean_body: Take home the sand he fought on | | | Dear Friend, Jake was just a kid from the country. He grew up on a farm two miles outside of Hope, Minnesota. He couldn't afford movie tickets and nearly quit high school to help his family. At 15, he and his cousin walked into the local armory and lied about their age. "Just say 18, Jake," his cousin whispered. So he did. That 's how Jake joined the National Guard -- a boy with dirt on his boots, answering the call to serve his country. By the time he was 22, Jake was helping plan the largest amphibious invasion in history. He landed on Omaha Beach with the First Division on D-Day. Water up to his chin. Bullets flying. A million land mines underfoot.He huddled behind a small berm while two German machine guns pinned him down from both sides. Jake lit a cigarette -- the only comfort he had. Then turned to a soldier behind him and said:" Hey buddy, you got a match?" No answer. He turned."There was no head under the helmet," Jake told us.Later that night, back at camp, he gave his foxhole to a friend. A stray piece of shrapnel split the rifle on Jake's bed clean in two."That would've been my head," he said.Friend,theseare the stories we hear all the time at the American Veterans Center. These are the heroes we walk beside.These are the stories we need to capture before it's too late.Friend, passing on their stories to the next generation matters. Our freedom came at a price -- and we can NEVER afford to forget it. Friend, hundreds of World War II veterans have trusted the American Veterans Center and patriotic Americans like you to honor their generation since AVC's founding in 1995. In fact, AVC 's World War II Veterans Committee was specially formed so our World War II heroes could help advise and direct our programs.Today, I'm grateful that a small number of those same heroes still work closely with us ... and I'm honored to work every day to commemorate those who have since passed. Your support is what enables American Veterans Center to preserve the story of these brave veterans. Together, we can make sure every generation understands the meaning of sacrifice. Jake didn't ask for attention. He just did what had to be done. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. name: this is not a drill
subject: Trump’s DASTARDLY November Surprise
body:
Donald Trump isn’t just thinking about the 2026 midterms. He’s not just thinking about surviving the scandals surrounding his second term. He’s thinking about 2028 — and how to win it, no matter what
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_mKjkTbg11Luvcjf-c5zBX2c63ZL6yKseV5yuLDTlH7ryHoGE7khUTL-AIAHIux6n3iDed3S8pflC7mUmlb8m1H5CevMJq-6bRamSCyzZA8NXEFxXIB9606FkNE_cbjZSoWGx78l-y1Osa93TJP8QSbvG4Z3XD2x23dptzv0LAuyE3NchXOESuQyElq77M7smM6OQG9864iPRbFJO2Q2r4AxhbsxOKnKSTsVJ7BSh7s=&c=wJ1NRuidgbxXNKV4UV9jog5JYlgMhi1nu6yePqx8UjtBYHZDPPQJ1w==&ch=KR_ROgqUhfyCCwindLI5w8pmjToTuUvGjq9PH0W1SA3yPjFpxgRtjg==)

| Peter,
Donald Trump isn't just thinking about the 2026 midterms. He's not just thinking about surviving the scandals surrounding his second term.
He's thinking about 2028 -- and how to win it, no matter what voters say.
And Pennsylvania's Supreme Court is the linchpin to MAGA's evil plan.
Three Democratic justices are up for retention this November in Pennsylvania. If MAGA operatives can convince enough voters to say "No," they'll flip the court. And once they do, they'll have a MAGA majority ready to greenlight voter suppression laws, uphold gerrymandered maps, and toss out legal challenges that stand in Trump's way.
They tried this in Wisconsin earlier this year and failed -- but they learned a key lesson: don't let the spotlight shine too early. Elon Musk's $40 million check in Wisconsin brought attention, rallied Democrats, and sunk their plan.
This time? They're moving in the shadows. No flashy names. No headlines. Just millions in dark money, already flowing into Pennsylvania, months before most voters even know there's an election.
If we wait until October to respond, we'll already have LOST.
Defend Our Courts is one of the only Democratic groups in this race right now. We're running early ads, reaching voters while they're still persuadable, and building the infrastructure to withstand the wave of MAGA money that's coming.
[Will you rush a donation of $25, $50, or $100 to help us blow Trump's November Surprise wide open and stop MAGA's 2028 strategy in its tracks?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_mKjkTbg11Luvcjf-c5zBX2c63ZL6yKseV5yuLDTlH7ryHoGE7khUTL-AIAHIux6n3iDed3S8pflC7mUmlb8m1H5CevMJq-6bRamSCyzZA8NXEFxXIB9606FkNE_cbjZSoWGx78l-y1Osa93TJP8QSbvG4Z3XD2x23dptzv0LAuyE3NchXOESuQyElq77M7smM6OQG9864iPRbFJO2Q2r-_OVx0cNq5-yotvA-EEpSA=&c=wJ1NRuidgbxXNKV4UV9jog5JYlgMhi1nu6yePqx8UjtBYHZDPPQJ1w==&ch=KR_ROgqUhfyCCwindLI5w8pmjToTuUvGjq9PH0W1SA3yPjFpxgRtjg==)

| | Patriot, You've been a part of this fight before. In fact, your past support helped put conservative firepower on the map when it mattered most. But here's the truth: **this is the moment we need our people the most** --when no one's watching. When the media is tuned out. When the other side is quietly laying groundwork and stockpiling cash. And right now, we're hitting a wall. Donations are slowing. Momentum is softening. And I'd be lying if I said I wasn't thinking about the people who helped us before. That includes you, Patriot. So, here's what I'm asking: **Can I convince you to send in $1 today to let me know that you 're still around? Not for the number--honestly, it's symbolic.**
**Really, consider your donation a signal to me and the team that you 're still here, that you still believe this fight is worth it, and that** you haven't tuned out. **[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zri2pnlchggfthuhldbbomfr49u6ppbi48q6ehbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm4ob4c5h2bs)[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z36e1vv68odm3qqpdealdmoo62a3unl37vmd4p7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm4ob4c5h2bs)[CHIP IN $1>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs1r2i0k4c62jn680j2tg8pgldlpc8bq80t8mu2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjgm4ob4c5h2bs)** I'd rather have 10,000 conservatives chipping in $1 because it shows we have real Americans backing our efforts and not Hollywood Elites or Mega Donors like the Socialist Democrats depend on. I'm asking you to make a donation. Even just $1. Especially now. For liberty,
**Ted Cruz**

Friend,
#### **Saturday, August 16, 1:00PM to 5:00PM, Upper East Side, NYC**
## **Hiroshima and Gaza —****Never Again!****

****(In-Person & Online)**
#### **From Tragedy To Reconciliation and Hope - Lessons for Today - Film, Play and Panel Discussion with Author Dr. Mikamo and International Peace Activists**

### Live Broadcast Schedule
#### _Note: This program will only be shown live. Any recording or rebroadcasting of the film, play or panel discussion film are strictly prohibited._
#### **12:30 PM - 1:00 PM Check-in Registration**
**1:00 PM - 2:00 PM Greeting & Film Screening "8:15 Hiroshima—From Father to Daughter”**
**2:00 PM - 3:00 PM Panel Discussion with Executive Producer, Author Dr. Akiko Mikamo and Others**
**3:15 PM - 4:30 PM - Showing of Play "The Face of Jizo"**
**4:30 PM - 5:00 PM Book Signing with Dr. Mikamo**
---
#### **About The Event**
On August 16th, 2025 in NYC, from 1pm to 5pm, Humanity for Peace, in collaboration with Liberty Speaks, The Schiller Institute and the International Peace Coalition will be co-sponsoring a special event, as part of the international commemorations in honor and memory of the victims of the horrific atomic bombings 80 years ago of Hiroshima and Nagasaki. We will be showing a film and a play, which both center on the themes of resilience, forgiveness, and the journey of recovery from horrendous trauma --the pathway to peace. The film, “8:15 Hiroshima—From Father to Daughter,” and a book by the same name, is based on a first-hand account of Shinji Mikamo’s experience, as told by his daughter, Dr. Akiko Mikamo, a Japanese psychologist, author, and executive producer of the film. Dr. Mikamo's father, Shinji was less than a mile away from the epicenter of the nuclear bomb and miraculously survived. The film presents the horrifying reality of nuclear war from Shinji’s perspective, but also explores the basis upon which future wars can be avoided, through love, forgiveness, and compassion for the other. The play, "The Face of Jizo," beautifully recounts the story of a young "Hibakusha" (atomic bomb survivor) and poignantly illustrates why we must not only say but mean "Never Again!" Such a message has rarely been presented to the population. It has also never been more needed than now, on the 80th anniversary of the use of the atomic bomb in Hiroshima and Nagasaki. Those actions have never been properly understood by the majority of the American public. More importantly, among delusional members of the War Party, there is a still-unaccepted truth about nuclear warfare. That truth was declared by former President Ronald Reagan and Soviet leader Mikhail Gorbachev at their summit in Geneva in 1985: “A nuclear war cannot be won and must never be fought.” That declaration between the world’s largest nuclear powers has been forgotten by many prominent officials within the U.S. military-industrial-financial complex. For example, during an event at the Center of Strategic and International Studies in Washington D.C., on Nov. 20, 2024, Rear Admiral Thomas Buchanan, spokesman for the Pentagon’s Strategic Command, wildly asserted that, “If we have an exchange then we want to do it in terms that are most acceptable to the United States,” and further stating that the U.S. would still have enough nuclear weapons left over to have the U.S. “continue leading globally.” In reality, if a single nuclear weapon were to be used today—even a low-yield “tactical” nuke—entire arsenals of nations would then be detonated in a global thermonuclear exchange, leading to the end of all life on the planet. In 1962, President John Kennedy, against the advice of his Joint Chiefs of Staff who were urging him to launch a military invasion into Cuba, launched back-channel negotiations together with his brother, Robert F. Kennedy, to resolve the Cuban Missile crisis diplomatically with Soviet Premier Nikita Khrushchev. We must, once again, use diplomacy to resolve tensions between nations, and form a new security and development architecture which takes into account the interests of not just one global superpower, but all nations. Between the film and the play, we will have an important panel discussion with author Dr. Akiko Mikamo, Schiller Institute Chair Helga Zepp-LaRouche, Veteran Intelligence Professionals for Sanity (VIPS) founder Ray McGovern, Actor Eddy Toru, and John Steinbach.

body:
Promises made, promises kept | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f14411942636422e95ca5bb3fcbee191&_e=tbBGnPxXuJ7NN7Iuc-pI7ZVP_8c1rxKX0bBhnESfLVaq9cTqytfEccpGL-ckA2K0tum6c4enWW2YzwSDadcEWkVY3X91fVIuDtYw4SWQQfHGLOY_PU_o_643SLDly419zL2-4T_nt3DEudrTN8me3r23_AgDs6h29Zj-IzkAq3HJ2Qt32CAN8gLykY2p1unwv5R-gnepEyo9S2hDR39FzgXoyttU7qdvopZNxFT-jQCCQVaPNbl_W4S9GDXSrVU2bbb2EzA8roGcjgikziq_Sno90-HWBQDMcaaZ0TiY8g81cDOYzgVvl5zffZMi30x-yF8h2JCqL44A1HS9uU5TBiLam_RSkuZ87W_CH84ieeRxLdqetGbhYiNhWEl7dpaSkcHn8duMxpWdwTDeZqWBVPqjyRtDQEPsYlCHEU28HLA4wjcd8cTOvS2Wqj1_V2KNE5hzmKSrnNkQvfhNuTJdVh6rvMjLM_6tn7CQLEn2nApJYK5eWtLHf_PNYn8z5FjEqk7rRHhlyff3La-MvHLYgjPYbkZkTa9-XYsT-0gLy8F0DNaROKgMWJNOGANL8OdgfOgFdVdR80F7-LZB3-7KQdda13L5FCDdD-hzNjcBxNk5iB8HhmQf3EwslFZ4LcWqfJRXTHEHVufK9v_fToy9iu9Uw8ehNIbKEKJFrLpgNoIIsQDiUsUqGNMLcEKjDvLq3ysI3Yljlr_we82Y-Mu0AmLxdSETkc2bir6UmZQEx3h4FIPzeOqNWSP-ofrYSAaptoYb_OfDmf_yPo6ebd7TbyNlfix8nx5Y0kydpI-LdcmWqxUmhzuA_XdX62HZt5EWRXdLrz3W0M1EHTAg7_yRFkNrns9kqMxErebRhGlm1LH-KvSGV4lvmNpsZM6XHAy_cUM6vckt5qmxvPTY0v4syy0sj2DHiY6vT-B1KxAplyE%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

**I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot.**

**
You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — **[I’m asking you to come off the sidelines for just one dollar.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f14411942636422e95ca5bb3fcbee191&_e=tbBGnPxXuJ7NN7Iuc-pI7ZVP_8c1rxKX0bBhnESfLVaq9cTqytfEccpGL-ckA2K0tum6c4enWW2YzwSDadcEWkVY3X91fVIuDtYw4SWQQfHGLOY_PU_o_643SLDly419zL2-4T_nt3DEudrTN8me3r23_AgDs6h29Zj-IzkAq3HJ2Qt32CAN8gLykY2p1unwv5R-gnepEyo9S2hDR39FzgXoyttU7qdvopZNxFT-jQCCQVaPNbl_W4S9GDXSrVU2bbb2EzA8roGcjgikziq_Sno90-HWBQDMcaaZ0TiY8g81cDOYzgVvl5zffZMi30x-yF8h2JCqL44A1HS9uU5TBiLam_RSkuZ87W_CH84ieeTYg_BkLWRbIiDZl6eCFqH1APdFC3mSLlL3sCNlc8uiSbjx3W04yT94_RlnspZNHlWlP_qlt1HAV2jPMgITJt1Es5ptjp4uUPx4FMUmdQWgt_dFuH_GKTg2EGJvVX6y0oUX0PjDY32CXUGTYdEyop2zEuAPcnjwvQC_qC6Rlu65TCVLEGll6vq4niwFS_JR1EQTWLHGgSCohafjarkpB9DZEOqmXe9ow4IYMBN_xYf_gR-yWLC5QbeHkuNO2jH4ChJiwlfAkxv3DcejnsBqfMBwPwTYkdiGCpyg7yBpTzE8xDcDrxFRPyx1ZjuCmuPekn34X5DtCeUIk99Ny5rQweyWXZSrHK1yrGZIkUBnEZ3RchEkPgOVDF76Goco9JiGvMw7mETyiruK9sjS45AM6wEaa6u1Dx2sjRknpKlhk5j8KVxDGMgkuUrNi3mIacGnPJlwcIi17LBpPoaAET7iMXpkUNakIJViDCkn5RYRMPqZ12iQri2PgL6DDxsLOBCt_CBlmax8JOoI1cbWDx1ujveSQ4uInxD0znOk3aUhHAZLxm36y8FbjbLrhGQf--ABc38%3D) **

Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why?

Because **it locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including:**
1. $46.5 billion for the wall
2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities
3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states.

**They want revenge.**

If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down.

That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up.

Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you.

When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: **we’re still in this fight.
**

clean_body: | | | ** MAGA Virginia State Delegate Ian Lovejoy says, "it’s always great to be with Moms for Liberty .. It’s always great to be with Americans for Prosperity." You read that right. Lovejoy loves: Moms for Liberty ... a virulently anti-LGBTQ+ group that pushes for book bans and discrimination in our schools. Americans for Prosperity... the dark-money group founded by the Koch Brothers that just endorsed Lovejoy for re-election. Delegate Ian Lovejoy is one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election in less than 90 days.** National Republicans are spending big to end the 51-49 Democratic majority in the VA House of Delegates. But if mom, social worker, and Democrat Elizabeth Guzman unseats Lovejoy, we'll EXPAND our majority instead and give Trump Republicans a big defeat. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Guzman for Delegate | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. _August 11th, 2025 at 08:52 PM UTC_

---
| | Hey Reader, I got you a gift for you... Something to help protect you and your family while you’re on the road. And you’re going to want this, especially if you travel with your CCW. Because you don’t want to go to court with nothing but a story... you need solid, indisputable evidence...
**[Which is why I’m giving away 500 of my new Dash Eagle cameras at below wholesale cost](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21776/6374453/ea2c388d38b447a932c8361ba1806a841304caf9/e3ef4bb75d31bae84df209be1aa6902fa5d235b0)** Every time you hit the road, you’ll have an HD dashboard camera to record everything that happens on the road, and inside your vehicle... So if you get in an accident, an altercation, or if you get pulled over by the police... You’ll be able to **record every second** with crystal clear video and audio... And you’ll never have to worry about not having any proof to back your case in court. It installs in just seconds and you can charge it in your car while simultaneously recording... But like I said... body:

Democrats have been weaponizing Civil Rights era laws to cheat for years. Their latest stunt is no exception.

Their ridiculous behavior is getting more and more desperate.

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Jay Jones doesn’t want to talk about his last job before running for Attorney General.

**Why?** Because he decided to flee Virginia.

In 2022, Jay Jones served less than a year as an Assistant Attorney General — **not in Virginia, but in Washington, DC** — **while murders, shootings, and carjackings exploded.**

* 🚨 Violent crime surged by nearly 25%

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: They’re not slowing down. Neither can we
body:
This is our stand for Colorado.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
| | Peter,

Every day, the Left gets bolder.
They’re flooding Colorado with out-of-state money, weaponizing the media, and pushing radical policies that strip away our freedoms. All while pretending they speak for _us_. Well, I’ve got news for them: They don’t.
I launched the **[]()[Rocky Mountain Voice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** to give the people of Colorado a megaphone — to speak truth, to fight back, and to hold the Left accountable.
But we’re up against a well-funded machine. And if we’re going to win this battle for our state, I need you with me.
🔥 If you believe Colorado is worth fighting for — **[DONATE NOW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** 🔥 If you’re done being silenced by the woke mob — **[DONATE NOW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** 🔥 If you want real change — **[DONATE NOW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
This is a movement. It’s growing. And it’s working but only because of supporters like you, Peter.
Now’s the time to double down. June is critical. The Left won’t take the summer off and neither will we.
Let’s stand together, speak louder, and fight harder.

Donald Trump promised to safeguard Social Security and Medicare for Americans.

**But in July, his MAGA allies in Congress voted “yes” to the largest Medicaid cut in history** – turning their backs on the more than 70 million Americans who rely on these critical public services.

**Now, they’re putting Social Security on the chopping block next.** Due to cuts made by the Trump administration, the program may run out of funds as early as 2033!

New Dems are fighting tooth-and-nail to defend Social Security in Congress, but we can’t win this fight alone.

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Families will lose food while billionaires get tax breaks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
About a month ago, the GOP’s cruel, immoral, and disastrous budget passed Congress and was signed into law by Donald Trump.
They said it would help working families – it doesn’t.
They said it was about tax relief – it’s not. (Unless you’re a billionaire.)
They said it was about border security – it’s definitely not making us any more secure. Instead, it increases funds for Trump’s unaccountable ICE raids that have been terrorizing our neighbors and immigrant communities.
And now the consequences are hitting home here in California:
→ Up to 1.4 million Californians will lose Medi-Cal coverage
→ Over 3 million California families will lose food assistance under new restrictions
→ Families still eligible for SNAP will lose $146/month on average
→ 5.5 million kids on Medi-Cal will face tighter eligibility requirements and potentially lose their coverage entirely
Meanwhile, the top 0.1% of earners are getting a massive tax break.
Research shows that Medicaid and SNAP are two of the strongest ladders out of poverty, but Trump and the GOP just slashed them with this new legislation.
Here’s the bottom line: this law will force one of the largest wealth transfers in U.S. history – taking from working families and giving to the ultra-rich.
Now, more children, seniors, and people with disabilities will go hungry because Republicans wanted to fund a tax break for billionaires.
Call me crazy, but unlike my Republican colleagues, I believe that having good health care, being able to put healthy food on the table, and securing safe, affordable housing should all be within reach for everyone.
But now, the goal post for achieving the American Dream has been moved even further away from regular people.
The only way to fight back against all of this in a meaningful way is to kick the GOP out of the majority and retake it for Democrats – so I’m hyperfocused on helping make that happen.
Will you join me? Anything you contribute today will directly support our work to flip the House in 2026 – and we could really use your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Thank you so much.
-Sara

Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

clean_body: [] About a month ago, the GOP’s cruel, immoral, and disastrous budget passed Congress and was signed into law by Donald Trump. They said it would help working families – it doesn’t. They said it was about tax relief – it’s not. (Unless you’re a billionaire.) They said it was about border security – it’s definitely not making us any more secure. Instead, it increases funds for Trump’s unaccountable ICE raids that have been terrorizing our neighbors and immigrant communities. And now the consequences are hitting home here in California: → Up to 1.4 million Californians will lose Medi-Cal coverage → Over 3 million California families will lose food assistance under new restrictions → Families still eligible for SNAP will lose $146/month on average → 5.5 million kids on Medi-Cal will face tighter eligibility requirements and potentially lose their coverage entirely Meanwhile, the top 0.1% of earners are getting a massive tax break. Research shows that Medicaid and SNAP are two of the strongest ladders out of poverty, but Trump and the GOP just slashed them with this new legislation. Here’s the bottom line: this law will force one of the largest wealth transfers in U.S. history – taking from working families and giving to the ultra-rich. Now, more children, seniors, and people with disabilities will go hungry because Republicans wanted to fund a tax break for billionaires. Call me crazy, but unlike my Republican colleagues, I believe that having good health care, being able to put healthy food on the table, and securing safe, affordable housing should all be within reach for everyone. But now, the goal post for achieving the American Dream has been moved even further away from regular people. The only way to fight back against all of this in a meaningful way is to kick the GOP out of the majority and retake it for Democrats – so I’m hyperfocused on helping make that happen. Will you join me? Anything you contribute today will directly support our work to flip the House in 2026 – and we could really use your support. [] If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] Thank you so much. -Sara [] Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] twitter.com/sarajacobsca [twitter.com/sarajacobsca] www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. name: Mark Warner
subject: About my fight against corporations using AI & personal data to set prices:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113132954/562751793/1668162259?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Delta_250811_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Delta_250811_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTI5NjQxZi1kNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Yr5-7I-Hwig8Lrl_mHna-0Ni9MTOhjgkiftpU4ywbg=) Derek,

At a time when families are already stretched thin from rising inflation, sky-high costs, and child care expenses, Delta wants to use artificial intelligence to squeeze even more out of your wallet.

They’re testing a system that uses AI to predict the _maximum_ fare you might be willing to pay – and then charging you exactly that.

Not based on the route. Not based on supply and demand. Based on _you_.

That’s not innovation. That’s surveillance pricing. I’m pushing back.

[_**If you agree that corporations should NOT use AI and surveillance pricing to pad their profits, add your name to my petition >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113132956/562751797/-1908912133?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Delta_250811_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Delta_250811_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTI5NjQxZi1kNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Yr5-7I-Hwig8Lrl_mHna-0Ni9MTOhjgkiftpU4ywbg=&emci=b50cf3e4-c776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5e29641f-d676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237) ****[ADD YOUR NAME NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113132959/562751799/-1908912133?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Delta_250811_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Delta_250811_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTI5NjQxZi1kNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Yr5-7I-Hwig8Lrl_mHna-0Ni9MTOhjgkiftpU4ywbg=&emci=b50cf3e4-c776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5e29641f-d676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237)**** Here’s how it works: You buy tickets to a theme park. You search for hotels. Then you go to book a flight – and suddenly the fare spikes. Why? Because Delta’s AI may be watching what you do online, collecting personal data, and setting a price that hits your individual “pain point.”

I’ve demanded answers from Delta – about what data they’re using, how it’s being collected, and what protections, if any, are in place for consumers.

Because this isn't just about one airline. It sets a dangerous precedent: letting corporations quietly harvest personal data to charge you more – just because they can.

Look, I spent my career investing in technology and encouraging innovation in our tech sector – but we can’t let innovation be confused with greed. We need to protect consumer privacy at all costs.

[_**Sign my petition now if you agree that corporations should NOT use AI and surveillance pricing to pad their profits.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113132961/562751802/-1908912133?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Delta_250811_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Delta_250811_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTI5NjQxZi1kNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Yr5-7I-Hwig8Lrl_mHna-0Ni9MTOhjgkiftpU4ywbg=&emci=b50cf3e4-c776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5e29641f-d676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237)

Thank you for taking action,

Mark Warner

body:
I’m running to replace Ryan Mackenzie because Pennsylvanians deserve a representative who fights for our healthcare, not someone who wants to roll back the progress we’ve made.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113133910/562755323/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjIwZGFlY2UtZDg3Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ja7G-SwJVACu0gTkWmmnyWTn0IpJrpnoSpatYVcA_8s=)

| Peter, this is personal.

**Ryan Mackenzie wants to defund Planned Parenthood, gut healthcare for thousands in PA-07, and rip away access to reproductive care.**

Healthcare decisions should be between us and our doctors, not controlled by politicians like Mackenzie who have shown time and again that they care more about corporate interests than the well-being of our families.

But we don’t have to let him win. It’s time we kick Mackenzie out of our doctors’ offices and out of Congress.

clean_body: I’m running to replace Ryan Mackenzie because Pennsylvanians deserve a representative who fights for our healthcare, not someone who wants to roll back the progress we’ve made. | = | Peter, this is personal. Ryan Mackenzie wants to defund Planned Parenthood, gut healthcare for thousands in PA-07, and rip away access to reproductive care. Healthcare decisions should be between us and our doctors, not controlled by politicians like Mackenzie who have shown time and again that they care more about corporate interests than the well-being of our families. But we don’t have to let him win. It’s time we kick Mackenzie out of our doctors’ offices and out of Congress. = | | | = | = | = | = | = I’m running to replace Ryan Mackenzie because Pennsylvanians deserve a representative who fights for our healthcare, not someone who wants to roll back the progress we’ve made. Thank you for standing with me, Carol Obando-Derstine * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O. Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Joe Shepherd, House DFL Rural Campaigns Director
subject: I just wanted to introduce myself, Team!
disclaimer_text: paid for by the
body:
Hi Team,
My name is Joe Shepherd. I am the House DFL’s Rural Campaigns Director. No matter where you live in this state, your voice and your vote matter. I’m going to tell you what I’m up to this year, but first, if you want to stay in the loop, sign up for my periodic updates here: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/6QElK09HSk-JBZ1a90cYWA2]
SEND ME RURAL CAMPAIGN UPDATES [https://secure.ngpvan.com/6QElK09HSk-JBZ1a90cYWA2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/6QElK09HSk-JBZ1a90cYWA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/6QElK09HSk-JBZ1a90cYWA2]
Last year, I put 62,000 miles on my truck to organize with DFLers in all 87 counties. Despite Donald Trump swamping the top of the ticket, our rural House DFL candidates actually gained ground in many places. That was only possible because no Minnesota Republican was running unopposed for the first time since 2018. And we can’t forget our countless partners on the ground.
I know the path to taking back the House runs through a lot of small towns with big parades. That’s why I am so glad to be launching our Rural Rebuild Road Trip. Building on our progress from last year, many House members want to join me in visiting our rural communities and rekindling relationships across the state. There is a lot of work to be done in rural Minnesota, but nothing worthwhile is ever easy.
I’m just about to hop in my truck to visit another rural DFL group. If you want to keep track of what we are doing or if you just want to find some of the best places to eat in rural Minnesota, you can sign up here for updates - I promise I won’t spam you! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/6QElK09HSk-JBZ1a90cYWA2]
SEND ME RURAL CAMPAIGN UPDATES [https://secure.ngpvan.com/6QElK09HSk-JBZ1a90cYWA2]
See you on the trail,
Joe Shepherd
Rural Campaigns Director
Minnesota House DFL
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25-email?refcode=081025_ENG_RuralCampaigns_JS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25-email?refcode=081025_ENG_RuralCampaigns_JS]
We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session.
Give $75 and Get $75 back from Minnesota! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25-email?refcode=081025_ENG_RuralCampaigns_JS]
The Political Contribution Refund is a Minnesota program that lets you donate $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state. It’s a fantastic way to support the work of the House DFL. Can we count on you to make your refundable donation today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: Reporting waste, fraud, and abuse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-11 [secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-11]
Last week the Trump Administration announced construction of a $200 million golden ballroom as an addition to the White House. This is from the Administration, which claimed to make, waste, fraud, and abuse a centerpoint of their governance.
And last month, we saw the passage of the “One Big Beautiful Bill” Act, which cut Medicaid coverage for 10 million Americans. Decisions like this are yet another insult to the Americans who lost their health care to pay for the Trump Administration’s tax cuts for the wealthy.
These volatile decisions leave me asking: where is DOGE? Congressional Republicans voted last month to codify DOGE’s spending cuts to foreign aid and PBS, but I can’t think of more wasteful spending than a golden ballroom – especially as millions of Americans are set to lose their health coverage.
We need to win the majority and the gavels in 2026 to hold this Administration accountable. I’ll be here fighting every day, but I need your help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-11]

Thank you,
Sarah Elfreth

body:

I'm Retired Brigadier General Shawn Harris -- and **I'm running against the most dangerous voice in Congress, Marjorie Taylor Greene.** When I was a kid in rural Georgia, summers meant gathering under the big elm tree at my neighbor's house. That's where the county delivered free lunches -- peanut butter sandwiches, fruit, milk -- so no kid went hungry. We laughed, we played, and we looked out for each other. Now Marjorie Taylor Greene wants to gut SNAP and slash the local programs that made moments like that possible. She's forgotten what it means to look out for your neighbors. I never will. I served this nation for 40 years. I'm running for Congress to protect the lifelines that help our kids, our families, and our communities thrive. But I can't do it alone. clean_body: | | | I'm Retired Brigadier General Shawn Harris -- and I'm running against the most dangerous voice in Congress, Marjorie Taylor Greene. When I was a kid in rural Georgia, summers meant gathering under the big elm tree at my neighbor's house. That's where the county delivered free lunches -- peanut butter sandwiches, fruit, milk -- so no kid went hungry. We laughed, we played, and we looked out for each other. Now Marjorie Taylor Greene wants to gut SNAP and slash the local programs that made moments like that possible. She's forgotten what it means to look out for your neighbors. I never will. I served this nation for 40 years. I'm running for Congress to protect the lifelines that help our kids, our families, and our communities thrive. But I can't do it alone. ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ | | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

Their inexcusable lies and accusations of “assault” on ICE officers are obviously false. ** **However, Republicans are continuing their attacks on me and pushing to strip me of my committee assignments and even officially censure me. ** **I refuse to be bullied by the Trump administration, House Republicans, or their abuse of power. That’s why I need your help to make sure I’m ready for whatever comes at us next. ** [**Can you split $10 between myself and Blue Amp Action in the next 24 hours to help us ensure we have the resources to counter the dictator-like tactics and ridiculous lies of the Trump Administration? >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4fcf4423-2a09-4d95-9a46-0fac1a5ba71d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0f44c4b-7a1b-49ca-93cc-be6a60dea6ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

At Her Bold Move, we always ask our candidates the following question: If elected, describe how you will support women and issues that are important to the women in your district/city/state.

Here’s how Mira responded to that question – and why we are excited to see what she will do in office:

_**Expanding the Social Safety Net -** I would like to expand the Orlando Kidz Zones, which provide services to lift families out of poverty. It provides access to early childhood programs and parenting support to get kids off to the right start, and helps support high graduation rates and career opportunities for the city’s youth.

**Improving School Safety and Mental Health Resources -** I would continue to expand mentoring access to girls in order to improve the school climate and reduce disciplinary incidents in schools. I would like to expand the Community Response Team that provides trained behavioral health providers when 911 callers indicate that there is a mental health emergency. Currently, the city can only respond to 1600 of the 20K annual mental health calls with a trained behavioral health team.

**Women’s & Babies Hygiene -** I would like to tackle period poverty and diaper needs by providing free reusable menstrual products and cloth diapers to low-income women and girls. I believe this strategy could pay for itself by decreasing landfill costs, decreasing costly sewage blockages, and decreasing contamination of recycling streams. _

**Mira believes people should feel a sense of connection to their local government. She is eager to engage residents _most impacted_ by local government decisions, including the voices who are unlikely to be heard. **

[**Importantly, what sets Mira apart from her opponents is her energized people-powered campaign on the ground, and wealth of experience in the city council. You can be a part of that effort by splitting a $20.25 or more donation now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbmfl-tanna/?refcode=EM_F_250808TannaB_N_CD_NO_10_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25)

We hope you’ll join us,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move
---

Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies.

name: Powered by People
subject: Democrats took a stand. Now they’re trying to break us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
The attacks on our democracy are escalating—fast.
Right now, Greg Abbott and Ken Paxton are targeting the Texas Democrats who broke quorum to stop a Republican redistricting scheme designed to steal five congressional seats—not through fair elections, but by rigging the system.
And because we stood in solidarity with these brave Democrats, they’ve now launched an investigation into our movement.
Let’s be clear: this isn’t about justice. It’s about intimidation. They want to silence anyone who dares to stand up—and clear the way to dismantle our democracy behind closed doors.
That’s exactly why Texas Democrats left the state: to deny quorum and stop this from happening. And it’s a courageous stand for what’s right.
But they can’t do it alone.
This is where we come in. Our movement exists to organize voters and push back against those who threaten our democracy. With your support, we can keep that fight going—not just in Texas, but across the country.
[**Can you chip in $3 to help us fight back against these attacks and keep building the movement to defend democracy?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250811.DPOtuh&refcode=ema20250811-240308&t=2&akid=240308%2E444211%2EbYQDLT)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250811.DPOtuh&refcode=ema20250811-240308&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=240308%2E444211%2EbYQDLT)**
Thank you,
Powered by People

name: Juliana, United We Dream
subject: 79% of Americans support immigration
body:
This poll shows that, together, working people can create a powerful movement to drive real change and ensure a brighter, more inclusive future for everyone. | | | Peter — New polling shows that **a record-high****79% of Americans** see immigration as a good thing for the country.1 As conversations around immigration and policy continue to unfold, the role we play in advocating for dignity, respect, and fair treatment for all cannot be overstated. **At United We Dream, our work is laser-focused on creating a future where every individual, regardless of their immigration status, can live freely and without fear.** [**If you’re with us, please consider donating today. Any amount helps us get organized and stand for the dignity and justice of our communities — because our home is here.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtosnmC77yHhMxPjiPQnmkFMxAFAT6M53SxOFN7I9n8Jf7xTd6-RM6onemujLr_Rm49UauFZmWZz0EJ8AvE9zs8qj998h0T5yXn7O172RgpxNkuD3q672WTM-OjPlixtPLGAVVw5YNqq3sLvqoSXuxB6mRy7wbQKkp-MrY9H5PYR4sLx8tdEb_yhy1eNgXWFvxCa4IvYsUE1QXO9RxyyvU7T2hzSmKZ5Kz_onychVZUwUHqkX6YMgMFk2-rajO3TS1nyeHgsOXILmC5WcxSBE3OKCYCOZlXfJ_U0wGqJbv0VLZIMkpoZ2wh0jKh_eZ8eljC9SFEa8hhOjLE3UW8b9h8AySOaGSmZmY18ugep9sg7ffONeQY-p2g603d7F4PqxA6chp5uJpYMyKMQHXbdg5zU/4iy/EDzDBRkmSZClU0KentCUCg/h0/h001.zmD_WeQ0Dd_eadatnfH6FkERYO4A21TEcqwul_Hx3R8) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtosnmC77yHhMxPjiPQnmkFMxAFAT6M53SxOFN7I9n8Jf7xTd6-RM6onemujLr_Rm48SeQcKoW1me9NaLqkqjCq9egP2uc-XRGEjdW-SpIRfDOE5-1Iq3mBoHXE6ge7TlSuBPSj_CuW7z6I4COSvFcyn018rveVcas1Y5i8DiHyv0NYrwp6E3l4vXWjE9qvtn8ubq8hsm4n-LdDlJaP2p29aXsPF5OyxelSP1fcvE3ecO_aSSqdtFtX8xSifu--KToXXvWLE38I8CS_PoNx45DRjUqyQjBTqawsrRyP3ngGg7bynAdO3ToKBiPMVUzblLOOj8wXfJmzIc5btxlud9STBTpcuGVPW2r2C6AZYUqNlYo1H3lsmZPS143oBHcYqwTv_UNIO2iEiX2X73m9rJQw0/4iy/EDzDBRkmSZClU0KentCUCg/h1/h001.94Z0KFgn0rud2h7uQ1rVMt1SUbSsouC7yEyFWjyE1bc) | | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtosnmC77yHhMxPjiPQnmkFMxAFAT6M53SxOFN7I9n8JfDhAP_iy3Xe-XntYPLI_ShsmK8wd3mG_Wqm294GdmB8AB9DLxn0HRiTyYadAS6b1XdOUC_-ltnq-xuQtZfNJfSq30_Fc5JuhSUDFcHvTNp2Wt-beIoN4-JttVL0aG3sVIEq7fzXPi2o1uLrmxJyO6VWes9lbNyAyruvYT1pWXlH4Z4fXR6gLT1WSGHvfd2LHOcj_7HfMZ9zAW2jjAZ6uHxXsEZWPkxjz1NNgil1qf8AxYrbvW-GRSanKMXQUMww0hzr_so35dARPbYHyXC1fIUVygTlTZN09QxKY8r7lh2hvVUukkuOm9bYwdGu3NNUNsb1rUE5qO3qA-i_uI-y7kwA/4iy/EDzDBRkmSZClU0KentCUCg/h2/h001.6mTaOkJGJAWmHm1cvlUy0nVqsOGEiCcCPBgRXD7Rtmw)

We believe in a world where individuals can thrive in their education and careers, where families stay united, and where our communities are enriched by the diversity we bring.
We know that a majority of Americans want to help make that future a reality. _Here’s what you can do right now:_
**🤝 Join our campaigns.** Get involved in our advocacy for permanent protections for all immigrants, like urging Congress to pass the _Dream and Promise Act_ and powering programs like the _Summer of Dreams_.
**💌 Share stories.** Elevate the voices of immigrants in your community to build understanding and empathy.
**📣 Raise your voice.** Submit and share our Solidarity Notes to share your vision for the future of our communities when we all fight together.
**🧡 Contribute to our cause.** Your donation will directly support initiatives that protect immigrant rights, empower organizers, and realize the future that all working people want to build. [**Every contribution, no matter the size, makes a difference.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtosnmC77yHhMxPjiPQnmkFMxAFAT6M53SxOFN7I9n8Jf7xTd6-RM6onemujLr_Rm45IkBsJl21T89tGL8VA5uc3SZ3F6R8hRkwm30BqhNkI6MGjbsmQlC7nehDZkpgC4IsOspqlyUuSSyLDTq4ayRyIqaUlRmugNlCaE1zA0bNFB6fA6QzYIhG6_hZuoJYV-svLdbCP9ewObLcrdIn1wLPMDInVPXk32_k6kwGuveuzKeYjwesZdFaZs4aN6kgeDOofo8QO2MbidjrGAqL8Cyy7by3wR__uvlHMtFrjfhG_7cVZ25h-Ll3XUiBVgHiLBZsuLQQvDhUjoXF3jprx1RNLWq7hppD8bj9UR8gL2pltfoabbAEzNaw0bXROuDtou_CvQoMstxcpNPJgemUmWA1E/4iy/EDzDBRkmSZClU0KentCUCg/h3/h001.TYuDH8IsJNJ22DIrz0cz6AUNbJlH_Ca8-v6nb2LpuWs)

When working people come together, we can drive real change and ensure a brighter, more inclusive future for everyone. We’ve seen it in movements of the past, and now that we’re facing this crucial moment together, the tides of change are coming.
Thank you for standing with us.
— Juliana, United We Dream

clean_body: This poll shows that, together, working people can create a powerful movement to drive real change and ensure a brighter, more inclusive future for everyone. | | | Peter — New polling shows that a record-high79% of Americans see immigration as a good thing for the country.1 As conversations around immigration and policy continue to unfold, the role we play in advocating for dignity, respect, and fair treatment for all cannot be overstated. At United We Dream, our work is laser-focused on creating a future where every individual, regardless of their immigration status, can live freely and without fear. | | We believe in a world where individuals can thrive in their education and careers, where families stay united, and where our communities are enriched by the diversity we bring. We know that a majority of Americans want to help make that future a reality. Here’s what you can do right now: 🤝 Join our campaigns. Get involved in our advocacy for permanent protections for all immigrants, like urging Congress to pass the Dream and Promise Act and powering programs like the Summer of Dreams. 💌 Share stories. Elevate the voices of immigrants in your community to build understanding and empathy. 📣 Raise your voice. Submit and share our Solidarity Notes to share your vision for the future of our communities when we all fight together. 🧡 Contribute to our cause. Your donation will directly support initiatives that protect immigrant rights, empower organizers, and realize the future that all working people want to build. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** When working people come together, we can drive real change and ensure a brighter, more inclusive future for everyone. We’ve seen it in movements of the past, and now that we’re facing this crucial moment together, the tides of change are coming. Thank you for standing with us. — Juliana, United We Dream 1. “A new poll shows the backlash to Trump's immigration cruelty has begun.” MSNBC. July 14, 2025. Follow us on: | | | | |

body:
We just made history, and now is not the time to let up | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=3dcb9bde4d7e49f3aafb60d3d32ff1d4&_e=1b2sVakIf36hA_rUcKAwkxYpZhK37vQbIAAjJr6CDDwy2AETKDCCSpQGRpwTS_Eozn8SK1DkcopeVuwEe7XsfqCtiVD2UxkAKc90Cq8W5c2ohdemIQFttbnTpwbnjpL6b0y_pwnnIe11cuRQhUjJr2WGCiXz8bcX7SNNdxqVUUFzaLsiuZ_oRDhVc4VLPW_vK4r37ZHOgTKJaXjjF89XAGzArG6YEdjhQUIBa5aHyLUpFHBKmGGyeIcwhXBUTnC5JSteQ5VQVmQmPbIR0Z5DzbU-ZBjl5MwcZIOcgYYO2vnWJIvTZwVyBAWPLRMFbdcXUOwV-GT2ZtSLsOlLtiSWGJT9xuL5dfD9PivHTOtq9O3Z2SHNmq7zHOYRcjlXTZHM3SIMl3M8qCX52-F-iOvJgxqlpno8-6H2N-Sv557ho00twjWYhgI1ZMuPDVFao5VugyKGoSjDkNaJTrQE6oz-iSSsOxzgxjTCa7IjIG9iINYych0Z8f4-B5uTimYXwkojk_K5tHm00xBcAK1EfGpNjB1ZKdI9FpaQ7KeHZAybeVQHwYyEbsFOs-MPW5vkviKNHOTYqBiIzwqK2OIuWJjjAifehqO6DvA6rJScHp5TpcyhrCIx5df0Cbyzk8_4dfys60cxp950Y5JBvaqWYID09fortSTdTpKHzDjFZ0Zru_2PB-zXUHRImMcQKDESoOrHMsu7Mis-HfVvtnFr8fdq4WsQ6Z7UcW5yxzRXCiIuOOhIF8kQbCuNfU4VuE62hg74lwaUqcijSzaMbuZiGxtFjK3ZE_wXpvKMb4_pVZJa5TTEcHvPqyXr-0u5h4agqIrt71z7ueGgsMAl40HafgSpLuxPBKvYVGL0rTHFJaiEOnp8I62JPHOLSGnG7RBSUg1twuFkMM7vG7I59fIc-mBxZA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot.**

**Will you[chip in just $1](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=3dcb9bde4d7e49f3aafb60d3d32ff1d4&_e=1b2sVakIf36hA_rUcKAwkxYpZhK37vQbIAAjJr6CDDwy2AETKDCCSpQGRpwTS_Eozn8SK1DkcopeVuwEe7XsfqCtiVD2UxkAKc90Cq8W5c2ohdemIQFttbnTpwbnjpL6b0y_pwnnIe11cuRQhUjJr2WGCiXz8bcX7SNNdxqVUUFzaLsiuZ_oRDhVc4VLPW_vK4r37ZHOgTKJaXjjF89XAGzArG6YEdjhQUIBa5aHyLUpFHBKmGGyeIcwhXBUTnC5JSteQ5VQVmQmPbIR0Z5DzbU-ZBjl5MwcZIOcgYYO2vnWJIvTZwVyBAWPLRMFbdcXUOwV-GT2ZtSLsOlLtiSWGJT9xuL5dfD9PivHTOtq9O1pcshtrkAgONg56gdbymDOg7aKKbEQztLKi9oI9fS_afhD15e0cA2qbj-rvYgiOMkwzlJR8ziSWrk3utVoebIn3vPBaGQmTNbTJJqk02UNkFrS2KRjv824XkA4z_pjJAPDM-4rkq4-0v4E8ibMrXLXkgVBapBQOXT9ya2FM1327JDRsBVzEyIoOkOHckX1yMbJQwznyoG17yslOU77-YZob-CUOxhRtlLh6TBrsR9VrloV-BUB-taQ6utlItIVy8ePtbfAnGGgeVG1s2nD3X9YIf5P3DKOfmYrqDC-1iCvdRDsBQEPDmdNq1xd1ax1CWix9JV5tKpcx3hP1pt4HLVL7pk7sVkPa1sWt2tefjmMrQ1lXH9Pu5cMuXc7_j_49HrRV_AOZf87X0gZpya-trcKFusMtH5-EfM844GL8M8PiDtbPswKEsFvxAti2HlWWm7AB8E6bFnuAoUctS8cOHp70FZWGEe0-AEEEfWUo-yYX_i13YbhrSZk24w4OI7U1M1V0bVdvubXBtqZZNcAx9Djlq7VV_Ll0TsDv3uwqioD7w%3D%3D) today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate?
**
You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — **[I’m asking you to come off the sidelines for just one dollar.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=3dcb9bde4d7e49f3aafb60d3d32ff1d4&_e=1b2sVakIf36hA_rUcKAwkxYpZhK37vQbIAAjJr6CDDwy2AETKDCCSpQGRpwTS_Eozn8SK1DkcopeVuwEe7XsfqCtiVD2UxkAKc90Cq8W5c2ohdemIQFttbnTpwbnjpL6b0y_pwnnIe11cuRQhUjJr2WGCiXz8bcX7SNNdxqVUUFzaLsiuZ_oRDhVc4VLPW_vK4r37ZHOgTKJaXjjF89XAGzArG6YEdjhQUIBa5aHyLUpFHBKmGGyeIcwhXBUTnC5JSteQ5VQVmQmPbIR0Z5DzbU-ZBjl5MwcZIOcgYYO2vnWJIvTZwVyBAWPLRMFbdcXUOwV-GT2ZtSLsOlLtiSWGJT9xuL5dfD9PivHTOtq9O0NcNgVGvI9ifhOlTKtv6TqvWovRW5TN4YFTfsMgoOmj7VZyq48YicI6oR06fryDUwyIDMeyOBubGWyu0DncKdC2Az9JeaiKzF-X6_UcC8sCuf1qG1DAnhxoNsW_5w2bnmAeGtrM7HL2YN_MkFE9yP-dUa2jZ2sSGwN7CimeWFSyjwE89oSWJC9cbsje8kgA4ExySa0lY-ryNGpxJ8Z_R0qmYzVj8rvxIUyLj3z87zzZqExyYLmiTDDEsLB0LYzskPDIDiCmJ2LY8c70N-MUusR3L-pff6k27QddUpohUd7oqtA4mMe4iaSTDzmCn1FR72kSM8EHLrxwT8fFlAIEpCzpH9ARMI2ZAYX5Usx2dqHs6CbEQ4vCqjrYezaOhdWz_nklm4fZpplMiDC2GAz1tKI7naIprqQeSJlThj4dOy0o66-7ZQQU4rGsQKyc-R9utetr4lHhArCGe5DpqO7dVKASviXT5SziHp9KOwBxxIbirq2GjpmXoZFFc_k0yOj_5nLTRRqU0XLnMyR0SQ_8OrPH7enDS4Ez0RthKJOTVhwRg%3D%3D) **

Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why?

**Because it locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including:**
1. $46.5 billion for the wall
2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities
3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states.

**They want revenge.**

If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down.

That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up.

[**CHIP IN $1 NOW**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=3dcb9bde4d7e49f3aafb60d3d32ff1d4&_e=1b2sVakIf36hA_rUcKAwkxYpZhK37vQbIAAjJr6CDDwy2AETKDCCSpQGRpwTS_Eozn8SK1DkcopeVuwEe7XsfqCtiVD2UxkAKc90Cq8W5c2ohdemIQFttbnTpwbnjpL6b0y_pwnnIe11cuRQhUjJr2WGCiXz8bcX7SNNdxqVUUFzaLsiuZ_oRDhVc4VLPW_vK4r37ZHOgTKJaXjjF89XAGzArG6YEdjhQUIBa5aHyLUpFHBKmGGyeIcwhXBUTnC5JSteQ5VQVmQmPbIR0Z5DzbU-ZBjl5MwcZIOcgYYO2vnWJIvTZwVyBAWPLRMFbdcXUOwV-GT2ZtSLsOlLtiSWGJT9xuL5dfD9PivHTOtq9O2mMiGroHMwM3sQJ-eF4ULfBKe_l-IGSaHzdLnLPLaqv1k4CO6Cuc89-iApDdBSjJyz7Doy1WFhoP1I5yQJIR7eYFbqHshVxaMAfEB0MW-Jwvlf5NZJLGKz08UPpTt2PebtMweBRTsFsgz3CwL83AczUsmmYYW5Ng4pNXYMNetv0Y_A3shTNwJZkeB-c4vFCCpHJRGx_VM84NVlvoq6mItnPBigZw2nP4Q1wxLOKEDOzyrxI25zImTdLRReijmcT9B2ISHJwn2S3KhCicvFgk_0W9XFLdC2icd_C8yD6pJSS-nJW_9F6rFyqmVNwckrRAhJTmj1SSz9imPdMy3U0bFflflnGUCnBgRdfu1ehlTd_qMpGPw4H4qIfKjWube1BPqdLqjT4W0HF-nS95-sKix6xsZqDm7Repgco1-ilU1YleY3DyPMnB9gZpSSCn1NBUE71FRtLRlsF32Y6HLboM88M0rsz0wqSh4BJE6txj94iar6lrPMw2w7VFo2kmNE-kunP3tAlZYvg8IzMDcmRC7hElysYfovB9IuU0ylBhaALw%3D%3D)
Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you.

When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: **we’re still in this fight.
**
You stood with us once. I hope you’ll stand with us again — **[even if it’s just for $1.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=3dcb9bde4d7e49f3aafb60d3d32ff1d4&_e=1b2sVakIf36hA_rUcKAwkxYpZhK37vQbIAAjJr6CDDwy2AETKDCCSpQGRpwTS_Eozn8SK1DkcopeVuwEe7XsfqCtiVD2UxkAKc90Cq8W5c2ohdemIQFttbnTpwbnjpL6b0y_pwnnIe11cuRQhUjJr2WGCiXz8bcX7SNNdxqVUUFzaLsiuZ_oRDhVc4VLPW_vK4r37ZHOgTKJaXjjF89XAGzArG6YEdjhQUIBa5aHyLUpFHBKmGGyeIcwhXBUTnC5JSteQ5VQVmQmPbIR0Z5DzbU-ZBjl5MwcZIOcgYYO2vnWJIvTZwVyBAWPLRMFbdcXUOwV-GT2ZtSLsOlLtiSWGJT9xuL5dfD9PivHTOtq9O3unMhH8i7Im2ouyVSFk5IzQfdB-oC5JZAAssblEx57tZ3ijLgNhpH-I1TYBN7sJlOUGG6yzqK6Vk76DIe52rbvpJpgUXN5giLAFA8Dycniw5P6No66ayVJsiv5GTrAThGHRgPR7Uub4wWqT-JdaywPG7LX_2lp-IdRdT4vAgntQlJAR62mwBP4sHdg6dspE1frpsVok12hd4szmFxsvmiz8oezWH_-vJXN3ckICJ5r5WkKhOsdz_SKIT1Yb_hGliZZ8WTTw_robzc-i1eeGP-SUsnlgvlAk3YgoqdDXSvFVkvBnj9f0UZV4BqbKOWqaKyuVFrcAzJnzPf1tbK0O8795J7kgVj95-iKoteN3RCEX0rG8TFGmTW0k43wAancInzpkD-PPpwOGN5C-BAoDkNo-6jxVHuNb0iKOHsPPoeXFK2jGyj9gsAHWYU4WzMWYT9XB1z_6IRDn4NHdnyonJB2g807vY8cUWw8TsIsFh2XC6mh0GnUOMKKlTZyy2UAxCqmNgilDrSx415R7nIqwcV3mqxL4Dz2iiYwQ-tlcxrm5Q%3D%3D) **

For America,
