clean_body: We just made history, and now is not the time to let up | Fellow Conservative, I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot. Will you today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate? You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why? Because it locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including: 1. $46.5 billion for the wall 2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities 3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states. They want revenge. If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down. That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up. Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you. When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: we’re still in this fight. You stood with us once. I hope you’ll stand with us again — For America, Ted Cruz U.S. Senator - Texas | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Working families are paying the price
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
In July, the U.S. economy added only 72,000 jobs. That’s a dramatic slowdown.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113136269/562764067/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmM1Y2ExOC1kZjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efisPIN7HUWxhYU79XdXST1tetK5OaNZDvlHreSCdro=&emci=e45aefab-c373-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0fc5ca18-df76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215)
---

| | The latest jobs report is out, and the numbers don't lie. In July, the U.S. economy added only 72,000 jobs, and they revised job growth totals for May and June down by over 250,000 jobs. These are dramatic slowdowns from prior months. **This is what Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans are delivering right now: fewer jobs, a stalled economy, and working families left to shoulder the burden.** And what did President Trump do after these numbers came out? He fired the head of the Bureau of Labor Statistics because he wanted to hide the facts. The truth is, Trump's economic policies are failing working people. Inflation is creeping back. Trump's reckless tariffs are making groceries, clothes, and essentials more expensive. Families are struggling to stretch their budgets further each month to stay afloat. Meanwhile, farmers and small businesses are caught in the crossfire of trade wars and political games. **This is the result of deliberate decisions by Trump to benefit the wealthy and well-connected and leave working Americans behind.** We need an economy that rewards everyone — not one that plays politics with people's livelihoods. That means investing in good-paying jobs, rebuilding our infrastructure, lowering costs, and creating economic opportunity in every zip code. The slowdown we're seeing right now is a wake-up call. We can't afford to keep going down this path. Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Colin Allred
subject: Every American should be alarmed at what's happening in Texas right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Texas Republicans are out of control.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250811_1_splitcolinallred?refcode=em20250811-1801&amount=5&refcode2=1801_582294_s-kqIF&akid=1801%2E582294%2Es-kqIF)
**Every American should be alarmed at the GOP's gerrymandering scheme in Texas.** I've been a voting rights lawyer for over 10 years, and this is the most brazen attack on our democracy and attempt to just openly steal congressional seats that I've ever seen.
And what did my potential opponent, AG Ken Paxton, say in response to this? He said he would "hunt down" and arrest these Democrats who are standing up for Texans.
Republicans MUST be held accountable – that's why I'm reaching out with a humble request: [**Will you please chip in a split donation between my campaign and Chris Pappas of $5 or more to support my Senate campaign, defeat Ken Paxton and give Texans the leadership we deserve?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250811_1_splitcolinallred?refcode=em20250811-1801&amount=5&refcode2=1801_582294_s-kqIF&akid=1801%2E582294%2Es-kqIF)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250811_1_splitcolinallred?amount=5&refcode=em20250811-1801&refcode2=1801_582294_s-kqIF&akid=1801%2E582294%2Es-kqIF)**
If you've been waiting for the best moment to join our grassroots movement to flip Texas blue, I'm here to tell you the time is NOW.
We need to fight fire with fire, starting with challenging these corrupt actions in the courts and **challenging them at the ballot box.**
[**If you agree, will you please chip in a split donation of $5 or more now to help me flip this battleground seat and stand up for our families?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250811_1_splitcolinallred?refcode=em20250811-1801&amount=5&refcode2=1801_582294_s-kqIF&akid=1801%2E582294%2Es-kqIF)

This is too important to stay on the sidelines. Thanks for taking action.
Colin

Peter,

_**“Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.”**_

Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values.

They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it.

**As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions.** And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day.

_[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f12c301e250a4e9babe7c9d131093b02&_e=qSOtGakviaPjVJOSSCzcRXHgsg-RoCho_2Wl8IFOnI638K-PdScF0g5SHZ4o-bnzDyHWH5NabmDv9Q3ZYzBk06nspPNHDM3wnv8gJaNrBQBmHqts78JnuDSFVotWfd1WWCZcdQ4auRz1f1iKbzYud596RAgi0b5KNzWGmm_cM5Wxcab6isidi7yl1FJnXZp7HsUDjcwtU0LozVDKRiSCQyNIJZS-m_KC49IvL7OrDHCpVzI-DiYGqJfzaxCtXOyDr9wroZ6wYEIEfDLkt-vbKDvNkqkybhaI87h8jH7oJrZDi7wcn_BlToFtQ9Kf1WKKCgSi98ByLkINKoUHax_HN3KDvZgSzWOtTTeHD8FERzQ-x7VBvI5CLIesaKuM67w6nqVzT7CZ21J7kv5-oh5smrAtQb_9rOkUVqjnrIdzbjweJ2pURmSRDefvDtrWxAYgA-mtGtnEt254ky7uNzFXRHOq21Bel_zjKHtSmzKFWSXbgbE2_KcKHDIckdexNeZlnvDTKwD5ojSb2NqoxE_izpiRlSC-tCUefabjJABd6JzLtGgEavb-eI3Vv4gxKikfCOX-WhI4-0CdaeuNTu1iq3D9hbkAF3ML_1MIYu8CuufXy_yxGkKKfzOvHQn2T3jdM1IHvMxviPT7_5QycY-82MZy3sJaRiLfm5SY3tfsxRET71hfwfxX24P11IPw72T_7A7qIGJPV69GKW-ORx_srsf0J_FnZtJxU_4l1d-2yE12GGxy_2IQmMf-XMBzNpCytrCnT68Ff1Fq7iTVc16pEw%3D%3D)_
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but to**fight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose.**

I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society.

While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating.

**You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. **

Twenty-four years later, I still feel that calling. It’s just a different kind of battlefield.

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential election since 1976. And I know I’m the underdog — just a regular guy from Minnesota who’s been asked to do extraordinary things one more time. **Frank Mrvan has never backed down from a fight for Northwest Indiana.** He’s secured millions in federal funding for our infrastructure, championed good-paying union jobs, delivered critical resources for veterans and public schools, and worked tirelessly to make health care more affordable.
**He shows up, listens, and puts our community first, always.**
That’s why we have to do whatever it takes to reelect Frank and keep an advocate for working families in Congress. But it won’t be easy, Peter. Republicans have raised a record-breaking _$60 million_ so far this year, and now they’re taking the fight for the House majority to redistricting.

clean_body: | = You need to see this, Peter: = Republicans know they can’t beat Frank at the ballot box, so now they’re trying to rig the map and draw him out of office altogether. They’ve sent JD Vance to Indiana to push extreme partisan redistricting behind closed doors in order to silence voters in Northwest Indiana and erase one of the last Democratic-held seats in the state. We’re up against deep-pocketed Republicans and super PACs, and now we’re facing a national GOP effort to redraw Frank out of Congress. = | = Frank Mrvan has never backed down from a fight for Northwest Indiana. He’s secured millions in federal funding for our infrastructure, championed good-paying union jobs, delivered critical resources for veterans and public schools, and worked tirelessly to make health care more affordable. He shows up, listens, and puts our community first, always. That’s why we have to do whatever it takes to reelect Frank and keep an advocate for working families in Congress. But it won’t be easy, Peter. Dear Friend of Religious Liberty, Because of your voice, Camp IdRaHaJe can continue to live out its Christian faith--free from government coercion. Praise God! When Colorado officials tried to force the camp to allow males in girls' private spaces, Camp IdRaHaJe didn't cave. It stood firm on its biblical convictions--and said, "We'd rather have Jesus." And you stood with the camp. Thousands signed the public statement of support. The outcry was heard. Colorado backed down. **Today, Camp IdRaHaJe remains a place where kids across the state can encounter the hope of the Gospel without compromise.** _**But the battle for truth and freedom isn 't over.**_ In Vermont, the girls' basketball team at Mid Vermont Christian School (MVCS) chose faith over fear--and paid a price. Faced with the prospect of competing against a team that included a male who identifies as female, the school declined to play. The school and its families honored their biblical beliefs about God's design for males and females. In response, **Vermont officials banned every MVCS middle and high school student from participating in all state-sponsored sports. Every student --benched.** This punishment has lasted two years. And it continues. We're helping MVCS challenge this injustice in court--because **no school, ministry, or student should be punished for following their faith.** Will you stand with this school and its students today? Add your name to the statement of support and tell Vermont: truth matters.

subject: I’m not here to play the game. I’m here to fight for working people.

body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250811-715&t=1001&akid=717%2E251025%2EiIDcG9 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250811-715&t=1002&akid=717%2E251025%2EiIDcG9 ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Recently, Brian Tyler Cohen asked me a question I’ve been getting a lot:
How do you distinguish yourself from the other Democrats in this race?

Here’s what I told him:

I’m not a career politician.

I haven’t spent my life climbing the power ladder of politics. I’ve spent
it trying to make government actually work for people — and I’ve got the
track record to prove it.

I rebuilt Detroit’s Health Department from scratch after bankruptcy. We
got tens of thousands of free glasses on kids’ faces. We tested every
school for lead after the Flint water crisis. We held corporate polluters
accountable. And as Wayne County’s Health Director, we spearheaded a
program to erase $700 million in medical debt for 300,000 Michiganders.

I’m not here to play the game. I’m here to fight for working people.

If you’re looking for a corporate-backed politician or a safe pick for the
donor class — I’m not your guy.

But if you want someone who’s spent his whole career fighting to make life
better for working people — and who refuses to take a dime from corporate
PACs — then [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250811-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250811-715&refcode2=717_251025_iIDcG9&akid=717%2E251025%2EiIDcG9 ]I hope you’ll support this campaign.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250811-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250811-715&refcode2=717_251025_iIDcG9&akid=717%2E251025%2EiIDcG9 ]Donate $10 ››

We need a new kind of politics, one rooted in service, not ambition. And
as Democrats, we have to stop taking money from corporate PACs and cutting
shady deals behind closed doors.

That’s what I’m offering, and I’m grateful to have you with me.

Thank you,

Abdul

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eab45ad0-96a6-4a9e-97f0-cf171786fef1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Anti-school choice advocates often argue that diverting public money to private schools undermines public education, exacerbating inequality and wasting taxpayer dollars. However, decades of research on voucher programs, education savings accounts (ESAs), and similar initiatives paint a different picture: these programs save money, boost student outcomes, and promote equity, particularly for low-income and minority families. Far from a drain, school choice fosters competition that benefits all students while aligning public funds with family needs.
**First, the fiscal "drain" narrative is overstated.** Voucher amounts are typically far below public school per-pupil spending--around $7,000 versus $15,000 nationally--meaning when a student switches, public schools retain savings from reduced enrollment. A comprehensive audit of U.S. voucher programs found they generated at least $1.7 billion in taxpayer savings since 1990, calculated by comparing voucher costs to avoided public expenditures. Recent analyses reinforce this: In EdChoice's 2025 review of 83 fiscal studies, most new programs yielded long-term savings after initial costs. Public education funding has risen 25% in the last decade despite school choice expansion, proving no zero-sum game.
**Second, choice improves academic outcomes through competition.** A 2016 analysis found overwhelmingly positive effects on achievement, stronger in reading than math, and larger internationally where public-private gaps are wider. Domestically, a 2024 review of 29 studies showed 26 with positive impacts on public school students' test scores. Another analysis confirmed small but significant gains in math and reading from choice-induced competition. Long-term, vouchers increase graduation rates by 10-15%. Early negatives, like in Louisiana, fade as programs mature and regulations ease.
**Third, choice advances equity for disadvantaged groups.** Urban Institute evidence shows vouchers raise test scores and attainment for low-income minorities, citing reviews with positive effects and programs like KIPP charters yielding large gains. In New York City, voucher use boosted college enrollment by 15-30 percentage points for moderately low-income Black and Hispanic students. Seven of eight integration studies find choice reduces segregation, countering residential zoning traps. Parental satisfaction soars, with 31 of 33 studies positive.
Opponents of school choice frequently argue that public funds should never support private entities. In a recent article published in Mississippi Today, Bobby Harrison likened school choice programs to the government subsidizing family trips to Disneyland, suggesting that tax dollars meant for the common good are being misdirected to personal preferences.
Yet, even casual observers can spot the fallacy in this analogy. Public money routinely funds private providers--such as Pell Grants for private colleges or Medicare reimbursements for private hospitals--making the "no public funds for private schools" stance inherently inconsistent. School choice empowers parents to make decisions tailored to their children's needs, fosters educational innovation, and embodies free-market principles that drive quality improvements.
In summary, the anti-choice argument prioritizes protecting public school monopolies over student needs. Evidence shows choice saves money, boosts outcomes, and expands opportunity--making it a worthwhile use of public funds. With over a million students in choice programs by 2024, policymakers should embrace it for a stronger educational system.

name: Ryan Tucker
subject: Students benched for Christian faith
body:
Because of your voice, Camp IdRaHaJe can continue to live out its Christian faith—free from government coercion. Praise God!

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/YJtzC_aHCPgX-gIGDifGE5mBRa-n_J14JEXBpijmbgCBWe16T40DL18n2o-h6bVDqiLNJeVnWI7ERv_zROGjGqR_WPxuHwG3McHlWEtm0QWT41OGnC-W1ZvJlcLabVI96pmNy72YoeLElUamoTSj_YKiur9GFwsgG8J39-HLzfnG0BN3T7s5Qf8b/8eYdINsWqs0J-ypyt9UdujTCvqciLgUR/11)_

**[Vermont Officials Punish Christian School for Siding with the Truth](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/1-ozvf8Cex_ad_3SABQL4RETeHEVfKRxYVFDkeyN7sCmnN9n1bk_Ure6I8aznpWFnysEhv7zHha1Fu0iPb26NSogFLrEMXQ2jkLDXPd4O_b2HDNxsLWYRiwXQ4-hWpEQOiuK0KvrJXKrrP7Gn8vhu5zRJyR8UZjgW8m8pGkC5XDBz3lBD2yrOdvOSK71tqzRdwW2BADGmaFpAb0ENjQ5EeNqBg8mE2U7nm2CX4VAztpClV7tAQYkd2kBhvTDMyw3BOJ0MC8Avy2aI_pvmgRNA6ss0IwiUTFeirBh9PSx4qevRcw7PAWYHoR-QYTU3oAVjj-od_AecOoWPp9F3QMwQGTSemCA33OfW8ttfFx6cwTJnBwF9wIpsnLT01yVHlIHkhzH5CTxtD9ZgmPPnPuPERPjAVwcFitHVVevLY7hBX6mVhVwLowrHTdlM9X9--WOPuqms1P27ewW-T8Ays_1GD-5JAEpTuPgfklbKIe729wNnJFxqy2JGYd-gdZGAx-QC7fv_wltNATOHgWhFcn7etezA_UZKgzNAizbKQizIq73m7K5-bxvuu62a1c7ODIuZuUVyAsWcrmgl-k1qokokZsrX0EmS21YWT1_ZncK0GyrRHwPNxZ7xG3S8p-E_0HD2d_dViR93T34OALfict10VjaVqDe2CZNmVWe02XnJBoX45Zsr2NKlGbldBHXFzJiNiRb4ATZrHOpOrUlLjLeCJwDrw1ab92P-LpZ2jk9p8j2QWi5D0HHm9qYoqHQfhAfBLLdgkQzfuzSxYfBRg/DhmhMTZWIkGerzYg0bThsLEqlFvTyf9V/11)**
Dear Friend of Religious Liberty, Because of your voice, Camp IdRaHaJe can continue to live out its Christian faith--free from government coercion. Praise God! When Colorado officials tried to force the camp to allow males in girls' private spaces, Camp IdRaHaJe didn't cave. It stood firm on its biblical convictions--and said, "We'd rather have Jesus." And you stood with the camp. Thousands signed the public statement of support. The outcry was heard. Colorado backed down. **Today, Camp IdRaHaJe remains a place where kids across the state can encounter the hope of the Gospel without compromise.** _**But the battle for truth and freedom isn 't over.**_ In Vermont, the girls' basketball team at Mid Vermont Christian School (MVCS) chose faith over fear--and paid a price. Faced with the prospect of competing against a team that included a male who identifies as female, the school declined to play. The school and its families honored their biblical beliefs about God's design for males and females. In response, **Vermont officials banned every MVCS middle and high school student from participating in all state-sponsored sports. Every student --benched.** This punishment has lasted two years. And it continues. We're helping MVCS challenge this injustice in court--because **no school, ministry, or student should be punished for following their faith.** Will you stand with this school and its students today? Add your name to the statement of support and tell Vermont: truth matters.
[ SIGN THE STATEMENT](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/7d7-edQTTUJXN0lV3X56xjw2EZKLi0DF9DjXLxVpJ3B4o4KbPthpudpVrw33H6OCts2ONK9FSQOb5zokB4nNfStKxdwucBu51fVT9S6p18fWBOOpNmLZB0UsmRjoF_cThqbJ3ZS6ptsfIOsdijWe8fJrCy_3FZCsKPZ_nLpWBR35UGcvCrhae54kbBI64KlKoVsKInvXoRVsrUN6np-FC-H1Z3VYYogIQOjKPW4c3iJ3nBbNaBO_WhSek3OtJydSxTUlStOq13ZjTe36XlpAxnWHAxM4W-XuwhAy3_9YhHVIqd7yu9J_KXr2z4Wwzuwyb12yRP5tnnqqMSQFS4qdv_Idq10v05DMZ5O7asQu6UpWd76oZA1b-gCtv_p0tMZB0-pnHp5aWzZAJUMNueLh71sTOTqYIANWDFuT8M1v9kUHY5YtRRwM7tCcM3wHTzr0hJXA11Zoqkg6i9xzZs9unXmSag33ss-w2Ts4n7NrVUGPtrfBWHfoRHPOW50HvOjkWctEF-z073WCWqdFAPgAS0rOWrIo3gChp_33RGlA64wnMIpVDDd3xXTNVCT201I1Jq22cnJPRIaFv91PmzDPOTz8FOG7goyBpBcgRGCrIH9hP_S8mlVeBsyT3hHRGtu0Lq4_dNRaTA75avGTxwD-w3Ak69c1nzAdzKQovCySGlRYCrDa-YrswoQeMdYftfROoqck3M3hbiXfgB_LdWDhXukZS2Dko5LObz4z78Vn3070CEq9ep42gYCocLFwCHNr8qm0gfOyCEawMET-eA/1YcNVZ2-hZ9Z0ttW-uT4z_AtqGq_UVrB/11)

For truth, **Ryan Tucker**
Senior Counsel, Director of the Center for Christian Ministries [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/DRKhHkvTuhy80DCj6_BD3Ku_Dfvlb9muqhaka2dky1SAlNxbsA_Znf-SWJKpsnG_i6JWmKcKvd04j2BjLhaiIr6Vh63osDDy-7188CzluS1a5sFyQw2KaTcj2Pz7qz4KM4lsdszkEl0epbBh6z5gpfZIT5eR38-FF547G5nlMb-95VyRxXx5p_iGa6zHSFWwoDM-yPmqIW8XORE5iV967CtUTMpMfm6FTIFGrLuBZ4RMp3cfoZeNrrPbKlN-_6YVRuV_72-EASD6AF5-9a24ITRdcgxHCxwGJdDZG4eby62Lth3MdRvboZ-deBjMrLbaw-vq2Ag5icS6JpP93gHVwj2qRFGYCsZoTBvznk1_-8PfErJM88ijtqE6QskmC-0fkp4VYkEF-dP9u2LnNADqriVeypPYVzP9fPcWkeDeSqI10-txh4nVSQNq-Rt2-rqFNbVRk66hBndTpaqb9CP3czQyeFBrnQIMife7uj6KHfvl8TCQ4n1vnlLOCCB6Z4cumqpklA354yR7B4WkH0xIaNbdGQyYUgdTcHPr8dOPKSb2xsmNaIzt8FVfiZiuHihBqvXQWoUh8shZ1DouOOolxZEgd8ysYKOujYWjXwrhOeXnv--PlkwdTcZoSTzi9wqmzK5rmBDk7OvgUsGoxDW63WhvOVwd3Rthf8dYHZjUdpbhUbHXfowoTrXiOstJThso1fXlJJdDgcXabKeuQIaL9GjPUhZUBmuY9djcT22GVd03IlMjuzs-occvMGTJjnN2ZuwUioX54RCuPkw77w/nqpF6CctqKBFx4qRl01IM7rfnVhn6qYP/11)

name: The Ohio Dems
subject: Are you horrified by what's going on with gerrymandering in Texas right now? Ohio is next.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113137503/562768506/879334541?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_TexasRedistricting_250811_t1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjMyMDU3Ny1lMjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8e8b5mXBUO_RwIy9Em-lrMxG74Pq14gXnyzGvBAXIs=) Team, what’s happening in Texas is a full-blown assault on democracy: **Donald Trump is pushing Texas Republicans to game the system and redraw the state’s congressional maps to take seats away from Democrats and expand the GOP’s razor-thin majority in the House.**

Ohio is up next. We’re legally required to redraw our congressional maps this year.

Republicans have gerrymandered Ohio to hell, and we fully expect them to attempt to rig the game again. In 2024, they won just 55% of the vote — yet somehow walked away with 66% of our congressional seats.

[**_If you’re tired of Republicans cheating and stealing their way to victory, rush a donation now to elect Ohio Democrats up and down the ballot >>>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113137504/562768507/879334541?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_TexasRedistricting_250811_t1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjMyMDU3Ny1lMjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8e8b5mXBUO_RwIy9Em-lrMxG74Pq14gXnyzGvBAXIs=)

**This isn’t representation. It’s not democracy. It’s a rigged game.**

The Ohio GOP don’t care about voters. They care about power. So they cheat. They suppress. They ignore court orders.

**They carve up districts to guarantee wins they haven’t earned.**

We’re not going to sit by quietly while they dismantle our democracy one map at a time.

clean_body: | = Team, what’s happening in Texas is a full-blown assault on democracy: Donald Trump is pushing Texas Republicans to game the system and redraw the state’s congressional maps to take seats away from Democrats and expand the GOP’s razor-thin majority in the House. Ohio is up next. We’re legally required to redraw our congressional maps this year. Republicans have gerrymandered Ohio to hell, and we fully expect them to attempt to rig the game again. In 2024, they won just 55% of the vote — yet somehow walked away with 66% of our congressional seats. = This isn’t representation. It’s not democracy. It’s a rigged game. The Ohio GOP don’t care about voters. They care about power. So they cheat. They suppress. They ignore court orders. They carve up districts to guarantee wins they haven’t earned. We’re not going to sit by quietly while they dismantle our democracy one map at a time. = _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Ohio Dems = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Judges shouldn’t have to fear for their lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter — As threats against federal judges and their families skyrocket, the rule of law is more tenuous than ever. **Approximately one-third of federal judges have received threats against them or their families since Donald Trump took office.** If judges fear for their lives or the safety of their families just for doing their jobs, then we are no longer living in a democracy governed by the rule of law. And our own president is exacerbating the issue. Donald Trump has targeted federal judges by name, attacked their integrity, and incited threats against them. He’s directly naming them and publicly mocking them from the most powerful office in the country — all because they are doing their jobs to provide checks on his authoritarian administration. And he knows exactly how his threats and attacks will be received by his followers — January 6 taught us that. By inciting these lawless attacks, Donald Trump is blatantly using the presidency to attack the rule of law and evade accountability. He is encouraging politically motivated attacks to intimidate the judiciary and silence anyone who stands in his way. **This isn’t just about Trump trying to escape justice. It’s about whether the rule of law still means anything in the United States.** That’s why I’m leading the bipartisan push to fully fund the _Daniel Anderl Judicial Security and Privacy Act_ , which would remove judges’ personal information from the internet and give them the tools to protect themselves and their families from doxxing and political violence. **No president is above the law, and no judges should fear for their safety just because they’re doing their jobs. [If you agree, I hope you’ll chip in today to support my work and help demand accountability.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113137527/562768561/1699199121?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250811_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDllMDI4YS1lMjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEELc_BCHZ-u1RwghqsaBghZfg4Hq1-p8J0sYI0UeiU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113137528/562768562/1699199121?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250811_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDllMDI4YS1lMjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEELc_BCHZ-u1RwghqsaBghZfg4Hq1-p8J0sYI0UeiU=)

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Tell Congress: Protect union rights for federal workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
SCOTUS says Trump can fire as many federal workers as he wants. Are labor rights next? | |
---
Peter, In March, Trump signed an executive order stripping almost a million federal workers of their right to collectively bargain. Since then, he’s fired hundreds of thousands of workers who care for our veterans, process our Social Security checks, keep our parks safe and clean, and inspect our food. **The Supreme Court has given Trump the green light to fire as many federal workers as he wants. And this month, a lower court blocked a judge’s order stopping him from stripping the remaining federal workers of their right to organize and join a union.** This is what an attack on democracy looks like. The Trump administration is trying to tear down our government by attacking the working people who keep America running. They need unions to protect them—we all do. **The Supreme Court won’t stop Trump from pursuing this dangerous authoritarian agenda. It’s up to Congress to do its job and protect federal workers.** Democratic leaders in the House of Representatives have launched a discharge petition to force a vote on the _Protect America’s Workforce Act_. The bill would restore the right to collectively bargain for federal workers across the country. **[Tell your representative: Sign the discharge petition to restore the right of federal workers to unionize.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxE5k8aOrGfi2SgwpU8nMbux38JFejIFFcFpKYvSxKCX3F9WmSW208Xz6-6EggNY5hIsakvjTSAohbgM6xOWoA5IqsKCnxKuvmk4nVK7TUNCntxlPF0MFnl_j9stxHQMEofjUb9w9jQnVVXcBEdV_-vtzCUTuEbysymVRo1WxVmrbSFE63msee1F7ByW9nSFDO5-doqjm8u7mJqZULfwwIEeVVYHSAe3B7ZgUQi95hNtqI1tN9kA_7zP8wo4PF3SGMV2_nX63DDnc11UamIX02CpvCz2MQf4-J7I2a08I7kxvQrTzS4p7FEt-MYWb9DmIo8g4FJpB8tTkqk6z_GNr2yRUja_Ju079yteJ9GynJIHnHUv078-1Qs0GolPQ5HaRgd0pChMt0Ye95vrVtWYOzQTIwvQm0rNb0VPmw_k_dAQfOSd1gVOEYDuHu9d_VBYW0S4echeAV4hpz3WZM7yCtmjGEY3r8uSuj-JXIEciAkDVtGwHgvRBr63aTdGAsRryztwyb_cply5_T8Y_86cMj6qcTmJeQZgOnjEPse4_r0oE/4iy/CSgLMyTXQ3i3t7q3cz4gbQ/h0/h001.FWo0PzjYmEe_CTpGsnQC_QeMfNi_rC_7v_y1B9PZehY) clean_body: SCOTUS says Trump can fire as many federal workers as he wants. Are labor rights next? | | Peter, In March, Trump signed an executive order stripping almost a million federal workers of their right to collectively bargain. Since then, he’s fired hundreds of thousands of workers who care for our veterans, process our Social Security checks, keep our parks safe and clean, and inspect our food. The Supreme Court has given Trump the green light to fire as many federal workers as he wants. And this month, a lower court blocked a judge’s order stopping him from stripping the remaining federal workers of their right to organize and join a union. This is what an attack on democracy looks like. The Trump administration is trying to tear down our government by attacking the working people who keep America running. They need unions to protect them—we all do. The Supreme Court won’t stop Trump from pursuing this dangerous authoritarian agenda. It’s up to Congress to do its job and protect federal workers. Democratic leaders in the House of Representatives have launched a discharge petition to force a vote on the Protect America’s Workforce Act. The bill would restore the right to collectively bargain for federal workers across the country. According to the AFL-CIO, Trump’s executive order was the single biggest act of union-busting in American history. The MAGA justices on the Supreme Court have emboldened Trump to act like a king. Thanks to them, he has more power than ever before to fire federal workers and strip their right to unionize with no expectation of consequences. In a democracy, our leaders make sure we can count on competent public servants to deliver on the promises of the Constitution. But Trump wants to cut the federal government off at the knees and install officials who will let him do whatever he wants. When federal workers don’t have a seat at the table to raise concerns about safety, staffing, and discrimination, it makes Trump’s slide to authoritarianism even easier. The Protect America’s Workforce Act has the bipartisan votes it needs to pass, but it’s being held up by political games. A discharge petition would allow the bill to bypass committees and go straight to the House floor. Thank you for fighting for federal union rights, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . Peter, We’ve got to be crystal clear about what’s happening right now: The White House is orchestrating a coordinated attack to steal power away from voters. Their latest move? White House Deputy Chief of Staff, Stephen Miller, went on Fox News claiming that Democrats “rigged” the 2020 Census by including undocumented immigrants — and that states like Massachusetts and California are an “ocean of fraud and abuse.” Has Stephen Miller even read the Constitution? The census has been responsible for counting every person — regardless of their immigration status — since its inception in 1790. His calling for a “correction” to the census is nothing but a blatant power grab and an attack on a centuries-old democratic process. [**They’re attacking the people on all fronts, so we have to fight back on all fronts. This work, in critical moments like this, takes outsized resources. Counting every resident is a cornerstone of the census process that has existed for centuries. It’s how we determine fair representation in Congress and the distribution of federal resources.
We’ve seen this story before, when Trump tried to add a citizenship question to the 2020 Census. But the power of this fair maps movement came together and was able to stop him in the courts.
But what we’re seeing now is a full-court press to suppress the will of voters. Already, Trump and his allies have their sights set on extreme gerrymanders in Texas and Ohio, and potentially other states like Indiana and Missouri.
Now it’s clear that the Trump team wants to sabotage an accurate census count, too — for the exact same reason. They want to fundamentally alter how we allocate representation in America — to amass unchecked power for themselves. This is a time to sound the alarm.
[**Make a donation today that will go directly towards fighting gerrymandering in states across the country and stop this sabotage of our democracy. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113138097/562770258/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MillerRR_email_20250811-NDRC-Tier1-MillerRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250811-NDRC-Tier1-MillerRR_&utm_campaign=MillerRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwYmU4NDg5LWUzNzYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YMcuGsg2J3nS8UwMUDDL06BD8U9ci0JEp9k-pBNbjdw=)

clean_body: This is just the latest attack in their full-court press to suppress the will of voters. | Peter, We’ve got to be crystal clear about what’s happening right now: The White House is orchestrating a coordinated attack to steal power away from voters. Their latest move? White House Deputy Chief of Staff, Stephen Miller, went on Fox News claiming that Democrats “rigged” the 2020 Census by including undocumented immigrants — and that states like Massachusetts and California are an “ocean of fraud and abuse.” Has Stephen Miller even read the Constitution? The census has been responsible for counting every person — regardless of their immigration status — since its inception in 1790. His calling for a “correction” to the census is nothing but a blatant power grab and an attack on a centuries-old democratic process. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Counting every resident is a cornerstone of the census process that has existed for centuries. It’s how we determine fair representation in Congress and the distribution of federal resources. We’ve seen this story before, when Trump tried to add a citizenship question to the 2020 Census. But the power of this fair maps movement came together and was able to stop him in the courts. But what we’re seeing now is a full-court press to suppress the will of voters. Already, Trump and his allies have their sights set on extreme gerrymanders in Texas and Ohio, and potentially other states like Indiana and Missouri. Now it’s clear that the Trump team wants to sabotage an accurate census count, too — for the exact same reason. They want to fundamentally alter how we allocate representation in America — to amass unchecked power for themselves. This is a time to sound the alarm. = Thank you for helping during this critical time. — Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. +------------------------------------------------------------------------+

I have some important news to share with you,
Derek:

Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official
named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250811_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=8887%2E5257348%2E32FfW8 ]FIRST ON FOX: Attorney General Bondi has authorized a special
prosecutor, Ed Martin, to investigate allegations of mortgage fraud
involving Sen. Adam Schiff and Letitia James

Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the
District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent
insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other —
and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it.

Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As
Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump
administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs,
urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers
of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than
follow his unethical edicts.

Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero
prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending
insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing
bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed
neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly.

Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous
nomination.

When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed
Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to
go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list.

And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the
president’s political retribution, but his own, as well.

is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out,
fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. Will you
have my back and chip in to help me fight back against Ed Martin and his

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250811_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1008&akid=8887%2E5257348%2E32FfW8 ]DONATE

Derek,
Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official
named Ed Martin to go after me.

Martin is the head of a “weaponization” office that is tasked with going
after the president’s political enemies. After having led the effort to
kill his nomination for U.S. Attorney, I am at the top of the list.

I won’t back down. Not now. Not ever. I will keep fighting for the rule of

body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3d9baca3463d4313aead721c52e92b3e&_e=gwiJsue-7JPS4TB_omer-TwbxdXoW-k3xL7cXcm2_QCsNlOxoHvBq5soxQ9KxbloeYATr7sWfZ2Of_FjzNLDfA2sFqq1x36Y5H2mRzvLpeUUGlD--knF8tUPMKMf6q6wINvopaxkolYz8GoDqSwOlTb7RQ-rHjJYPH3neTgpRbrMqqcN5f28WBc2e5LUVK5W4YDSTxWtmwekE9nf64oBbC_PkicsxQ3IKZ5It3wYErgZX34F8cHCzPNAaQ97vEO1oGz67VRoqXqYNt-D6vsu80SwoLBKF-TiIOw6-DTbCnWhjXHHxXXb92PHlSKR9vef4kDlHi4dcS7o-95A-f7QJistq8543Ec5gcvBt1T5REn5CaarXOZnWQ28v-5azgWWxLt0YtvLpth2aUWSf57I7FLEOzoM9EzseHljFmnxcgteoGuBhc3eq2lZT63EzpIlQUbCCxM7VjOEtYACWISFW8AFIMdOxej73lrkA6tqImbsaLC4TwQSKY8RDOi7vscvm8UZtisc7DU0fsrqcHys34d9pC3-ji2fLzWDYcj1PamdV60ZoXWp1D3zOhCROINSmlwYqg1kVHFlBayhb7PDQf_W0ZYotEV7zwTnXef5DlOBDSbDu7igWsmZ0q5tUFGqhFNXxd2H4Zz-iMnIsZ5qQg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3d9baca3463d4313aead721c52e92b3e&_e=gwiJsue-7JPS4TB_omer-TwbxdXoW-k3xL7cXcm2_QCsNlOxoHvBq5soxQ9KxbloeYATr7sWfZ2Of_FjzNLDfA2sFqq1x36Y5H2mRzvLpeUUGlD--knF8tUPMKMf6q6wINvopaxkolYz8GoDqSwOlTb7RQ-rHjJYPH3neTgpRbrMqqcN5f28WBc2e5LUVK5W4YDSTxWtmwekE9nf64oBbFRmgoo7sg68FmvKKCWb6DpxYZBnIWSbE9Y4EEiEllhtYEii2OqUtrqjM1zcGdSVh1CxcUvNy7ZYMcoFMgnbrEtH18E2cs1ZIMs5bO16qikJrJHZIqGJknHUobXHeeSnB8OFSLuRsDHZ86R_9ruq5acJ25iS5Pky81Wfg-Lr0rqdEul0HYtapU_lEZU-J8Sv1qiJ58WhdYLr8eP99loqzspHJJ8hzjR39g84pkcvMqB9_xBa1E7aUhXx0sw6JSdaJ3-N0B0-3_bdWrQyVhjKdSNm2dbPJ6wryaxOqK1S3HZ-cFjDrynrnsx_nWGBvZy4dmeMd7a9YhA4GQ6F3fkGucF1C_rWz1xkoQVodtzftqJGBNDENzS4npEQxvxn61KWwRqTxd0fq4lxWhX4OEZyJxa9ugZCxd7sszsT5lZKHrUuJFV8jZDhvEUg3lSNj84Zjw%3D%3D)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Peter, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.

My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: | Peter, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Peter, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Wisconsin Republicans made a choice. Our next steps are clear:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4913%2E35263%2EM-llno)
Peter, Last month, Wisconsin's Republican members of Congress made a choice: putting the interests of billionaires and big corporations over the well-being of hardworking families. Every single one voted to rip health care from 250,000 Wisconsinites and jeopardize the future of our rural hospitals. No matter how my Republican colleagues try to spin it, their budget will be devastating for people across the country. **Wisconsinites and Americans deserve better.** Healthcare, education, and opportunity should not be sacrificed at the altar of special interests — doing so is an outright betrayal of our duty. This is why the fight for Wisconsin and the Senate majority matters so deeply. The road ahead in ensuring a better future for every American is tough, but I've never backed down from a fight, and I know you won't either. **[We have to start working now to support Democrats up and down the ballot, and the single best way to support our work is by chipping in a monthly donation. body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113139320/562774617/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.08.11_EpsteinFiles_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTBhYTQ1ZC1lNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0WwvGVPwWUjEY1fb-jR2QFmVuJLETbUdLkuZNG-10CI=&emci=5b4d7d92-d476-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=da0aa45d-e676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) | Peter, **I just added my name as a cosponsor of H. Res. 581, the bipartisan bill to release all government records related to Jeffrey Epstein and his associates.** By now, you probably have heard of Jeffrey Epstein. Over decades, the billionaire financier committed unspeakable crimes that shattered the lives of hundreds of young women. He also ran in social circles with many wealthy, influential people, including the current President of the United States. MAGA Republicans have long used Epstein's crimes to drum up conspiracy theories about celebrities and prominent Democrats. But ultimately, this case isn’t about any one party or any one person. This is about powerful people preying on the most vulnerable members of society and using their wealth and connections to escape consequences. _**[If you have thoughts about the Epstein case or the new bill, I’d love to hear them. clean_body: If you have thoughts about the Epstein case or the new bill, I’d love to hear them. You can submit your feedback here → | Peter, I just added my name as a cosponsor of H. Res. 581, the bipartisan bill to release all government records related to Jeffrey Epstein and his associates. By now, you probably have heard of Jeffrey Epstein. Over decades, the billionaire financier committed unspeakable crimes that shattered the lives of hundreds of young women. He also ran in social circles with many wealthy, influential people, including the current President of the United States. MAGA Republicans have long used Epstein's crimes to drum up conspiracy theories about celebrities and prominent Democrats. But ultimately, this case isn’t about any one party or any one person. This is about powerful people preying on the most vulnerable members of society and using their wealth and connections to escape consequences. Thank you so much 💙 — Emily = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. name: Pot & Kettle
subject: Trump’s free speech hypocrisy is showing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Donald Trump and JD Vance are railing against Britain’s new internet safety law, calling it “censorship” and a “dark path.”
But here’s the kicker: this is the same Trump administration that just defunded public broadcasting here at home.
They’re not worried about free speech — they’re worried about losing control of the narrative. They’ve pushed book bans, gagged teachers, purged libraries, attacked journalists, and shut down platforms that challenge their propaganda.
When MAGA cries “censorship,” it’s not about defending the First Amendment. It’s about making sure their voices dominate while silencing the rest of us.
If we don’t fight back, they’ll decide which voices are heard, which facts are “permitted,” and which truths disappear entirely.
We can’t let them control the flow of information.
Chip in today to protect free speech and fight MAGA’s authoritarian playbook:
Donate now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/estheremail2025_kl?refcode=Izzy4%2F15%2F25NTL]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

If we don’t fight back, they’ll decide which voices are heard, which facts are “permitted,” and which truths disappear entirely. We can’t let them control the flow of information. **“Poll Shows Widespread Disapproval and Suspicion of Trump’s Handling of Epstein Files”**
\- _Rolling Stone_
* * *
Peter — Donald Trump has a massive problem on his hands, and it’s not just his low approval rating. **FIRST:** Trump and his allies spent YEARS screaming about the Jeffrey Epstein files, promising bombshell revelations and demanding transparency. His FBI Director and Deputy Director built entire podcasts hyping these files as the scandal that would expose "corrupt elites." **THEN:** After hundreds of FBI employees were diverted to frantically search 100,000+ pages, Attorney General Pam Bondi discovered Trump’s name was _all over the files._ Suddenly, it became a Democratic “con job.” Right... **NOW:** Trump's own supporters are turning on him. **Only 38% of Republicans approve of Trump’s handling of the Epstein files** — a devastating blow from his own base. **[We’ll keep this simple: Should Congress hold Trump accountable for his lack of transparency around the Epstein files?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113139742/562776087/1862391410?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA4MTlhNWMyLWU3NzYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9oTFyaSto36PUXFYALmo_gUz-2eB3xa3fJuO-QeCrYk=&emci=65055cd1-c576-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0819a5c2-e776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=16951753)** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113139743/562776088/1862391410?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA4MTlhNWMyLWU3NzYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9oTFyaSto36PUXFYALmo_gUz-2eB3xa3fJuO-QeCrYk=&emci=65055cd1-c576-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0819a5c2-e776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=16951753)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113139744/562776089/1862391410?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA4MTlhNWMyLWU3NzYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9oTFyaSto36PUXFYALmo_gUz-2eB3xa3fJuO-QeCrYk=&emci=65055cd1-c576-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0819a5c2-e776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=16951753)**

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** , along with the companion map today:

[ **https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=919eac47002c427aa9d5e67f020cacdf&_e=0DbNgWVMtyxDppCyaoTE02N3M4Q426hUuQL_VSukEIV4WPedz5qw7E53vsgBJ9FOpCfzE8OmAMH-oDbq9Kl1eI01kW2-W4wYIAoZqwF-MVeY2fO4jWeqDO7iooHIFAwzMQ9sr8eI1SNdR8F4zHJK-c3v-WYf4kikTjfMMqtYcmswgceDKE5GKUClqipZQf6N2-4H8XaBGJP0MDZ6ok-h-upczMcEZI0bCyb70SLoZQZz3O6J_KHjAPkiu8IA865eeSr0kcj6O-IJSZjBmdNoGAUG77m4FVS_VBHZyQ_iCa0CpEQLNulSCBtS4v7xAQg394hxlaPR6uXdJfayrNGZ_41wyDw56GeqHiGHU47ilOTlW1-HpUmAorliafULeyTuJGtQAf9EwLO7lkuT5gASYruZA8GW5iiCYYTpUj_YOoR1y1UPRHFHwx_lzj093HZRF9yIzVvuRV3aHYxKGZmSqnWfesUaunpEoY0NC2yGfa3FBxMrmJNUl-cvTo6di9icW3-r3heUTy1DO4mWSITlF6Vlb1-ui9s_RPRR8SBkPRo-LOdoC7Yoten_R72iTkPX0pMAV8QuPZVBKFi_0EMagyYv0bQM9yocZ40ftA-Rd7TZqhN--PKGCEH6shNhV5PPQFWU0a7WoJKAhI1DvE7DEtVhMgNecirJ6TaGWN2YMjwHMyIg9J7dZcsrE8igN-MN2SOy6Hl0C41u6Mjszm00gA%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you’ll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**Our efforts to take back power for working people cannot end after each Election Day.**
Here at Heartland Patriots, we’re transcending the traditional election cycle by standing ready to elect the next generation of leaders — in Congress, in their communities, at the state level, wherever they feel they can make an impact. And we need your help to do it.

Public service should be simple. Service the people that elected you, and advance their interests above all. So how is it that politicians get elected to congress and suddenly become experts in the stock market, pulling off trades so savvy that they beat the professional traders? _Because they have information that the public doesn't get—I know because I've been in the hearings. _ Politicians Nancy Pelosi made MILLIONS selling Google stock—weeks before the DOJ announced a new investigation into the company. It’s time to **STOP** congressional insider trading and **START** putting the American people first. I told you what I believe, but I want to hear from you. Should members of Congress be allowed to trade individual stocks? Take the short poll below and make your voice heard.

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Sign On: Get Trump’s troops out of DC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1756%2E791427%2ENf62x7)

Friend — Today, we are witnessing Trump drive yet another stake through the heart of American democracy.
By ordering the National Guard and other federal forces into Washington, DC to take control and oversee a completely fake “emergency,” the White House is sending a message that they believe the President can act like a dictator any time and any place he wants.
**[We have to send a message right back that we will not stand for this authoritarianism. Sign on to Ilhan Omar’s petition right now and call on Congress to take action to put a stop to Trump’s takeover of the capital.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-trump-troops-dc/?source=em250811-1-180&akid=1756%2E791427%2ENf62x7)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-trump-troops-dc/?source=em250811-1-180&akid=1756%2E791427%2ENf62x7)**
Friend — We are seeing Trump’s fascist playbook put to the test today:
**1) Create a fake emergency.** Trump says crime is out of control in DC. The statistics and facts prove that crime is, in fact, on the decline. Either way, local crime doesn’t come anywhere close to the kind of emergency that would justify the President taking control of our nation’s capital.
**2) Use the made-up crisis to invoke emergency powers and take power undemocratically.**
Nobody in DC elected Trump mayor, or police commissioner, or even dog-catcher. His only authority comes from the fact that he has done away with every semblance of Constitutional and democratic norms. **
Now, the power lies in the hands of Congress to stand up and reel in this lawless administration.
If Congress fails to act, Trump will see this as a success and roll out federal troops in “blue” cities and states across the country. He has already stated his intentions to do just that. He has already used this playbook in Los Angeles, too.
**[Please, help us use our collective voices today and sign onto Ilhan Omar’s petition. Help us call on Congress to take action and stop Trump before he becomes a full-fledged dictator, sending federal troops into every American city.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-trump-troops-dc/?source=em250811-1-180&akid=1756%2E791427%2ENf62x7)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-trump-troops-dc/?source=em250811-1-180&akid=1756%2E791427%2ENf62x7)**
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar HQ

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1756%2E791427%2ENf62x7)**. name: NRSC HQ
subject: You’re not going to believe what Elizabeth Warren just said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
You're not going to believe this, Peter.

body:
Please share with friends and family | | | [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689a488d76601f6e6508c55e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D689a4778defa015730de47f4%26ss_email_id%3D689a488d76601f6e6508c55e%26ss_campaign_name%3DWhen%2Bthe%2BAK%2BGOP%2Bshowed%2Bit%25E2%2580%2599s%2Btrue%2Bcolors%2Band%2Bwhy%2Byou%2Bshould%2Bcare%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-08-11T19%253A46%253A43Z&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689a4778defa015730de47f4&l=en-US&s=j2-tMJ3w1K4hUi0AAmztwAJYLdc%3D)
---
|
### **Alaska District 27: Anatomy of a Takedown**
---
### **The Decisive Factor: Party vs. Incumbent**
**David Eastman's landslide primary victory should have guaranteed his re-election. However, the Alaska GOP establishment intervened, prioritizing control over conservative principles and orchestrating an unprecedented takedown of their own incumbent.**
#### **Unprecedented Financial Intervention**
The Alaska GOP took the highly unusual step of giving $3,000 directly to Jubilee Underwood's campaign to be used against their own incumbent, David Eastman. This financial backing signaled a clear party-led effort to unseat him.
#### **Ideology Betrayed**
Eastman, holding a perfect 100% conservative rating, was cast aside. The party establishment labeled him "toxic" and a block to "party unity," effectively punishing the most ideologically-aligned conservative in the state legislature.
#### **Establishment Control Over Principles**
The party's actions reveal a prioritization of maintaining establishment control over supporting conservative principles. By backing a more compliant challenger, they ensured the removal of a dissenting voice, regardless of his conservative credentials.
#### **Ranked-Choice Voting as a Tool**
Ranked-Choice Voting (RCV) created the environment for this outcome. It allowed the establishment to back a single challenger without fear of splitting the vote, effectively weaponizing the system to sideline a principled dissenter and ensure a preferred outcome.
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### **America First Policy Institute Update**
---
**My first videos with AFPI are now sitting with their executives for approval. We are now taking my Anti-RCV Education to three additional States (Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia). All of the videos we created to STOP RCV last year in Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, South Dakota, Nevada, and Colorado in 2024, we have now made available free of charge to AFPI, they will now be spending their own money pushing my content across the country. Targeting places where RCV is still being pushed.****My work with AFPI will produce RCV education to millions of people, I have RCV simulators that show in real time the election changes and the redistribution of votes. I explain each step so everyone can understand it. I have made these simulators available in 15 languages that are most used in each State. I am also going to be showing my movie about RCV “Frozen Odds” in multiple states next year at multiple events in each state.****My goal is simple, the complete and utter elimination of RCV in American Elections (Considering 17 States have banned it in 3 years and 7 states rejected it at the ballot in 2024, I would like to think we are on the right track).****I would like to thank all of my 6,000 newsletter subscribers, my nearly 10,000 followers on X, and my 6,400 followers on Linkedin for sharing my messages and helping me generate over 12 million views just on my X account in the last two years. I have also sent out over 650,000 emails from 2023-2025.**
---
**My partnership with America First Policy Institute has already grown beyond the initial scope. My original idea was to help in Michigan, now my work is going to be used in Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia. Talk about Amazing, the multi-state collaboration and ability to bring my movie “Frozen Odds” to show all over the country all to stop the spread of RCV Ranked Choice Voting. Big thank you to all the supporters and followers, volunteers, and donors. I have taken upon myself to educate America about the dangers of RCV.****On top of this, one of my amazing newsletter subscribers donated a large sum of money to AFPI to support our efforts, I never asked for any money for this project, but AFPI is a 501(c)3 organization and our efforts will be under the education umbrella. If you would like to donate to them, here is their information. I am not affilated to them and I am not being paid in anyway by AFPI.**[**https://www.americafirstpolicy.com/**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689a488d76601f6e6508c55e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.americafirstpolicy.com&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689a4778defa015730de47f4&l=en-US&s=uCRlKUzZqzjTTjlS1MnBIFQt-oQ%3D)**They have done amazing work in many states, I originally started working with them in Arizona fighting against RCV in 2023 and 2024. They specifically asked me to work with them on creating content and help distribute content across multiple states. Pretty amazing experience.****I want to extend a huge thank you to all the movie supporters, golden ticket holders, angel ticket holders, my petition volunteers, my volunteer leads that are spread across the whole state, and all the amazing people who voted on my repeal of RCV in 2024. I am just getting started and your funding of my movies, your time helping collect signatures, and your continued support have led us to this point. The point where we eliminate RCV from every state before they have a chance to even do a petition to get it. So far 17 states have banned RCV in 3 years, it took them 20+ years to get 2 states to use it. We are winning, keep up the pressure.**
---
---
|
---
**My organization Izon Education**[**@907Honest**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689a488d76601f6e6508c55e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2F907Honest&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689a4778defa015730de47f4&l=en-US&s=plAd7ZjAjV_gWINORK13WC3KWPA%3D)**are working on big educational projects with America First Policy Institute even to go as far as to fly me to DC for an interview.**[**@A1Policy**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689a488d76601f6e6508c55e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FA1Policy&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689a4778defa015730de47f4&l=en-US&s=LRhxkVy6tn67mOrmRzn4NbtwF58%3D)**I am excited to collaborate and help educate Michigan about all the issues with Ranked Choice Voting. Including animated videos, RCV Election Simulators in 30+ languages, RCV guidebooks also in 30+ languages, both of my books ( free of charge and copyright free ) and so much more. Plan to show my movie “Frozen Odds” all over Michigan next year with the help of America First Policy Institute.**
---
---
|
---
**“Frozen Odds” and “The Permanent Short” are both on schedule, plan to release a short version of “Frozen Odds” next month and “The Permanent Short” will come out in October when the PFD is deposited.**
---
**“Frozen Odds” has expanded beyond Alaska, it will now be a series about America’s fight against RCV, with filming taking place in each state with the people who faced RCV. Currently Michigan is facing an RCV ballot measure aimed at 2026, I have partnered with multiple national organizations to make sure “Frozen Odds” will be shown to thousands of people in 2025 and 2026. Alaska’s message is powerful and I am thankful for all the people who have contributed to take this film to this stage.**
---
---
|
---
## **907Honest** **=** **Tropic Tundra**
---
#### [**“Scott Kendall-backed group settles, pays $50K in legal fees to 2024 ranked-choice repeal sponsors” ~ Must Read Alaska**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689a488d76601f6e6508c55e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fmustreadalaska.com%2Fscott-kendall-backed-group-settles-pays-50k-in-legal-fees-to-2024-ranked-choice-repeal-sponsors%2F&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689a4778defa015730de47f4&l=en-US&s=oc85lgGT8SGxCAkIX76ZOiihotc%3D)

### **Breaking: Court deals final blow to Kendall lawsuit over ranked-choice voting repeal petition**
---
---
| [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689a488d76601f6e6508c55e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fmustreadalaska.com%2Fbreaking-court-deals-final-blow-to-kendall-lawsuit-over-ranked-choice-voting-repeal-petition%2F&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689a4778defa015730de47f4&l=en-US&s=22cPnz_uADVx93ZZx9LxeuxI_Vs%3D)
---
**A short explanation of the court win above, this case was decided last September 2024, but the Supreme Court ruling in our favor at the time, said the final order would come at a later time. That happened at the end of June. More to Come this week.**
---
### The Fight for Fair Elections: A Personal Mission
When I began the effort to repeal Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska, I knew it would be a challenge. But I was determined not to let our electoral process be twisted into a confusing system that leaves voters disempowered.My commitment went beyond Alaska. I wrote **three books** and created a **30-part animated video series** to expose the truth about RCV, distributing thousands of copies and making the videos free nationwide. I've also spent countless hours collaborating with grassroots leaders across the country, helping establish organizations now fighting RCV. My websites, **RCValert.org** and **RemoveRCV.com** , offer years of research, resources, and tools like RCV Election Simulators.This fight is personal. My own grandfather, a wise and hardworking man, couldn't understand the ranked choice ballot. If someone with his common sense was confused, I knew there was a fundamental flaw. That moment spurred me to draft Alaska's repeal initiative.We didn't have billionaire funding or political party backing. What we had was unwavering determination and the support of over **700 dedicated Alaskan volunteers**. We knocked on doors, braved the cold, and gathered over **42,000 signatures** —far exceeding the requirement—all without help from political insiders.I've also traveled nationwide, warning states like Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, and Florida about RCV's manipulative nature, funded by out-of-state billionaires.As expected, the political establishment fought us. The attorney who brought RCV to Alaska even sued to prevent our repeal initiative from appearing on the ballot. But we prevailed in both the Alaska Superior Court and the Alaska Supreme Court. They outspent us by a staggering **one hundred to one** , with millions flowing in from out-of-state organizations like Unite America and the Sixteen Thirty Fund, supported by figures like George Soros and Hansjorg Wyss.On Election Day, I was immensely proud. Not only had I fought RCV in Alaska for years, but seven other states where I'd been active decisively rejected it. Those rejections alone cost the pro-RCV lobby nearly **$150 million** between 2020 and 2024. Here in Alaska, despite our small population, it took nearly three weeks to get election results—a clear example of RCV's confusion and delay.Our repeal effort in Alaska came agonizingly close, falling short by just 743 votes after nearly three weeks of counting. But my resolve is unbroken. This fight is a warning to the entire country. We must maintain simple, clear, and honest elections, demanding voter ID and keeping out-of-state special interests out.I am incredibly proud of what we achieved in Alaska. We showed the nation what ordinary, hardworking people can accomplish when they stand firm. The fight isn't over—not in Alaska, and not anywhere freedom-loving Americans call home.**Stand with us! Let's protect our elections for Alaska and for America.**
---
### **More News**

---
|
---
**Exciting News, My team and I have been hired to manage and deliver the Eaglexit project for Eagle River and Chugiak. The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.****The phase approach is:****1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building****2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education****3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / Education****Our team at**[**http://PetitionEngine.com**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689a488d76601f6e6508c55e&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2Fq3ow7fFBOA&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689a4778defa015730de47f4&l=en-US&s=Zm2eLtCAb0MZXYqrGvepLyfTBGI%3D)**, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history.**[**https://eaglexit.com**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689a488d76601f6e6508c55e&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FCwYOkRQoPB&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689a4778defa015730de47f4&l=en-US&s=PMPYIK17edexyICe3t2t_Eu-h-Y%3D)

body:
They think they can take me down once and for all by misleading voters, spreading lies, and playing dirty

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113141232/562781091/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWY3NTgxNS1lZDc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nmd7WsmpGTjG9_NSHmygQAigLq1qXUPkCQCeRM1QdiQ=) I know what National Republicans are saying about me behind closed doors. They believe they finally have my number this year. They think they can take me down once and for all by misleading voters, spreading lies, and playing dirty. I think even some Democrats believe someone like me can’t keep winning in Kansas. **But I’ve had people doubt me before. And every single time, I’ve proven them wrong.** My classmates never believed I could juggle two jobs while earning high marks in college. But I did it anyway, and became the first person in my family to graduate college. When I ran for Congress in a district that hadn’t voted for a Democrat in nearly a decade, people said I’d get crushed. But I won, and became the ONLY federally elected Democrat in Kansas. And when everyone said my victory was a fluke, I held this seat in three consecutive, highly competitive re-election campaigns. clean_body: They think they can take me down once and for all by misleading voters, spreading lies, and playing dirty = I know what National Republicans are saying about me behind closed doors. They believe they finally have my number this year. They think they can take me down once and for all by misleading voters, spreading lies, and playing dirty. I think even some Democrats believe someone like me can’t keep winning in Kansas. But I’ve had people doubt me before. And every single time, I’ve proven them wrong. My classmates never believed I could juggle two jobs while earning high marks in college. But I did it anyway, and became the first person in my family to graduate college. When I ran for Congress in a district that hadn’t voted for a Democrat in nearly a decade, people said I’d get crushed. But I won, and became the ONLY federally elected Democrat in Kansas. And when everyone said my victory was a fluke, I held this seat in three consecutive, highly competitive re-election campaigns. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With gratitude, Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: Democracy is a team sport

#

Republicans are dismantling the pillars of American democracy, Peter — piece by piece. They’re attacking voting rights to make it harder for people like you to make your voice heard and easier to lock themselves into power. They’re defunding public education and robbing our children of their future just so they can line the pockets of their billionaire friends. They’re dismissing court orders to pave the way for Donald Trump to defy judges and continue attacking the rule of law. And they’re threatening civil rights to roll back decades of progress and restrict our freedoms. **This is an autocracy in the making, and we can’t stay silent. ** Mazie is fighting back every day in the Senate to hold Republicans accountable, protect working families from Trump’s billionaire-first agenda, and defend American democracy. **[But democracy is a team sport, Peter. That’s why Mazie is counting on folks like you to join her in this fight. _**“SHE WILL NOT LET YOU DOWN”**_
Friend, in the critical upcoming special election for Florida’s U.S. Senate seat, I am honored to tell you that **I just received President Trump’s total and complete endorsement!**
**My name is Ashley Moody, and I’ve been serving in the U.S. Senate on a temporary basis since Marco Rubio became our top diplomat – _but now it’s time to win this seat outright. _**
I’m a fifth-generation Floridian, former judge and Attorney General, wife of a law enforcement officer, and mother to two wonderful boys.
W _e can win this seat, but to be honest, history is stacked against us._
**Typically, the president’s party averages a FOUR-SEAT LOSS in Senate midterm elections. If that happens, say hello to Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and goodbye to any forward movement on President Trump’s agenda.**
_I don’t need to tell you what a disaster that would be for this country._
**[President Trump put his faith in me to win this critical special election, and now I’d like to ask for yours. clean_body: Big news from President Trump! | | | | | | “SHE WILL NOT LET YOU DOWN” Friend, in the critical upcoming special election for Florida’s U.S. Senate seat, I am honored to tell you that I just received President Trump’s total and complete endorsement! My name is Ashley Moody, and I’ve been serving in the U.S. Senate on a temporary basis since Marco Rubio became our top diplomat – but now it’s time to win this seat outright. I’m a fifth-generation Floridian, former judge and Attorney General, wife of a law enforcement officer, and mother to two wonderful boys. W e can win this seat, but to be honest, history is stacked against us. Typically, the president’s party averages a FOUR-SEAT LOSS in Senate midterm elections. If that happens, say hello to Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and goodbye to any forward movement on President Trump’s agenda. I don’t need to tell you what a disaster that would be for this country. | | Thanks for your time and commitment. Sincerely,Ashley Moody | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for Moody for Florida | Moody for Florida 301 W Platt St, #A663, Tampa, FL 33606
