subject: Profiting off of imprisonment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113142053/562784162/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250811_PT_Prisons_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzMzNmQyZi1lZTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mW5XWoAvP1VZiL0R_OftL0GwFqhoT4WbgQZB14ZNLoI=&emci=c898c513-7166-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8c336d2f-ee76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098) | Hi there – the idea is simple: _**no corporation should make millions by keeping people behind bars.**_

Yet, private prisons like Delaney Hall rake in hundreds of millions of dollars every year, by cutting corners, fostering abusive conditions, and overcrowding and understaffing their facilities. One private prison company, GEO Group, even made enough that in 2024, they poured over $500,000 into Trump’s SuperPAC. And then Trump rewarded them with an executive order that reversed the Biden Administration’s ban on federal contracts with private prisons.

That’s why Bonnie Watson Coleman introduced the **End For-Profit Prisons Act** , which would phase out federal contracts with private prisons and ensure that core correctional services are performed by federal employees accountable to the public, not shareholders.

[**Will you add your name to our petition today to stand against private prison companies donating to campaigns and profiting from imprisonment?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113142054/562784165/2046307656?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250811_PT_Prisons_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzMzNmQyZi1lZTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mW5XWoAvP1VZiL0R_OftL0GwFqhoT4WbgQZB14ZNLoI=&emci=c898c513-7166-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8c336d2f-ee76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098) | | [**SIGN ON**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113142056/562784194/2046307656?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250811_PT_Prisons_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzMzNmQyZi1lZTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mW5XWoAvP1VZiL0R_OftL0GwFqhoT4WbgQZB14ZNLoI=&emci=c898c513-7166-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8c336d2f-ee76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098)
---
Here in New Jersey, conditions at the privately run Delaney Hall detention center have drawn national headlines and daily protests against Trump’s immigration crackdowns.

One young man detained there described how he was given nothing but bread and water for his entire first week. Others have spoken out about cramped, unsanitary quarters, and unusable toilets —**all while the private company running the facility pockets millions.**

[**Add your name to say NO to corporations profiting by keeping people behind bars:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113142058/562784196/2046307656?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250811_PT_Prisons_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzMzNmQyZi1lZTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mW5XWoAvP1VZiL0R_OftL0GwFqhoT4WbgQZB14ZNLoI=&emci=c898c513-7166-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8c336d2f-ee76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Every American deserves to know this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team, this is Adam Schiff. The Voter Protection Project said I could reach out.

I’m not going to sugarcoat it: We’re up against a movement that’s determined to tear down our democracy and a man in the White House who’ll do anything to expand his power.

[We’ve got to keep calling out the danger — that’s why I’m reaching out today to ask you to chip in to my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help me keep fighting back against Trump’s attacks on the rule of law.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92947?t=6&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92948?t=7&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN)
---
Recently, on the Senate floor, I laid out **ten ways Donald Trump is wrecking this country.** Every American should know that Trump is failing us by:

**10\. Undermining American innovation:** Trump is attacking our world-class research institutions and shutting out international talent, limiting our leadership in science, technology, and medicine.

**9\. Slashing food assistance:** He’s gutting the supplemental nutrition programs that keep millions of American families healthy and ensure our kids don’t go to bed hungry.

**8\. Abandoning our allies:** Trump is weakening our international partnerships, cozying up with dictators, and making America less safe.

**7\. Sabotaging renewable energy:** He’s killing clean energy projects, ceding global renewable energy leadership to China, raising utility bills, and making us more dependent on fossil fuels.

**6\. Damaging public health:** He’s slashing funding for the National Institutes of Health (NIH) and key research programs, meaning cures will be delayed, clinical trials will end, and life-saving care will be harder to access.

**5\. Crippling essential services with DOGE cuts:** From Social Security to wildfire response to public education, Trump is making major funding cuts without worrying about the impact on families, seniors, and kids across the country who will be hurt.

**4\. Tanking the economy with tariffs:** His trade wars are driving up the costs of everyday goods like clothes and groceries while alienating our allies.

**3\. Stripping away healthcare:** Under Trump’s new budget, millions of Americans will lose healthcare coverage. Many rural clinics and hospitals will be forced to close, and all of our healthcare costs will go up.

**2\. Undermining the rule of law:** Trump has been treating the Department of Justice (DOJ) as his own personal political weapon, using it to shield his allies and target his enemies.

**1\. Threatening the very idea of America:** He’s eroding the values that built this country: self-governance, equality, and the belief that no one is above the law — not even the president.

I know this is a lot. And overcoming it will be hard, especially in the near term when they control everything. But we will take back the government and put an end to this madness.

The GOP is trying to flood the zone so that we’re too overwhelmed to act. But I also know that we’re not powerless, and that we can come together, organize, mobilize, and take our country back from Trump.

[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll make a contribution to me and the Voter Protection Project today.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92947?t=8&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92949?t=9&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92950?t=10&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92951?t=11&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92952?t=12&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92953?t=13&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN)
Thanks for stepping up.

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20895%2E878179%2EmiKPBN)

🚨🚨🚨BREAKING NEWS🚨🚨🚨
Donald Trump just announced he is deploying the National Guard and taking control of the capital city’s police force.
This is not a drill.
Donald Trump has just ordered federal troops into the streets of our capital city — and seized control of its police force — all over a LIE about crime.
He has crossed the line from dangerous rhetoric to outright authoritarian rule.
This is exactly how democracies die:
* A leader invents a crisis
* Deploys armed forces against his own people
* Seizes control of local law enforcement
If we don’t fight back now, there may be no going back.
We have a limited amount of time show Trump and his enablers that the American people will not stand by while he uses the military to intimidate and control a sovereign city. Every second we wait, this power grab becomes the “new normal.” Rush $10 now so we can help Democrats launch emergency ads, mobilize rapid response teams, and protect our democracy from Trump’s escalating authoritarianism. clean_body: Democrats spent a record-shattering $90 MILLION in Montana's last election | Fellow American, Democrats spent a record-shattering $90 MILLION in Montana's last election , an unbelievable sum of money in Montana. And they’re laying the groundwork to spend EVEN MORE in 2026. Here’s the worst news, we’re not even a fraction of the way there! The only way we can secure Montana’s Republican seat and our Republican Majority is through the support of patriotic donors like you Fellow American. Democrats have an army of megadonors across the Country and I’m at the top of their target list. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. name: Team Seth
subject: Trump’s tariffs are really targeting hardworking Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress

Peter, Trump’s reckless tariffs are hurting us all in Rhode Island:
* 🧺 Costs of food, clothing, and everyday essentials? UP _— **Walmart prices went up 51%**_ between May and July of this year.

* 🌎 International tourists to RI? DOWN — **_a predicted 21% decrease in Canadian tourists._** This hurts our hospitality industry and puts jobs at risk!

* 🏪 Local Businesses? STRUGGLING under tariff burdens. 93% of Rhode Island manufacturers have reported that tariffs are hurting their bottom line, and **_78% are raising prices_** to adjust for these additional, unnecessary costs.

This is devastating to our state’s economy. This hurts hardworking Rhode Island families struggling to achieve financial security. **Trump’s chaotic tariffs are raising costs and benefiting no one!

Seth is committed to lowering costs for Rhode Islanders and fighting back against unnecessary tariffs. That’s why we need to keep him in Congress. _[Will you donate $10 so Seth can keep fighting for each and every one of us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113142464/562785683/1542275803?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250811_FR_Tariffs_0_6MO_TeamSeth_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWY3MDNiYi1lZjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-iVavxO1iCUHcw0v5Cu7uVHYyKd3qwqnpffW_lozBUY=)_** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113142468/562785687/1542275803?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250811_FR_Tariffs_0_6MO_TeamSeth_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWY3MDNiYi1lZjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-iVavxO1iCUHcw0v5Cu7uVHYyKd3qwqnpffW_lozBUY=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Astounding corruption from the Trump administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, team. **Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113142519/562785884/-1123211171?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.11_Adam-Schiff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjg5YjllMC1lZjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IvczCv7IBWcWxcB6pML6UYPdDeBb21hccllfdi55Dgg=) Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it. Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts. Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly. _Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination._ When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list. **And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well. ** [**_This is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out, fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. Will you have my back and split a contribution between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to help me fight back against Ed Martin and his sham investigation?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113142520/562785885/-1123211171?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.11_Adam-Schiff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjg5YjllMC1lZjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IvczCv7IBWcWxcB6pML6UYPdDeBb21hccllfdi55Dgg=) | | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113142521/562785886/-1123211171?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.11_Adam-Schiff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjg5YjllMC1lZjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IvczCv7IBWcWxcB6pML6UYPdDeBb21hccllfdi55Dgg=)
---
Thank you,
Adam Schiff
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113142522/562785887/1865269831?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.11_Adam-Schiff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjg5YjllMC1lZjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IvczCv7IBWcWxcB6pML6UYPdDeBb21hccllfdi55Dgg=)

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Back to school
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Team,

This month, hundreds of thousands of Ohio children will go back to school while the Trump administration tries to dismantle the Department of Education.

Across the state and the nation, families will do their back-to-school shopping, trying to make ends meet amidst a cost-of-living crisis, while Trump gives tens of billions of dollars in tax breaks to the ultra-rich.

Enough. We need a government that actually looks out for the working people who keep our country running — NOT one that only works for the wealthy and well-connected.

That's what Marcy has fought for her entire career in Congress, it's what she's still fighting for today, and it's what she'll always fight for as long as she has a voice and a platform.

Can we count on you to stand with her in that fight, friend? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250811_team_backtoschool_l1]

CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250811_team_backtoschool_b1]Thank you, friend.

— Team Kaptur
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

name: Karen Tallian
subject: Fight gerrymandering now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/IDP%20logo.jpg]
Peter,

W hile opponents rallied at the Statehouse last week to protest President Trump’s call for even more gerrymandered districts, Republicans held a fundraising lunch in Indianapolis that raised nearly a million dollars for the Republican National Committee.

[https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXel7a1TuuA2eMjPM9jctWenP7PnMNWTbxzYEy69mk4G0Ndjtmom9OUa8afuEeZp8qyrOZN9txQqqcibYYstsMnEOgHmzCXf2NQw3nLE4CK30KdededhfBYsnp9DNGIFNs-ZP1aZ3Q?key=dxiFD3OwSzmLZbXBJAY4Sg]

Grassroots fundraising has long been the Democratic Party’s answer to the wealthy elites funding the Republican Party, but the current environment calls for even greater participation.

As Chair of the Indiana Democratic party, I am sounding the alarm. We need every supporter to step up now.

IDP appeals to small donors and urges contributions of any amount to help fund voter outreach, digital campaigns and community engagement initiatives.

As the gerrymandering battle is right now brewing in the state house, financial help is crucial. One party rule threatens democracy. The continued existence of a two-party system plays a critical role in maintaining democratic principles and preventing the rise of authoritarian government.

While Vice President Vance visited the statehouse that morning to discuss calling a special session, the entrance and windows of the Governor’s office were literally draped in black curtains to ensure secrecy.

[https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeBFpSCKGFJuEwiisT2dkgt-TFlBiAhaUI8_l_hj6svaPsbVn9R5hYDcaec1UQG_JtaGcGoUYFfp6foVf17kZ9UKaEQyCVp4Yu-WNvCpqzVUG1gdMmfdp6DSm5Kuc7bJ3CjiRFung?key=dxiFD3OwSzmLZbXBJAY4Sg]

We are at a pivotal moment in our nation’s history. Every voice matters. So does every dollar. Your donations help fund community events, informative advertisements, and the critical infrastructure needed to ensure a fair and transparent election.

The stakes have never been higher, and the actions taking place today will shape our country for decades. The Indiana Democratic Party, and its small but hard-working staff, acts as the hub and support center for county party activities and individual campaigns all over the state.

Your financial support is crucial. Will you sign up for a monthly donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/indems?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=50&recurring=1]

• $25/month helps us print flyers and reach new voters in key districts. • $50/month allows us to organize town halls and community outreach events. • $100/month supports digital campaigns to connect with younger generations and first-time voters.Together, we can build a country that reflects our shared hopes and aspirations.

Donate now—let’s shape tomorrow, together. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/indems?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=50&recurring=1]

With gratitude, Indiana Democratic Party Karen Tallian, Chair

clean_body: [] Peter, W hile opponents rallied at the Statehouse last week to protest President Trump’s call for even more gerrymandered districts, Republicans held a fundraising lunch in Indianapolis that raised nearly a million dollars for the Republican National Committee. [] Grassroots fundraising has long been the Democratic Party’s answer to the wealthy elites funding the Republican Party, but the current environment calls for even greater participation. As Chair of the Indiana Democratic party, I am sounding the alarm. We need every supporter to step up now. IDP appeals to small donors and urges contributions of any amount to help fund voter outreach, digital campaigns and community engagement initiatives. As the gerrymandering battle is right now brewing in the state house, financial help is crucial. One party rule threatens democracy. The continued existence of a two-party system plays a critical role in maintaining democratic principles and preventing the rise of authoritarian government. While Vice President Vance visited the statehouse that morning to discuss calling a special session, the entrance and windows of the Governor’s office were literally draped in black curtains to ensure secrecy. [] We are at a pivotal moment in our nation’s history. Every voice matters. So does every dollar. Your donations help fund community events, informative advertisements, and the critical infrastructure needed to ensure a fair and transparent election. The stakes have never been higher, and the actions taking place today will shape our country for decades. The Indiana Democratic Party, and its small but hard-working staff, acts as the hub and support center for county party activities and individual campaigns all over the state. Your financial support is crucial. Will you sign up for a monthly donation today? [] • $25/month helps us print flyers and reach new voters in key districts. • $50/month allows us to organize town halls and community outreach events. • $100/month supports digital campaigns to connect with younger generations and first-time voters.Together, we can build a country that reflects our shared hopes and aspirations. Donate now—let’s shape tomorrow, together. [] With gratitude, Indiana Democratic Party Karen Tallian, Chair [content goes here] unsubscribe: 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Hey folks,
I just went live with Senator Adam Schiff for a bonus edition of _Endless Urgency_ , and this one's a must-watch. We broke down Trump's latest strongman stunt in D.C., the way he's using distraction to dodge accountability on the economy and Epstein, and the dangerous precedent Texas Republicans are setting with mid-decade gerrymandering.
Here's some of what we covered:
* **Sen. Schiff 's take on Trump's "Baghdad D.C." narrative** -- why the crime scare is a calculated lie, and how it's really about consolidating power while his economic record crumbles.
* **The strongman playbook in action** -- seizing control of police forces, testing the limits of law, and why this is more about optics than reality.
* **The Epstein distraction** -- Schiff connects the dots between Trump's latest moves and his allies' attempts to bury damaging stories.
* **Weaponizing the Justice Department** -- Schiff explains why he's at the top of Trump's enemies list and how the DOJ is being used for political payback.
* **Gerrymandering 's breaking point** -- why Texas's mid-decade redistricting is a direct threat to democracy, and how blue states like California must respond in kind.

If you care about protecting democracy and holding the powerful accountable, this is essential viewing. Don't let these stories get buried under the noise--watch the full conversation and make sure you're armed with the truth.
**[Become a paid subscriber today to help us keep exposing the stakes of Trump's attacks on our democracy and amplifying voices like Senator Schiff's willing to stand up to authoritarianism. Together, we can fight back--urgently, relentlessly, and effectively:](https://substack.com/redirect/4697332a-1ced-4b56-8822-7e2ec638e9f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/4697332a-1ced-4b56-8822-7e2ec638e9f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
With urgency,

--Mike

name: Justice Democrats
subject: They’re silencing journalists to advance genocide
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Yesterday, the Israeli military intentionally targeted and killed at least
five Palestinian journalists in an air strike on a media tent outside of
Al Shifa Hospital in Gaza, including acclaimed Al Jazeera correspondent
Anas al-Sharif.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250811-israel-journalists/?source=em20250811-36919&akid=36919%2E1203867%2EmflSkI ]Al Jazeera English: Israel has assassinated Al Jazeera correspondent
Ana al-Sharif and four other staff in a targeted attack on a tent in Gaza
City, taking the total number of journalists killed since October 7, 2023
to 269.

This is yet another war crime and a deliberate attempt to silence the
truth, as Israel continues to murder Palestinian journalists while banning
international reporters from entering Gaza.

According to the Committee to Protect Journalists, Israel has now killed
at least 186 journalists in total since October 2023, accounting for 70
percent of the world’s journalist fatalities last year. Other sources like
the United Nations say that figure is even higher, surpassing 242
casualties.

Experts at Brown University’s Watson School of International Affairs are
calling it the worst conflict for reporters in modern times, with more
media worker casualties than World Wars I and II, the Vietnam War, the
Civil War, and the War in Afghanistan COMBINED.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250811-israel-journalists/?source=em20250811-36919&akid=36919%2E1203867%2EmflSkI ]Brown University Watson School Figure 1: Number of Journalists and
Media Workers Killed, By War.

This latest attack on the free press comes as Netanyahu moves to rapidly
expand Israel’s military occupation to a full takeover of Gaza. We cannot
look away, Peter. And Congress
cannot continue to enable this.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250811-israel-journalists/?source=em20250811-36919&akid=36919%2E1203867%2EmflSkI ]There are no excuses: every Democratic member of Congress should
condemn this mass murder of journalists and stop ALL weapons transfers to
Israel ASAP! Add your name now if you agree →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250811-israel-journalists/?source=em20250811-36919&akid=36919%2E1203867%2EmflSkI ]Add Your Name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250811-36919-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36919_1203867_mflSkI&akid=36919%2E1203867%2EmflSkI

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Yesterday, the Israeli military intentionally targeted and killed at least five Palestinian journalists in an air strike on a media tent outside of Al Shifa Hospital in Gaza, including acclaimed Al Jazeera correspondent Anas al-Sharif. [ ]Al Jazeera English: Israel has assassinated Al Jazeera correspondent Ana al-Sharif and four other staff in a targeted attack on a tent in Gaza City, taking the total number of journalists killed since October 7, 2023 to 269. This is yet another war crime and a deliberate attempt to silence the truth, as Israel continues to murder Palestinian journalists while banning international reporters from entering Gaza. According to the Committee to Protect Journalists, Israel has now killed at least 186 journalists in total since October 2023, accounting for 70 percent of the world’s journalist fatalities last year. Other sources like the United Nations say that figure is even higher, surpassing 242 casualties. Experts at Brown University’s Watson School of International Affairs are calling it the worst conflict for reporters in modern times, with more media worker casualties than World Wars I and II, the Vietnam War, the Civil War, and the War in Afghanistan COMBINED. [ ]Brown University Watson School Figure 1: Number of Journalists and Media Workers Killed, By War. This latest attack on the free press comes as Netanyahu moves to rapidly expand Israel’s military occupation to a full takeover of Gaza. We cannot look away, Peter. And Congress cannot continue to enable this. [ ]There are no excuses: every Democratic member of Congress should condemn this mass murder of journalists and stop ALL weapons transfers to Israel ASAP! Add your name now if you agree → [ ]Add Your Name In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

**A hidden crisis is brewing. Here’s what you need to know to survive it.** Dear Patriot, In a chilling forecast, Bank of America has just issued a warning that every **American should take seriously** : **The U.S. dollar is on the verge of collapse.** For years, experts have quietly whispered about America’s GROWING debt, our inflation crisis, and politicians reckless spending—but now one of the biggest banks on Earth is openly sounding the alarm. Bank of America analysts predict a historic decline in the dollar’s value—**threatening your savings, retirement accounts, and the very foundation of your financial future.** And the numbers don’t lie:
* The U.S. is adding **$1 trillion in debt every 100 days**

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113144066/562791298/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWRhZTI1My1mNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wrBZcksnisjVuYAkxboZ81iisYKlF4hpJTMc_SGs0a8=&emci=58dae253-f676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5adae253-f676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894) _**Treasury Secretary Says Trump Accounts Could Pave Way to Privatizing Social Security**_ Derek, Trump’s Treasury Secretary just said the quiet part out loud: _They’re trying to privatize Social Security._ According to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, the so-called “Trump accounts” that Republicans created in their tax and spending bill are a **“back door for privatizing Social Security.”** This is yet another blatant threat to millions of Americans who have worked their whole lives to earn these benefits, fair and square. I’m fighting for them to get every cent. [**I’m committed to fighting these threats to Social Security in every way I can—and I need you standing with me. Please, chip in now to help me protect the earned benefits millions of Americans count on →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113144067/562791307/-898016266?refcode=email_081125_social-security&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWRhZTI1My1mNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wrBZcksnisjVuYAkxboZ81iisYKlF4hpJTMc_SGs0a8=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113144068/562791313/-898016266?refcode=email_081125_social-security&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWRhZTI1My1mNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wrBZcksnisjVuYAkxboZ81iisYKlF4hpJTMc_SGs0a8=)

This isn’t the first time Trump and Republicans have taken aim at our Social Security earned benefits.
Since taking office, Trump has allowed DOGE to cut the agency’s staff and Social Security benefits, resulting in system outages and threatening individuals’ access to their benefits.
The Trump administration has laid out plans to fire thousands of workers at the Social Security Administration, and they’re closing Social Security field offices across the country.
**Now, Republicans see the new Trump accounts as an opportunity to gut Social Security for future generations.**
Derek, Social Security is a promise to the American people: After a lifetime of hard work, they’ve earned the right to retire with dignity. I won’t let that promise be broken.
[**We need to shore up the promise of Social Security right now and for future generations. That’s why I’m fighting back against these attacks to our hard earned benefits and working to protect Social Security. If you’re with me, chip in now to help me keep up the fight and show Trump and Republicans we’re not backing down →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113144071/562791314/-898016266?refcode=email_081125_social-security&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWRhZTI1My1mNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wrBZcksnisjVuYAkxboZ81iisYKlF4hpJTMc_SGs0a8=)

name: Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaudling
subject: 11 years later…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
This past Saturday marked 11 years since Mike Brown was killed by a white police officer in Ferguson, Missouri, sparking a national movement to protect Black lives.
On August 9, 2014, Mike’s body was left lying in the street for 4 and a half hours, a brutal, dehumanizing display that seared itself into our collective memory.
This weekend, Movement for Freedom drove 4 and a half hours from Chicago to Ferguson, the same length of time his body laid on the pavement, to stand at “Ground Zero” with his parents, original protestors, and community members for the annual memorial.
https://www.givelify.com/donate/the-michael-brown-sr-chosen-for-change-organization-ferguson-mo-2j7wy5MTUxMzg5Ng==/donation/amount? [https://www.givelify.com/donate/the-michael-brown-sr-chosen-for-change-organization-ferguson-mo-2j7wy5MTUxMzg5Ng==/donation/amount?] https://www.givelify.com/donate/the-michael-brown-sr-chosen-for-change-organization-ferguson-mo-2j7wy5MTUxMzg5Ng==/donation/amount? [https://www.givelify.com/donate/the-michael-brown-sr-chosen-for-change-organization-ferguson-mo-2j7wy5MTUxMzg5Ng==/donation/amount?]
We stood there to say: We have not forgotten.
We stood there because justice never came. Not for Mike, not for his family, not for the countless other Black lives stolen by police violence. 11 years later, the fight for policing reform is as urgent as it’s ever been.
Donald Trump and extremist Republicans are pushing police funding bills dressed up as “reform,” pouring money into the very systems that continue to harm our communities, while ignoring demands for real safety and accountability.
Our commitment is clear: We will honor Mike’s life by fighting to dismantle these systems and build a future where no parent has to bury their child at the hands of the police.
I’m asking you to join me in supporting Chosen for Change, the organization founded by Mike Brown Sr., dedicated to advocacy, healing, and systemic change. [https://www.givelify.com/donate/the-michael-brown-sr-chosen-for-change-organization-ferguson-mo-2j7wy5MTUxMzg5Ng==/donation/amount?]
DONATE TO CHOSEN FOR CHANGE [https://www.givelify.com/donate/the-michael-brown-sr-chosen-for-change-organization-ferguson-mo-2j7wy5MTUxMzg5Ng==/donation/amount?]
Rest in power, Mike Brown. We’re still fighting.
In power and love,
— Stephany
Lead Spokesperson, Movement for Freedom
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250811_mikebrown_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250811_mikebrown_act] Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded by former Congresswoman Cori Bush, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve.

clean_body: [] This past Saturday marked 11 years since Mike Brown was killed by a white police officer in Ferguson, Missouri, sparking a national movement to protect Black lives. On August 9, 2014, Mike’s body was left lying in the street for 4 and a half hours, a brutal, dehumanizing display that seared itself into our collective memory. This weekend, Movement for Freedom drove 4 and a half hours from Chicago to Ferguson, the same length of time his body laid on the pavement, to stand at “Ground Zero” with his parents, original protestors, and community members for the annual memorial. ? [?] ? [?] We stood there to say: We have not forgotten. We stood there because justice never came. Not for Mike, not for his family, not for the countless other Black lives stolen by police violence. 11 years later, the fight for policing reform is as urgent as it’s ever been. Donald Trump and extremist Republicans are pushing police funding bills dressed up as “reform,” pouring money into the very systems that continue to harm our communities, while ignoring demands for real safety and accountability. Our commitment is clear: We will honor Mike’s life by fighting to dismantle these systems and build a future where no parent has to bury their child at the hands of the police. I’m asking you to join me in supporting Chosen for Change, the organization founded by Mike Brown Sr., dedicated to advocacy, healing, and systemic change. [?] DONATE TO CHOSEN FOR CHANGE [?] Rest in power, Mike Brown. We’re still fighting. In power and love, — Stephany Lead Spokesperson, Movement for Freedom [] Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded by former Congresswoman Cori Bush, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve. Want to learn more? Visit our website at Movement4Freedom.com [] . name: Voter Action Project
subject: Update from Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
AP: Georgia Supreme Court overturns some election rules, curbing State Election Board’s power [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081125_2&amount=25]
Team: Georgia’s highest court recently overturned four rules passed by the State Election Board just before last year’s general election, ruling the board overstepped its authority and intruded on lawmaking power reserved for legislators under the state constitution.
To refresh your memory: The State Election Board passed a slate of controversial new rules in August and September of 2024, including requirements that ballots be hand-counted after the close of polls, that someone delivering an absentee ballot in person provide a signature and photo ID, that county election board members be allowed to conduct a “ reasonable inquiry ” before certifying results, and that county election board members be granted broad access to election-related documents.
These new rules brought an outcry that the board’s majority was trying to improperly use its power to help MAGA candidates and follow disproved conspiracy theories about our elections.
The state Supreme Court’s unanimous decision to overturn these highly partisan, suppressive rules limits the ability of the State Election Board and other executive branch agencies of Georgia’s government to try and put their fingers on the scales and tip elections their way.
We know this isn't the end of voter suppression in Georgia, Team. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today to provide the resources we need to defend our right to vote in states like Georgia, in the courts, and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081125_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081125_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081125_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081125_2&amount=50]

https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081125_2&amount=20]

name: Gregory Wrightstone, CO2 Coalition
subject: Get the truth about climate science
body:
I'm sounding the alarm on a massive deception that's threatening the future of our country.

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206vxg70rn4axivguow7k3txym1l3ktezsdx7h7ewq8c7rb6z3qy945hfmf6qpnx6ykksjptwx6u2gdy99s&__stmp=t0ul81&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Friend, I'm sounding the alarm on a massive deception that's threatening the future of our country. The so-called "settled science" of climate change is a giant propaganda campaign –– one the Green Lobby uses to scare you and take your hard-earned tax dollars. _**[Friend, I want to personally invite you to subscribe to the CO 2 Coalition's informative weekly newsletter to get the facts about the REAL science behind climate change.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=14k0w0b7846j81f525q1nhx0hbfegfsq0fs4bhw9xjvbcp0cjd5yphta9wlh371mypjkhote2twya1k73jukbnu9vjsy3qbdq90uxth352jmncelzhspsykhizzp735z4p0kehh5gcak74iy3ranipn2kk3l75sc82e9tu0kmi390zn11j7txd2rcvgo71be3jvrv5d9vk7xl7d3y0jmjp8tql8ihr0uqrjrpzmi7m5rqun17jbuw28no4qsik6c9x13n9r0n6zn64mgipp5qupmavpx6k5h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0ul81&__onlt=h)**_

[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=14k0w0b7846j81f525q1nhx0hbfegfsq0fs4bhw9xjvbcp0cjd5yphta9wlh371mypjkhote2twya1k73jukbnu9vjsy3qbdq90uxth352jmncelzhspsykhizzp735z4p0kehh5gcak74iy3ranipn2kk3l75sc82e9tu0kmi390zn11j7txd2rcvgo71be3jvrv5d9vk7xl7d3y0jmjp8tql8ihr0uqrjrpzmi7m5rqun17jbuw28no4qsik6c9x13n9r0n6zn64mgipp5qupmavpx6k5h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0ul81&__onlt=h) [**Get the Latest Climate Science News Now**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=14k0w0b7846j81f525q1nhx0hbfegfsq0fs4bhw9xjvbcp0cjd5yphta9wlh371mypjkhote2twya1k73jukbnu9vjsy3qbdq90uxth352jmncelzhspsykhizzp735z4p0kehh5gcak74iy3ranipn2kk3l75sc82e9tu0kmi390zn11j7txd2rcvgo71be3jvrv5d9vk7xl7d3y0jmjp8tql8ihr0uqrjrpzmi7m5rqun17jbuw28no4qsik6c9x13n9r0n6zn64mgipp5qupmavpx6k5h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0ul81&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=14k0w0b7846j81f525q1nhx0hbfegfsq0fs4bhw9xjvbcp0cjd5yphta9wlh371mypjkhote2twya1k73jukbnu9vjsy3qbdq90uxth352jmncelzhspsykhizzp735z4p0kehh5gcak74iy3ranipn2kk3l75sc82e9tu0kmi390zn11j7txd2rcvgo71be3jvrv5d9vk7xl7d3y0jmjp8tql8ihr0uqrjrpzmi7m5rqun17jbuw28no4qsik6c9x13n9r0n6zn64mgipp5qupmavpx6k5h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0ul81&__onlt=h)
---
Are deserts expanding? Are there more hurricanes today? Have droughts become more frequent? These are the questions our experts explore in their hard-hitting news and analysis, Friend –– and their findings _will_ _likely make you question everything you've been told about the so-called "settled science."_ The truth is, true scientific inquiry shows different results than the doom-and-gloom scenarios pushed by the Climate Cult and their allies in the mainstream media, the education establishment, and the Green Lobby! In fact, the CO2 Coalition's scientific analysis, independent research, and in-depth, state-by-state studies consistently reveal something the Climate Cult doesn't want you to know: ecosystems are thriving, not dying –– and we've got the hard data to prove it. _**[That's why I'm urging you, Friend, to subscribe to our weekly newsletter today and discover the truth about climate science –– and expose the lies being pushed by climate alarmists.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=14k0w0b7846j81f525q1nhx0hbfegfsq0fs4bhw9xjvbcp0cjd5yphta9wlh371mypjkhote2twya1k73jukbnu9vjsy3qbdq90uxth352jmncelzhspsykhizzp735z4p0kehh5gcak74iy3ranipn2kk3l75sc82e9tu0kmi390zn11j7txd2rcvgo71be3jvrv5d9vk7xl7d3y0jmjp8tql8ihr0uqrjrpzmi7m5rqun17jbuw28no4qsik6c9x13n9r0n6zn64mgipp5qupmavpx6k5h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0ul81&__onlt=h)**_

---
Since 2015, the CO2 Coalition –– a group of 180+ respected U.S. scientists and researchers, along with a Nobel-Prize-winning physicist on our board –– has brought truth directly to the American people. Our team of leading scientists and researchers has been featured in major media outlets. We've testified before Congress, armed with the facts that debunk the Climate Cult's false narratives. And we've reached over 200,000+ Americans with our educational campaigns. In short, the CO2 Coalition is the "tip of the spear" in the battle between scientific truth and politically-motivated science fiction! _**[If you want to learn more Climate Facts and debunk Climate Fiction, please sign up for CO 2 Coalition's weekly newsletter today.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=14k0w0b7846j81f525q1nhx0hbfegfsq0fs4bhw9xjvbcp0cjd5yphta9wlh371mypjkhote2twya1k73jukbnu9vjsy3qbdq90uxth352jmncelzhspsykhizzp735z4p0kehh5gcak74iy3ranipn2kk3l75sc82e9tu0kmi390zn11j7txd2rcvgo71be3jvrv5d9vk7xl7d3y0jmjp8tql8ihr0uqrjrpzmi7m5rqun17jbuw28no4qsik6c9x13n9r0n6zn64mgipp5qupmavpx6k5h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0ul81&__onlt=h)**_

clean_body: I'm sounding the alarm on a massive deception that's threatening the future of our country. | | | Friend, I'm sounding the alarm on a massive deception that's threatening the future of our country. The so-called "settled science" of climate change is a giant propaganda campaign –– one the Green Lobby uses to scare you and take your hard-earned tax dollars. Are deserts expanding? Are there more hurricanes today? Have droughts become more frequent? These are the questions our experts explore in their hard-hitting news and analysis, Friend –– and their findings will likely make you question everything you've been told about the so-called "settled science." The truth is, true scientific inquiry shows different results than the doom-and-gloom scenarios pushed by the Climate Cult and their allies in the mainstream media, the education establishment, and the Green Lobby! In fact, the CO2 Coalition's scientific analysis, independent research, and in-depth, state-by-state studies consistently reveal something the Climate Cult doesn't want you to know: ecosystems are thriving, not dying –– and we've got the hard data to prove it. Since 2015, the CO2 Coalition –– a group of 180+ respected U.S. scientists and researchers, along with a Nobel-Prize-winning physicist on our board –– has brought truth directly to the American people. Our team of leading scientists and researchers has been featured in major media outlets. We've testified before Congress, armed with the facts that debunk the Climate Cult's false narratives. And we've reached over 200,000+ Americans with our educational campaigns. In short, the CO2 Coalition is the "tip of the spear" in the battle between scientific truth and politically-motivated science fiction! Thank you for joining the CO2 Coalition in our crucial education and outreach efforts. Together, we're building a movement of informed citizens who understand the real science behind climate change –– not the politicized version pushed by special interests in the Green Lobby. Gregory Wrightstone Executive Director CO2 Coalition 2677 Prosperity Avenue, Suite 300 Fairfax, VA 22031 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

| | | | | **ICYMI: Karrin Taylor Robson Joins 12News** _KTR discussed her plan to Make Arizona Strong Again_
---
| **PHOENIX, AZ** — Karrin Taylor Robson, conservative business executive and Trump-endorsed candidate for Governor of Arizona, recently sat down with Mark Curtis with 12News to discuss her campaign for Governor and her plan to Make Arizona Strong Again.
In a wide-ranging interview, Karrin highlighted the contrast between her proven, private-sector leadership and Governor Katie Hobbs’ record of incompetence, corruption, and ineffectiveness. She discussed her priorities as Governor — from keeping the border secure and restoring public safety to fixing the housing crisis and strengthening education — and explained why President Trump gave her his complete and total endorsement to lead Arizona.
Listen to the full episode here:[ https://youtu.be/cC3IAhIokw4?si=FNL13KAqz7xKCnMn](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=bddb5e76ce&e=ebfb0fda52)

Trump is pushing a bill to bring back Confederate statues nationwide.

Trump’s “Statue Restoration Act” would reinstall monuments honoring men who fought to uphold slavery — right in our public parks and national spaces.

[But this isn’t about history. It's about glorifying a toxic legacy of racism and emboldening his most dangerous supporters.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65795?t=7&akid=23279%2E4449941%2E3-S2sc)

body:
They can’t ignore this anymore.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113144590/562792978/1328794144?refcode=ea.050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1MGRkYmYyLWY3NzYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DBgN28tPNJG6DCjIxbXTiFSEFKiwR2oSmSz0biBKpv0=&emci=e633ceeb-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
Every victory matters in the ongoing climate fight. And the U.N.’s highest court just delivered a massive one. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113144591/562792979/-1571510754?refcode=ea.050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1MGRkYmYyLWY3NzYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DBgN28tPNJG6DCjIxbXTiFSEFKiwR2oSmSz0biBKpv0=&emci=e633ceeb-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105) **The International Court of Justice unanimously ruled that countries have a legal obligation to protect people from the impacts of climate change.** In their ruling, the court even linked fossil fuel support to human rights violations, declaring that environmental destruction threatens our basic right to survive. Unlike the climate scientists Trump has silenced or the EPA findings he’s rolled back, this international ruling is beyond his reach to manipulate or erase. The most incredible part? This ruling was possible because of people power. It started with brave law students from Vanuatu — a Pacific island nation that is feeling the worst impacts of the climate crisis — who refused to let their voices be silenced. They had the guts to bring their case before the World Court, and they WON. **Now it’s up to us to turn this landmark ruling into action. Our leaders must take the climate crisis seriously, and the pressure starts with this grassroots movement. Right here, right now.** **[This verdict will only matter if we make it matter. Sign on now if you agree our world leaders must honor the U.N. Court’s climate ruling and protect our planet from the dangerous fossil fuel agenda.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113144592/562792980/-1571510754?refcode=ea.050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1MGRkYmYyLWY3NzYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DBgN28tPNJG6DCjIxbXTiFSEFKiwR2oSmSz0biBKpv0=&emci=e633ceeb-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)** | [**ADD MY NAME →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113144593/562792981/-1571510754?refcode=ea.050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1MGRkYmYyLWY3NzYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DBgN28tPNJG6DCjIxbXTiFSEFKiwR2oSmSz0biBKpv0=&emci=e633ceeb-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=050ddbf2-f776-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: Pete Hegseth doesn’t believe women have the right to vote. Does Marie agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITdNst_CVwWy6KKvvN4DgRtzW4wpr9o0Nb5oEYKZ3mIKumI0L_MclTPVkKGKtVsjDk7ZaE8DK3oI9Gjg9anFABVN4dcmFzJnqIKFJLL_Gh2cQktrm-HitpZnJos__JIOoNriuTKleQ0-RfcFCeLZY52i2hxerCnDK7HZ0BWs4VvmORL8vcHe7wuRZfaieoNnoieFZ77b7KG-dQbzqUhUIdYsssYCyvXCEq8bWDsRR2d2sjYHylGartYHVEfdxK3IU7/4iy/WSIaLRazQDOiAL5P8bPn-w/h0/h001.Z8A0vzV-7bvDMmLNlvJieM8vEpklH1apNbGdfRAvAjE)
---
Peter,

Pete Hegseth, Donald Trump's Secretary of Defense, just shared a video on social media from a Christian nationalist pastor (whose church services he regularly attends and whose work he has praised) pushing a bunch of hot garbage about women's rights. ...or rather, the lack of them.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUCNUtB8Ru3yo6UXngIhMoAVWfm8GT3ZStefXq4OQ9U1EqmLTkr9hAOPl8QSKFABgaD42ftzusEsvxf3WYp1KEhPpTNjsW-hgKQYiW7EotBkoR10vWb7L9S1lz6DBMCAbo5ckCrpmGS_61eGxSUr5-ay9h-Xu41I8Vm9tyI7zJAcQgV5r2w0oGf61YEkKW2kOgU65xCxO0BMAPDqJ-3UL9626uqXYEjfL_F8Ylxcy5PilpHfkAlQftWOu6mpqIaZKcnYCkDhIdRE9RoZWLYoSAnxnh5XKorVdtFKy9sOS-KaCpcP6KtjYfnlyRwDkX8cs2PY10Z6N4VvQFkgflOj6-n0/4iy/WSIaLRazQDOiAL5P8bPn-w/h1/h001.uF9VhtJL78OKzW91YkedFiUhJUwnIE6sUudsgKD7xU8)
---
Let's break down what happened in this video Hegseth enthusiastically shared: Pastor Doug Wilson said that **" women are the kind of people that people come out of,"** implying that women serve only one useful purpose, which is making babies. But even that he has no respect for. Wilson also said, **" It doesn't take any talent to simply reproduce biologically."** His acolytes in the video openly mused about repealing the 19th amendment and reducing women to "discussing" their vote with their husband, who should be the one voting for them. I have to tell you, as a husband and a father of daughters, that pisses me off. And I will not stand aside while small-minded men like Doug Wilson and Pete Hegseth threaten their rights or their future. [**I 'm running for Congress to shut down dangerous ideas like this before they become the law of the land - as some of them already are. If you're as mad as I am, join me with a contribution to our campaign today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUCNUtB8Ru3yo6UXngIhMoAVWfm8GT3ZStefXq4OQ9U1EqmLTkr9hAOPl8QSKFABgaDN3FpuebruHe9hrRNkH3JHEyjjhgSyAi7O2e-yW5le60O4Ciy8VLhl4c42GVePUZwg8l6Cz4lh1eckPgf3Hgb6OUCCQuBSlFcuwukGx_2VpWWF9npdUnEPfN5paRC7XASZKuVmeGwHSvV5ysFO01a1VDEY9KbZmWKngsZxaetRDBjnAZq1lY3bKZHj7qX8HYlurxGFhiQQY5LkVOKTha8pJUfDmQpHFXm3BxWyph9EiWha98_Yngd8jdtXyK_LJ12ltT7D-pbTVTuGJx4_vWxi/4iy/WSIaLRazQDOiAL5P8bPn-w/h2/h001.riaEedfXuQ5MK-cUS0ozcj_XHtsAuO6v2aziuCRjb74) This isn't some fringe opinion whispered behind closed doors, it's a public message from one of the highest officials in our government, amplifying pastors who want to roll back the rights of half the country. It's like Hegseth and his MAGA Christian nationalist cronies all watched _The Handmaid 's Tale_ and said, "_Yep, this dystopia where women are second-class, subservient, and voiceless is exactly the future we want!_." Here's the scary part: this is the guy Trump put in charge of ALL branches of our U.S. military - one of the largest employers of women in our country. While Hegseth is spreading this dangerous ideology, my opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, has been voting to enable their voter suppression efforts that help these extremists expand their power. In April, Marie was one of just FOUR House Democrats who sided with Republicans to pass the SAVE Act - the Republican bill that effectively strips upwards of 70 million women from access to voting by imposing new ID requirements that are virtually impossible to meet. This same bill stands to disenfranchise other vulnerable groups such as Black, Latino, elderly, low-income, and young voters. **So while Hegseth pushes a Christian nationalist agenda that DIRECTLY threatens women 's rights and the diversity of our democracy, Marie is voting for an extreme voter suppression that SPECIFICALLY targets women voters.** With Democrats like these, who needs Republicans? It's time to send Marie packing. Help me get elected to Congress, and I'll fight relentlessly to protect voting rights, women's rights, reproductive freedom, and the separation of church and state. Because we live in America, not Gilead. But I can't do this without you. [**Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to help me take on the MAGA agenda --and the Democrats who enable it.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUCNUtB8Ru3yo6UXngIhMoAVWfm8GT3ZStefXq4OQ9U1EqmLTkr9hAOPl8QSKFABgaCSvnrggsrBNGN3sq4bx2dfiNockvACiYhNdoGC9wKnc3KY8VC6nc1KL-MnOLIUFCYl0cVMroOPGWGbjj_vv0DKYjVJFaOUteSGR0n_umtXbtW51W_JSZAic2cXisdcx73OC2RbjJkUVcYYJCvIHw5GChMPsl1er7stiImJVCu0oZbMJkgASAJ2sCh4vx79OpaQxHhbzPgXb5-3K7svnGXl0hT7rb4hLxYRNx7GCNWGjToC46nhIxSZuwr8FWsiin-E7_QNVmbC9SdhLMCbFz7P/4iy/WSIaLRazQDOiAL5P8bPn-w/h3/h001.uNhK_bcHlMcRXKS-ZV9_unxiuPrx0-FutoGia6HUcMM) Let's Heal Washington! clean_body: | | Peter, Pete Hegseth, Donald Trump's Secretary of Defense, just shared a video on social media from a Christian nationalist pastor (whose church services he regularly attends and whose work he has praised) pushing a bunch of hot garbage about women's rights. ...or rather, the lack of them. | Let's break down what happened in this video Hegseth enthusiastically shared: Pastor Doug Wilson said that " women are the kind of people that people come out of," implying that women serve only one useful purpose, which is making babies. But even that he has no respect for. Wilson also said, " It doesn't take any talent to simply reproduce biologically." His acolytes in the video openly mused about repealing the 19th amendment and reducing women to "discussing" their vote with their husband, who should be the one voting for them. I have to tell you, as a husband and a father of daughters, that pisses me off. And I will not stand aside while small-minded men like Doug Wilson and Pete Hegseth threaten their rights or their future. This isn't some fringe opinion whispered behind closed doors, it's a public message from one of the highest officials in our government, amplifying pastors who want to roll back the rights of half the country. It's like Hegseth and his MAGA Christian nationalist cronies all watched The Handmaid 's Tale and said, "Yep, this dystopia where women are second-class, subservient, and voiceless is exactly the future we want!." Here's the scary part: this is the guy Trump put in charge of ALL branches of our U.S. military - one of the largest employers of women in our country. While Hegseth is spreading this dangerous ideology, my opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, has been voting to enable their voter suppression efforts that help these extremists expand their power. In April, Marie was one of just FOUR House Democrats who sided with Republicans to pass the SAVE Act - the Republican bill that effectively strips upwards of 70 million women from access to voting by imposing new ID requirements that are virtually impossible to meet. This same bill stands to disenfranchise other vulnerable groups such as Black, Latino, elderly, low-income, and young voters. So while Hegseth pushes a Christian nationalist agenda that DIRECTLY threatens women 's rights and the diversity of our democracy, Marie is voting for an extreme voter suppression that SPECIFICALLY targets women voters. With Democrats like these, who needs Republicans? It's time to send Marie packing. Help me get elected to Congress, and I'll fight relentlessly to protect voting rights, women's rights, reproductive freedom, and the separation of church and state. Because we live in America, not Gilead. But I can't do this without you. Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. Chip in now to help elect a Democrat ready to stand up to MAGA. | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2025 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . name: Team Cooper
subject: re: GOP gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
They’re preventing the voters from choosing our representatives. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113144978/562794498/823540626?refcode=ea.a13aae7b-fa76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.a13aae7b-fa76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTNhYWU3Yi1mYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=siHYWWsQKB6bjOhvV50L-FGa5Orgn-Nj5JGH900zRvQ=&emci=0daa62ea-e376-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a13aae7b-fa76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)
Peter — **Donald Trump claims that Republicans are “entitled” to more seats in Congress — and he’s directed GOP-led states to deliver them.** **First, it was Texas.** Democratic state legislators left the state to block their GOP colleagues’ attempts to gerrymander their maps. But National Republicans asked the FBI to hunt those legislators down and help enable the GOP’s power grab. **Then, Missouri decided to join in.** Their Republican governor decided they should redraw maps that better “support President Trump’s agenda” and would likely gerrymander a Democratic representative out of office. **And Vice President Vance headed to Indiana** to urge GOP lawmakers to gerrymander their state, too. Right before our eyes, Republicans are enacting a plan to take away voters’ choices and consolidate their own power ahead of the next elections — **just like GOP lawmakers did in North Carolina.** This is beyond “not normal.” It undermines how our whole democracy is supposed to work. **Donald Trump and the national GOP want to steal congressional seats and pick our representatives for us because that’s what’s in _their_ best interest. Not ours.** **[Holding them accountable starts by ENDING Republicans’ one-party control in Washington. Peter, North Carolina is our best opportunity to flip a U.S. Senate seat from red to blue and take back the majority. Can you rush in a contribution to help Roy Cooper defeat the GOP?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113144979/562794499/-1743631236?refcode=ea.a13aae7b-fa76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.a13aae7b-fa76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTNhYWU3Yi1mYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=siHYWWsQKB6bjOhvV50L-FGa5Orgn-Nj5JGH900zRvQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113144980/562794500/-1743631236?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.a13aae7b-fa76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.a13aae7b-fa76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTNhYWU3Yi1mYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=siHYWWsQKB6bjOhvV50L-FGa5Orgn-Nj5JGH900zRvQ=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Scalise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit Scalise For Congress and Eye Of The Tiger PAC
body:
We’re about to have a NEW Special Election in VA-11 – it’s less than FOUR weeks away...

| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.house-republicans.org/unsubscribe?e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_cf0301f245cec2869aa6ace172f&n=1).

| Sorry to interrupt your day but this is URGENT:
We’re about to have a NEW Special Election in VA-11 – it’s less than FOUR weeks away, a NEW Special Election in AZ-07 – it’s less than EIGHT weeks away, a NEW Special Election in TN-07 – the primary is NINE weeks away, and a NEW Special Election in TX-18 – early voting is just TEN weeks away!
Remember: We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.
Remember: If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.
Remember: If they jam up Trump’s agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.
Peter – we need [AT LEAST 20,000 contributions](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFJvgLnnoXtDsC3EzQXNoNMWXIzt9OSOi6FKWAhuNyMvcWo_ZO6mrUjg5mLF11PLPGM35FCv0edUImD600loAcyV6mo6MVMzPnPak9cS4L513Mek1bYCQKDylMMzNJQ5-dujd5GlwEjnKJeV1IUynVi-d3Z_iKQSyeFauFuXJgelAzmz9XCymq7PhASpzErDz05J0KlkQHdp0edGm45k5xmucUQL41rh_sUwHdDMwXVqIWTJgvn8epZb0UZdYys4JEg5HDlUON2BO7ce9C7jXIvo&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_cf0301f245cec2869aa6ace172f&n=2) before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans defying the odds, winning AT LEAST one, and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.
If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority – and the fate of President Trump’s legislative agenda – hangs in the balance. *** CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES *** FOUR SPECIAL ELECTIONS | [ CONTRIBUTE 10 BUCKS ](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFJvgLnnoXtDsC3EzQXNoNMWXIzt9OSOi6FKWAhuNyMvcWo_ZO6mrUjg5mLF11PLPGM35FCv0edUImD600loAcyV6mo6MVMzPnPak9cS4L513Mek1bYCQKDylMMzNJQ5-dujd5GlwEjnKJeV1IUynVi-d3Z_iKQSyeFauFuXJgelAzmz9XCymq7PhASpzErDz05J0KlkQHdp0edGm45k5xmucUQL41rh_sUwHdDMwXVqIWTJgvn8epZb0UZdYys4JEg5HDlUON2BO7ce9C7jXIvo&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_cf0301f245cec2869aa6ace172f&n=3)

Listen –

This deadline was important before but now that our House Majority may depend on defying the odds in FOUR Special Elections...

THIS IS THE MOST IMPORTANT DEADLINE YET!

[Majority Leader Steve Scalise agreed that 20,000 more contributions is the bare minimum we need to help supercharge our efforts to take VA-11, AZ-07, and TX-18 and hold the line in TN-07.](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFJvgLnnoXtDsC3EzQXNoNMWXIzt9OSOi6FKWAhuNyMvcWo_ZO6mrUjg5mLF11PLPGM35FCv0edUImD600loAcyV6mo6MVMzPnPak9cS4L513Mek1bYCQKDylMMzNJQ5-dujd5GlwEjnKJeV1IUynVi-d3Z_iKQSyeFauFuXJgelAzmz9XCymq7PhASpzErDz05J0KlkQHdp0edGm45k5xmucUQL41rh_sUwHdDMwXVqIWTJgvn8epZb0UZdYys4JEg5HDlUON2BO7ce9C7jXIvo&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_cf0301f245cec2869aa6ace172f&n=7)

Every contribution helps us refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and get our positive message out to voters – that’s how we win key races like these.

Please don’t underestimate the seriousness of the situation.

Our deadline is closing in! We’re PLEADING for your help right here and right now.

Thanks for all you do.
– SPECIAL ELECTION ALERTS –
From Team Scalise

clean_body: We’re about to have a NEW Special Election in VA-11 – it’s less than FOUR weeks away... | Not interested? . | Sorry to interrupt your day but this is URGENT: We’re about to have a NEW Special Election in VA-11 – it’s less than FOUR weeks away, a NEW Special Election in AZ-07 – it’s less than EIGHT weeks away, a NEW Special Election in TN-07 – the primary is NINE weeks away, and a NEW Special Election in TX-18 – early voting is just TEN weeks away! Remember: We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House. Remember: If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress. Remember: If they jam up Trump’s agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE. Peter – we need before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans defying the odds, winning AT LEAST one, and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority. If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority – and the fate of President Trump’s legislative agenda – hangs in the balance. * CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES FOUR SPECIAL ELECTIONS | Listen – This deadline was important before but now that our House Majority may depend on defying the odds in FOUR Special Elections... THIS IS THE MOST IMPORTANT DEADLINE YET! Every contribution helps us refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and get our positive message out to voters – that’s how we win key races like these. Please don’t underestimate the seriousness of the situation. Our deadline is closing in! We’re PLEADING for your help right here and right now. Thanks for all you do. – SPECIAL ELECTION ALERTS – From Team Scalise |

📣 He told the nation he’ll be a “dictator on day one.”

subject: The bus tour starts in a week! Will we see you?
body:
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/010001989b16f3b2-ffc50cdc-e480-4d2d-928e-a15c24157f0f-000000/R35zpMaV4e0ud2uYaEzHhEHBNi8Wtza3eXWUnkGo7WI=417)Patriot–**From California to the Capitol, the SAVE Act bus tour is about to begin.** Starting **August 18th** in **Garden Grove, California** , we’ll be traveling coast to coast, rallying support for the **Safeguarding American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act** and mobilizing patriots like you to say loud and clear: **only citizens should vote in U.S. elections**.The tour will culminate in a [_**major rally at the U.S. Capitol on September 10th**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-washington-dc%2F/1/010001989b16f3b2-ffc50cdc-e480-4d2d-928e-a15c24157f0f-000000/9zyWzXn_dxP3_d_cuTgdJiHe8ZFadZ7TuUtWjLi0o1k=417), where we’ll hand-deliver thousands of petition signatures you helped gather. This is our chance to make an unmistakable statement to Congress—one that can’t be ignored.**_Check the schedule below to find your nearest stop_**[ _**_and RSVP now!_**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fonlycitizensvotetour%2F/1/010001989b16f3b2-ffc50cdc-e480-4d2d-928e-a15c24157f0f-000000/sbiVXiSeSvb8kLtROOBe36DgYysG3Ps6XcPnE_xYOIg=417)

**BUS TOUR SCHEDULE**
* **Aug. 18th** – Garden Grove, CA
* **Aug. 19th** – Las Vegas, NV
* **Aug. 20th** – Scottsdale, AZ & Tucson, AZ
* **Aug. 21st** – Las Cruces, NM
* **Aug. 22nd** – San Antonio, TX
* **Aug. 25th** – Baton Rouge, LA
* **Aug. 26th** – Jackson, MS & Montgomery, AL
* **Aug. 27th** – Atlanta, GA & Greenville, SC
* **Aug. 28th** – Raleigh, NC
* **Sept. 1st** – Kenosha, WI
* **Sept. 2nd** – Orland Park, IL
* **Sept. 3rd** – Lansing, MI & Holland, OH
* **Sept. 4th** – Cranberry Township, PA
* **Sept. 5th** – Harrisburg, PA
* **Sept. 8th** – Annapolis, MD
* **Sept. 10th** – **Washington, DC (Capitol Rally & Petition Delivery)**

Your support is powering this nationwide push to safeguard our elections. If you can’t make it to a stop but want to help fuel the tour and amplify the message, please consider chipping in today.[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/010001989b16f3b2-ffc50cdc-e480-4d2d-928e-a15c24157f0f-000000/hpiEVxL7sUQmpwXhmSgWT9dWX7ffRnHNtyU0ActPZE4=417)**Thank you for being part of this movement—we’re honored to stand beside you, and we can’t wait to see you along the way!** In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin ** _The SAVE Act (Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act)_**_is a commonsense bill that would require individuals to provide documentary proof of U.S. citizenship when registering to vote in federal elections. name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Statistically tied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

_**BREAKING:**_ Newsweek just reported on brand new polling on Georgia’s Senate race and it does not look good...
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250811-1-f&t=1&akid=628%2E5691347%2EfchxW-)
**Jon and MAGA extremist Mike Collins are leaving the gate statistically tied. **
Peter, there was never any doubt this race would be close. Jon is the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state where Donald Trump won in 2024.
Election forecasters and political pundits agree: Jon Ossoff is the most vulnerable Senate Democrat on the ballot in 2026.
But this poll shows just _how_ close the margins are here in Georgia.
_Everything we do over the next year will determine if Jon can defend this seat and help Democrats reclaim the Senate majority, or if another MAGA extremist will be taking the oath of office._
In a race this close, every dollar raised, every door knocked, and every voter reached will ultimately make the difference. But it’s going to take a lot of resources to win this race, which is why we’re asking:
**[Please rush a donation of any amount to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today. Your contribution today will make a difference in what happens between now and Election Day.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250811-1-f&t=2&akid=628%2E5691347%2EfchxW-)
**[CHIP IN](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250811-1-f&t=3&akid=628%2E5691347%2EfchxW-)**
In 2021, we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won.
We know with your support, this team can win again.
Thank you,
Jon Ossoff for Senate

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=628%2E5691347%2EfchxW-) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=628%2E5691347%2EfchxW-) if you'd like to unsubscribe.
