body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113145376/562795767/-570383128?refcode=250811_MFC_Allred_Redistricting2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2FiNzg1MC1mYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44FjSN7EEAcgxu-VGFxlBrQL_kcpb_jr4YfPiliPpkU=) Folks, I know there's A LOT of news circulating about redistricting in Texas, so let me break it down. A few weeks ago, President Trump demanded the Texas GOP give him five more seats in Congress. Texas Republicans responded by calling a special legislative session under the guise of passing flood relief ... _and used that special session instead to blatantly gerrymander our map and give the president what he wants._ This is egregious. As a voting rights lawyer for over a decade, **it's the most brazen attack on our democracy and attempt to just openly steal congressional seats that I've ever seen.** And let's be clear, it isn't just about the maps: The GOP wants to use this to rig elections and then pass more bills that will rip away health care while cutting taxes for the wealthy. They want prices on everyday Americans to go up, while their millionaire and billionaire donors get richer and richer. **It's on ALL OF US to fight back. I’m running for Senate to root out corruption in our government and give Texans the representation we deserve – but I need you with me, folks. Early polls show me ahead, but my GOP opponents have already raised millions of dollars, and I'm counting on your grassroots support to help me close the gap.** [**Please – will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton of $15 or whatever you can – to help me bring change to Texas?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113145377/562795768/-570383128?refcode=250811_MFC_Allred_Redistricting2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2FiNzg1MC1mYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44FjSN7EEAcgxu-VGFxlBrQL_kcpb_jr4YfPiliPpkU=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113145378/562795769/-1643139164?refcode=250811_MFC_Allred_Redistricting2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2FiNzg1MC1mYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44FjSN7EEAcgxu-VGFxlBrQL_kcpb_jr4YfPiliPpkU=) Thanks for giving what you can at this urgent moment, Colin

#### _**Cliff 's Note: **I intended to write about Trump's autocratic attack on DC...but realized I already have. So I'll share some of those insights again.._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/37fb63d9-678e-4ab8-8692-06c1ed7dee17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Wow, the Epstein files must have Trump in more compromising positions than you'll find in The Kama Sutra, right?
I mean, what a pace for a guy who has trouble walking down ramps! We're bowing to Pootie in Alaska while attacking Zelensky--after a big show of being [such a super hero](https://substack.com/redirect/530df965-01b0-472b-ae0b-a9993d4dc631?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the past few months and talking back to daddy Vladdy!
We've had our senses assaulted with talk of prosecuting Obama for...[whatever large Cobb Salad came flying outta Tulsi's mouth](https://substack.com/redirect/d26e0413-5c47-4537-91be-7300532f7dfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) every time she attempted a ham-handed (and legged) explanation!
And now Trump and [his gin-soaked, Christian Nationalist butler, Hegseth](https://substack.com/redirect/85b9e9f9-033d-4a7a-9ac3-cf8c35a97079?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), have crossed The Rubicon, which those of us paying attention--and willing to tell truths without worrying what 227 other divisions in our corporate-WASP-nest think--knew was as inevitable as Don Jr. having crack-eyes during a live stream.
Which is why it was all I could ponder, at times, a month ago [when in one of my favorite cities viewing remnants of a 2,000-year old republic](https://substack.com/redirect/bf3d6812-b4b4-4ae0-ba0f-9abde07edfa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) wiped from this Earth.
So instead of reinventing the chariot, [let's have Superman revolve the Earth backwards](https://substack.com/redirect/530df965-01b0-472b-ae0b-a9993d4dc631?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about 35 days to see what wisps of wind that escaped antiquity [allowed me to conjure up as I put pen to...pixel](https://substack.com/redirect/d53164cb-050d-4f9a-bafe-44cfd4683567?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> **From gladiators in the arena to the UFC at the White House, this isn 't theory anymore, folks. It's prophecy.**
> The ruins here in Rome are like hieroglyphic warnings, if you read them correctly--of a time when emperors ended a Republic and the worst of them, like Nero or Julius Caesar, let Rome burn or even, in the latter's case, [led the bloody transformation from republic to dictatorship](https://substack.com/redirect/33dc471c-42eb-4a2b-b617-2f542f134e28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> More recently, Mussolini was the creator of fascism, who turned Rome and the rest of Italy into a bright red (MAGA hat) warning sign for the rest of the world to easily interpret in the future.
> Yet, today in America? We're blowing past those warning signs, led by people who seem to have discovered how to make [a crushed, sniff-able form of Fox "News"and are so rage-addicted](https://substack.com/redirect/bf3d6812-b4b4-4ae0-ba0f-9abde07edfa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Republicans can let their freak flag fly and party like it's 476 A.D.
> Back home in good ole U.S., they just authorized **$45 billion more for ICE, Trump 's secret police**. Forty-five **billion** --not for food, not for healthcare, not for schools or clean water or helping kids in poverty. No, it's for armored stormtroopers who hide their faces and badges, surveillance and domestic militarization.
> It's corporate-media catnip, my friends, kidnapping humans off our streets, especially if you can get it on camera! Think of the ratings! It's like a never-ending episode of "COPS!" As the head of CBS, Les Moonves said about Trump in 2016, "It may not be good for America, but it's damn good for CBS." And being that CBS was his country, there was no choice there.
> Meanwhile, we hand out catchy nicknames and marketing slogans that'd amuse toddlers to bombing operations that blow humans apart. That is a key part of our "circuses" plan.
> Because in between a Marlboro Red and a glazed chocolate donut with the sprinkles, right before scratching some belly-lint, Ma & Pa MAGA gotta have something to let 'em yell "F*k Yeah!" So how about _Alligator Alcatraz!?_ I mean, what a great name for a concentration camp for migrant families in the Everglades!
> Cool, right!? How entertaining, torturing our fellow humans! And did I remember say that name is cool?! Almost as good as Operation Midnight Hammer, where Trump got to drop big bombs on Iran, albeit with the kinda success he's used to achieving with the Trump Taj Mahal or creation of Eric.
> Now Trump's talking about active duty Marines helping ICE, which as you may know, violates U.S. law--the Posse Comitatus Act. And there's a reason that law was put in place. If we return to lessons learned from Rome, when Julius Caesar took Rome, and then took it into autocracy, it began with his crossing The Rubicon River with troops. Entering Rome in defiance of law.
> There's a reason you've heard and likely used the phrase "crossing the Rubicon." Because the moment Caesar committed that particular act of treason, Rome was done for. His treachery became a lasting phrase to explain when something reached the**point of no return**.
> Well, folks, we're getting a little too close to crossing ours.
> I don't say this lightly. But from this amazing city, surrounded by literal ruins, you can _feel_ _a future we all dread_ closing in on America like a lion unleashed on a gazelle.
> You can see it coming, if you're willing to look:
Well, that sure as s*t was a fun trip down memory lane, wasn't it? Look, as I also said back then, "We still have time folks...But not much as you'd think. We're on the clock. Or a sundial."
And that is still the truth. We need to always be ready for what it's obvious he's going to do. This, sadly, was one of those things.
But there is no future foreordained. As Texas House Democrats are showing us right now.
Trump has 48 hours and then he needs congressional approval. Are you and your 12% favorability rating in Maine good with this, Susan Collins? Joni Ernst? I mean, we're all gonna die, right!? Thom Tillis sure seems to love Trump lately, I bet he'll go to the mat for him on this..
And then there are the courts, who just roasted Trump yet again on a Ghislaine Maxwell hail mary to unseal her testimony, in which he knows he doesn't appear.
Nothing folks--NOTHING--is foreordained. [Keep demanding the Epstein files](https://substack.com/redirect/63eb56c7-7976-40a4-9acf-d506064d61fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), keep supporting those willing to stand up, like our Texas Democratic friends, and in general, Keep Fighting!

subject: Counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours.
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e313319/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvYkRzYlA5OW1jVQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA4MTE/LbmNsUEVxdUJxeA/qP2hpZHM9bmN4MUtjbEQ0VXBxNFdscw/gaJpnFQ/s1vc57ead4b)

| |

them, I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news. BRAVE Books has been invited by President Trump’s DOE to host our **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY** **DAY** at the Library of Congress! Friend, talk about taking back our libraries! Just three years ago, we were fighting to get into local public libraries across the country to counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours. Radical librarians sabotaged our efforts. Leftists cursed us with insults. And now, thanks to unwavering support from patriots like you, on August 16th, we’ll be sharing lessons in humility, freedom, and patriotism with children and parents at the largest library in the world -- America’s Library. But as excited as I am to announce our Library of Congress event, it's also a little daunting. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** just got huge. **[And that’s why I’m sending you this email with a 24-hour deadline.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)** them, I’m praying you will help BRAVE Books make the most of this incredible opportunity.
---
* Hosting **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress helps us reach hundreds more children and their families in person.
* The media coverage gets our conservative message in front of untold numbers of children and families who need to hear that our country and our God are good.
* And our presence at the Library of Congress sends a powerful message that America is about faith, family and freedom.

---
For too long the Left has filled the hearts and minds of children with lies. What a blessing it will be to share God’s truth on August 16th at the Library of Congress. But friend, the date is barreling towards us and our budget just skyrocketed. The new audio/visual needs alone for an event of this magnitude are more than BRAVE Books can handle without your help. [**them, I hope you’ll rush back your crucial gift in the next 24-hours.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) We simply can’t make the most of this opportunity without you. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress will be our most impactful event yet to counter the radical librarians and leftist school boards who are filling our children’s hearts and minds with horrible books like:
---
| | _A is for Activist._ _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” them, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
| [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | _A is for Activist_. _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” them, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. This book teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And then of course, there are the Scholastic Books. Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. And their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me, one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Friend, in the face of all this it’s hard to imagine that a small Christian publisher like BRAVE Books could make a difference. But listen to this... God’s design is so perfect. Did you know that the British burned our Library of Congress to the ground on August 24, 1814? Then five months later, Congress purchased Thomas Jefferson’s personal library of 6,487 books as the foundation of a new American Library. And for decades, the Left has been dragging our country further and further away from Thomas Jefferson’s original vision for our nation. But on August 16, 2025, “we the people” will bring that vision back to the Library of Congress -- back to America. We can’t do it without you. [**Please help us make SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY a success by rushing back your best emergency gift of $35, $50, or even $500.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) And because it’s so critical that you get your **crucial** gift back in just 24 hours, as a “Fast Response Bonus” for your gift of $100 or more, I’d love to send you the first book I wrote with BRAVE called As You Grow. As You Grow tells the story of a tiny seed that, through the fruit of the Spirit, turns into a mighty tree. Friend, that’s BRAVE Books. All that we do is only possible through God’s grace and your generosity. **[Now we’re at a watershed moment and I’m asking for your support.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)** Whether your emergency gift is $35, $50, $100 or anything higher or lower -- what’s most important is that you respond in the next 24 hours because August 16th is just weeks away. The Holy Spirit has opened a door for us to host an incredible **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress. Please help us seize this opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to our nation’s capital while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us.
---
Thank you!
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
P.S. them, we began this journey to take back our libraries and help parents pour conservative values into their children just three years ago. Now, this August 16th, we’ll be holding **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress! What a way to turn back the Left! But time is short, and we can’t make this day a success without you. [**Please rush back your emergency gift in just 24 hours.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) When you reply quickly with a gift of $100 or more, I’ll send you As You Grow for a child in your life or you can take it and leave it at your local school, charity shop, doctor’s office or library to reach a child who doesn’t have someone to teach them conservative values. Thank you, Friend! -- Kirk
---
|
---
| | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
**Brave Books** 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301
---

name: Brianna Titone For Colorado
subject: They’re taking your money – here’s the proof in 90 seconds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer, Registered Agent Brianna Titone
body:
Watch my quick video on how nearly $2 billion of YOUR money is being raided, and what I’ll do to stop it.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5cda29b24cfc/unclaimedtrustfund?e=8249791cac)
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=caf672c54e&e=8249791cac)
| | | | | Hi there... Right now, there's nearly [$2 billion of YOUR money sitting in Colorado's Unclaimed Property Trust Fund](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=23deeb561a&e=8249791cac) – money that belongs to you and your neighbors, not the state government.This isn't taxpayer money. This is your uncashed paycheck, your forgotten utility refund, your unclaimed dividend, or contents from your safe deposit box. Since its creation, this program has returned over $784 million to Coloradans, and it's designed to hold these funds safely until you claim them – no matter how long it takes.**But there's a problem.** For years, the Colorado Legislature has been "borrowing" from this fund to pay for other programs, promising to pay it back decades later. This session alone, they took nearly $100 million more from YOUR money.**Here's where the choice becomes clear:** My opponent, Senator Jeff Bridges, voted affirmatively on multiple bills (HB25-1078, HB25-1268, and SB25-290) that would raid the Unclaimed Property Trust Fund. While these programs may serve worthy purposes, using YOUR money as a piggy bank is fundamentally wrong.**I don’t support this. Here's why:** As I've said throughout this campaign, "I would never go shopping at a lost and found and then bring it back 10 years later." That's essentially what the legislature is doing by using your unclaimed property as a funding source.In fact, there’s a [lawsuit going on in Ohio](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=a682d0cf5c&e=8249791cac) because they are trying to use unclaimed property to build a stadium. I don’t suspect this will be acceptable by the court.
---
| [WATCH MY 90 SECOND VIDEO ON THE ISSUES SURROUNDING THE UNCLAIMED PROPERTY TRUST FUND](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=83fb9cd4a6&e=8249791cac)
---
| When I’m State Treasurer, I will:
* **Find better ways for you to get** _**your money**_
* **Ensure your money** stays safe until you claim it
* **Fight against** any attempts to use these funds for other purposes
* **Address revenue shortfalls** through proper channels, not by raiding money that belongs to you

The State Treasury has one job regarding unclaimed property: to be a trustworthy custodian of your funds until you're ready to claim them. Even allowing this money to be "borrowed" is, in my opinion, a breach of trust to the people whose funds we're supposed to protect.**The difference is clear:**
* **Senator Bridges** voted to take your money for other programs
* **Brianna Titone** will protect your money and return it when you claim it

Colorado's current State Treasurer, Dave Young, has spoken out against these raids on the trust fund. clean_body: Watch my quick video on how nearly $2 billion of YOUR money is being raided, and what I’ll do to stop it. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hi there... Right now, there's nearly – money that belongs to you and your neighbors, not the state government.This isn't taxpayer money. This is your uncashed paycheck, your forgotten utility refund, your unclaimed dividend, or contents from your safe deposit box. Since its creation, this program has returned over $784 million to Coloradans, and it's designed to hold these funds safely until you claim them – no matter how long it takes.But there's a problem. For years, the Colorado Legislature has been "borrowing" from this fund to pay for other programs, promising to pay it back decades later. This session alone, they took nearly $100 million more from YOUR money.Here's where the choice becomes clear: My opponent, Senator Jeff Bridges, voted affirmatively on multiple bills (HB25-1078, HB25-1268, and SB25-290) that would raid the Unclaimed Property Trust Fund. While these programs may serve worthy purposes, using YOUR money as a piggy bank is fundamentally wrong.I don’t support this. Here's why: As I've said throughout this campaign, "I would never go shopping at a lost and found and then bring it back 10 years later." That's essentially what the legislature is doing by using your unclaimed property as a funding source.In fact, there’s a because they are trying to use unclaimed property to build a stadium. I don’t suspect this will be acceptable by the court. | | When I’m State Treasurer, I will: Find better ways for you to get your money Ensure your money stays safe until you claim it Fight against any attempts to use these funds for other purposes Address revenue shortfalls through proper channels, not by raiding money that belongs to you The State Treasury has one job regarding unclaimed property: to be a trustworthy custodian of your funds until you're ready to claim them. Even allowing this money to be "borrowed" is, in my opinion, a breach of trust to the people whose funds we're supposed to protect.The difference is clear: Senator Bridges voted to take your money for other programs Brianna Titone will protect your money and return it when you claim it Colorado's current State Treasurer, Dave Young, has spoken out against these raids on the trust fund. Trump's Energy Secretary Chris Wright **[sparred with Kaitlan Collins](https://substack.com/redirect/a6dee2d8-11f9-4264-ab7f-b0d46957acb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** live on CNN about criticism towards the administration's report on climate change which some scientists say includes "cherry-picked data."
**[Watch the climate clash here:](https://substack.com/redirect/a6dee2d8-11f9-4264-ab7f-b0d46957acb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a6dee2d8-11f9-4264-ab7f-b0d46957acb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Wright pushed back on the report's critics, saying that they have been responsible for "politically-driven" assessments of climate data "to hype up a real issue, but an issue that is nowhere near the world's greatest challenge.
"This report actually isn't radical or anything out of the conventional lines, it's just the media never reads the actual details of climate change," Wright fired back at Collin's.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a6dee2d8-11f9-4264-ab7f-b0d46957acb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/e5064501-ffce-4599-a393-28aab5a521dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[The $18,000 House You Missed](https://substack.com/redirect/e5064501-ffce-4599-a393-28aab5a521dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e5064501-ffce-4599-a393-28aab5a521dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Pop quiz:**
It's 1970. You have $18,000 in gold coins.
Option A: Sell the coins, buy the house ($18,000 price tag)
Option B: Keep the 500 gold coins
Most people pick the house.
Smart move, right?
**Dead wrong.**
Fast-forward to 1980. That house now costs $47,000. But those 500 gold coins?
**You only need 77 of them to buy that house.**
You pocket the other 423 coins. Today, those leftover coins are worth nearly $1.4 million.
While your neighbors are still paying mortgages, you're sitting on a goldmine. But now there's something _new_ that could boom the price like 50 years ago...
**[Get the full story[here ](https://substack.com/redirect/e5064501-ffce-4599-a393-28aab5a521dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)->]**
[Read Full Story](https://substack.com/redirect/e5064501-ffce-4599-a393-28aab5a521dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

subject: A quick but important ask for you

body:
According to our records, you haven’t yet endorsed Deb’s campaign.

name: David Hogg
subject: This is happening because Trump believes he’s above the law — and he’s built an army of enablers who will carry out his authoritarian agenda without hesitation.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We need to take the fight directly to Trump and his enablers.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250811-1&t=1&akid=2506%2E587540%2Eaxq7ee)
Peter, David Hogg here, and I wish I had better news.
President Trump has just taken control of the D.C. police, and now he’s even deploying the D.C. National Guard. All under the guise of _“cleaning up the streets.”_
**This is _beyond_ outrageous, Peter. It’s full-blown fascism.**
This is what authoritarianism looks like in real time. First, they seize control of the levers of power. Then they use them to intimidate, silence, and suppress dissent.
It’s happening because Trump believes he’s above the law — and he’s built an army of enablers who will carry out his authoritarian agenda without hesitation.
Leaders We Deserve is here to change that — by recruiting, training, and electing the next generation of progressive leaders who will _actually_ meet this moment.
Young leaders who grew up under lockdown drills, climate chaos, and the erosion of our rights — and who won’t hesitate to use every tool available to fight back.
We know how to do this. We’ve done it before.
And with your help, we’ll do it again — but we can’t afford to wait.
Every day Trump’s grip on power tightens is another day we lose.
**[If you’re ready to help us take the fight directly to Trump’s enablers and elect bold new leaders who will never bow to him, pitch in $5 or more now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250811_1_dc?refcode=em20250811-2506&amount=5&refcode2=2506_587540_axq7ee&akid=2506%2E587540%2Eaxq7ee)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250811_1_dc?amount=5&refcode=em20250811-2506&refcode2=2506_587540_axq7ee&akid=2506%2E587540%2Eaxq7ee)**
The fight is here. The time is now.
And if we stand together, they won’t be able to ignore us.
Thank you for stepping up in this critical moment,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250811-1&t=2&refcode2=2506_587540_axq7ee&akid=2506%2E587540%2Eaxq7ee)**

body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=rAkQtDvzLxoL7zDDJ5ZJPXUXFnMtwMyExHFzQxZNZDP7z9bXAddpZLAchsJVGbi%2FENsRK6Pu1ju%2BZHcwGRyjvjkyRtLSP4g%2Fn2Y3%2BdSQxU0zbbnehac099EpkmsPCdokg7Q7776QmyluNbhtzLiYjAAKSe3WR0hBxsaatYZz%2BHU0hANc9UgdJxZTfbYssQdNGbi9Zc5Szcz8KowR5nFmmOKl0FhQl11bvL4RbL7ybE1Z1h8XDhZcQ%2FTNImVzT0fnEjrWGTJD2i%2Ft4GbjlAQ1K5%2F8%2BWRSl3zzcxZqWs%2FNDB4qLJngOhIwQ2FMFiLxM7eJv%2BgKDO%2FYhsPBITV4phckpwCok1xCmooS8rWD%2FO3oqAo6vDFGr3RHbF9OUwCpAlPrxA3oHATVcmwkN5Y81IOi31Ec0jPhh3SHMEG5pqAfqMg%3D)

Republicans are scared. How do I know this? Because across the country, Republicans are scrambling to change the rules and redraw congressional maps in red states — just five years after the last round of redistricting. **This isn’t routine.** This is a blatant power grab — designed to help Donald Trump and push through more of his dangerous, out-of-touch MAGA agenda. But here’s the thing: **it proves they know they don’t stand a chance in 2026 unless they rig the playing field.** [So let’s give them even more proof. Republicans have seen the damage Trump’s policies have done so far — from attacks on our democracy to skyrocketing costs for working families — and now they’re hoping they can gerrymander their way out of accountability.
And if they think they can redraw districts in red states in their favor, they’re absolutely going to target us again — and even worse than 2024.
**That’s why our team has set a $6,000 mid-month fundraising goal** — and we need to hit it fast to make sure we’re ready to respond to whatever the GOP throws at us next.
We have to start by building the campaign infrastructure it’s going to take to win this race. That means grassroots donations, organizing, and showing we’re ready to fight back, no matter how they try to twist maps across the country.
[We don’t know yet how far their gerrymandering efforts will go, but we do know what we’re up against — and we know what it’ll take to win NM-02. Because across the country, Republicans are scrambling to change the rules and redraw congressional maps in red states — just five years after the last round of redistricting. This isn’t routine. This is a blatant power grab — designed to help Donald Trump and push through more of his dangerous, out-of-touch MAGA agenda. But here’s the thing: it proves they know they don’t stand a chance in 2026 unless they rig the playing field. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Republicans have seen the damage Trump’s policies have done so far — from attacks on our democracy to skyrocketing costs for working families — and now they’re hoping they can gerrymander their way out of accountability. And if they think they can redraw districts in red states in their favor, they’re absolutely going to target us again — and even worse than 2024. That’s why our team has set a $6,000 mid-month fundraising goal — and we need to hit it fast to make sure we’re ready to respond to whatever the GOP throws at us next. We have to start by building the campaign infrastructure it’s going to take to win this race. name: CADEM Organizing
subject: Organize to Win: Find Your Way to Get Involved

body:
cadem.org [cadem.org]
Democrats,
We're building grassroots power across California to flip the House and hold Trump and his Republican enablers accountable. If you're frustrated by the attacks on our rights and the chaos we're witnessing, you don't have to wait until 2026 to take action.
Our Organize to Win program is in full swing with actions happening statewide, from voter outreach and phonebanks to trainings and town halls. Whether you're new to organizing or a seasoned volunteer, there's a way for you to plug in right now and help us win back the House.
PHONEBANKS
Call newly registered Democrats in battleground Red-to-Blue districts.
Second Thursdays of the month | 6pm - 7:30pm
Next up: Thursday, August 14
Sign up: Make calls! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812769/]
TRAINING
Join our virtual training series to learn essential organizing skills and tactics.
Dates vary | 6pm - 7:30pm
Next up: Tuesday, August 26, on Rural Organizing
Sign up: Start training! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812582/]
TOWN HALLS
Conversations on key issues with special guests.
Next up: Virtual Know Your Rights Town Hall with Congressman Robert Garcia and Angelica Salas of CHIRLA on August 21 | 6pm - 7:30pm
Sign up: Join the town hall! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/824482/]
Stay up to date on all of our organizing actions at cadem.org/CAStrong. [cadem.org/CAStrong] Together, we can organize to win.
Thank you,
CADEM

body:
We’re not even two weeks into Democrat Roy Cooper’s campaign for Senate, and our voters are ALREADY being bombarded with waves of Leftist propaganda. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7f2f7bd1794d40eb8879818f342e8097&_e=_QQTAFQzuDd7NnLgKWwivWD-sdnXCWK8Aqv35hy61Ii-CHndDG1-Jub_FtSSWziCQPvKHv5bBA7kGU9LKyftp775zVOov0mVeA3kboyjWc0QN0jKexcIYOwMYU7XY2vhquzVG3IjigEPvci9ughB17qJLkd1r_x_buyma7l2Lwmw3Qujy4pTPloVLnRs7Z3Bycm9a0OX9zbrZt6pLxKxJG3QlaC9zxFgz1DmEZ_olpdQJv9xH9OP8R27QSnAFwkohnnb6R1J2xomvtXyt-LLWI--6wvRq8qunHbYnNdTQlsYamEEk0c7zhrodRsM24XH8fg6cGkvMOR8J8soXV4_DObuhgTpd-xMw1nddITlvwunhjnFIHoZ8t_Tkcl_0ywmaISH2Jq35Z6hODqltpfMkHFxDX2aVqW2zSe_v_AJSetU_x58vPRv57p-R6yyxznXTi8PDgNeBPWPu81SM1zgi-7iL_3HF3k5Y1N1K-jQx-aLr-P55_nLHgP2oxnzm23ejNbMlywLnqnzrLP_ioXKcwJ-3Be-EvAhPhWBDX5ftggnQzF2R5ivKjCvP7A6dbwihiw7VOkT-A4R1Paj8eHvEdfLrIUsnvsEHt6Gvq4tn0wovRX0ARuVLY-qZESb8iRmMhoxmoEsSw78Kxx3tc-GPn_-ofykbViZHE4LtIRtjhEHU619cpvkVE92_UqSFz2Zspls19z7tuqNp1X1d0ctYg%3D%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

We’re not even two weeks into Democrat Roy Cooper’s campaign for Senate, and our voters are ALREADY being bombarded with waves of Leftist propaganda.

This is just the start of a coordinated campaign to not only flip North Carolina’s Senate seat, but to take out House Republicans like me. **In just the first 24 hours of his campaign, Cooper raised a record-shattering $3.4 MILLION!**

Democrats and their radical base of activists are extremely motivated to take out Republicans across North Carolina, and they’re already spending the money to accomplish their goal.

name: Jay Jones
subject: Zach’s birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
Friend, it’s Jay. 👋🏽
A few days ago, we celebrated my son Zach's 1st birthday. It’s always smiles from this little guy!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
Being a father is my most important job.
As I watched him blow out his candle (with a little help), it made me stop and think.
Every decision I make, every fight I take on — it's all about the world I want Zach and all of our kids to grow up in.
That's why we're going to win this race. Not for any political party, but for every kid in Virginia who deserves to grow up in a Commonwealth where anyone can succeed, no matter who they are or what zip code they come from.
But I need to be frank with you – my opponent, Jason Miyares, is failing to fight for our kids' futures.
While Trump threatens to gut our public schools, Miyares stays silent . While families struggle to afford healthcare, he does nothing . While our daughters' reproductive rights hang in the balance, he sides with extremists. I’ve had enough, and that’s why I’m fighting back.
We can win this race, but MAGA millionaires are pouring $8.2 million into keeping Jason Miyares in power. They're trying to drown out our message with attack ads and lies.
I'm running for Attorney General because I refuse to let Jason Miyares and MAGA extremists decide the future for children across Virginia. Together, we can win this race and do better for ALL our kids — can I count on you for a $25 contribution right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=25]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=25]
I need you with me. Right now. Today.
Keep up the fight,
Jay Jones
Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States
Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia

clean_body: | Peter, I am reaching out with exciting news! This Wednesday, August 13th, I am hosting our first virtual town hall. This is an opportunity to connect with the community and discuss what matters to you in this race. | | My opponent Young Kim is hiding from her constituents who are questioning her recent actions. She outright refuses to hold a town hall and answer any questions. She would rather be a rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda than stand up for the people of Orange County and the Inland Empire. We are doing things differently than anyone in this race, and it is why we will flip this seat and the House majority next year. I have a real vision for CA-40, and I look forward to sharing it with you at this event and on the campaign trail. I hope to see you at our virtual town hall this Wednesday, August 13th from 6-8 PM. | Thank you, Christina P.S. If you cannot make it to this event, but still want to make an impact in this race, please consider = today. | = | Christina Gagnier is a community leader, small business owner, former school board member, and privacy advocate defending Orange County and Inland Empire families. To support Christina's campaign = To volunteer on Christina's campaign, To receive fewer emails from Christina Gagnier's campaign, sign up for our option here. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Christina Gagnier for Congress. Christina Gagnier for Congress 14071 Peyton Drive #1323 Chino Hills, CA 91709 United States

clean_body: | = Peter — This is Governor Kathy Hochul. Right now, Texas Republicans are rewriting the rules to give themselves an advantage. But I have a news flash for Republicans in Texas: This is no longer the Wild West. We're not going to tolerate our democracy being stolen by a bunch of self-serving politicians. Americans don't want a system that's stacked against them. They believe in fairness — it's fundamental. That is why I welcomed the courageous Democratic Texas legislators to the New York state Capitol. These leaders have taken a bold stand against extreme Republican efforts to gerrymander their state to silence the voices of millions, especially Black and Latino communities in Texas. **= | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Peter, history will judge us and how we respond to this moment. Republicans are willing to rewrite these rules to give themselves an advantage. The gloves are off, and I say, bring it on. Across the country, our democracy is under attack by Republicans who want to make it harder for people to be heard. But we won't go down without a fight.** = = Democracy is not a spectator sport — it's up to all of us to protect it. I won't back down, and neither should you. Thank you for standing with me and with those fighting on the frontlines in Texas. Ever Upward, Gov. Kathy Hochul = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Paul Eaton, VoteVets Senior Advisor
subject: An abuse of power unlike any we have witnessed in our lifetimes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The President of the United States, a man with obvious dictatorial ambitions, has taken control of the police force in our nation’s capital. He has deployed an active duty Military force against the citizens of Los Angeles, and is doing the same against the citizens of Washington, D.C. now.
#
Peter, this is Paul Eaton. I served in the United States Army for over three decades, retired as a Major General, and now serve as a Senior Advisor to VoteVets.
Living in the United States today requires each of us to be clear eyed and unflinching with regard to the actions of Donald Trump.
With that in mind, allow me to break down today’s events:
The President of the United States, a man with obvious dictatorial ambitions, has taken control of the police force in our nation’s capital.
He has deployed an active duty Military force against the citizens of Los Angeles, and is now doing the same against the citizens of Washington, D.C.
He has established a pattern of using the United States Military for the purposes of political distraction and intimidation.
And, unfortunately, it is all too clear this may not be the last time he does so.
Remember: Donald Trump claimed he had no authority to mobilize the National Guard to stop the assault on the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. Any rationale stated today pales in comparison to the danger our nation faced four years ago. Today's action is political theater - nothing less.
His actions today are an effort to distract the public and the press, and to intimidate anyone he views as his opponent. It is a horrifying abuse of his power as Commander in Chief. He and every person in his administration should be embarrassed and ashamed at their actions.
VoteVets continues to stand in opposition to this administration, and it is critical that we have the support of our members.
**[Please, contribute to VoteVets today so we can continue challenging this lawless president on Capitol Hill, in the court room, and in towns and cities in every state of this nation.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250811-1-60&t=1&akid=34519%2E3013755%2Ejd9NZc)
| [DONATE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250811-1-60&t=2&akid=34519%2E3013755%2Ejd9NZc)
---
Thank you, as always, for your support.
Very respectfully,
Paul Eaton
Major General, United States Army, Retired
Senior Advisor, VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

name: Shannon Schokora
subject: She raised her hand, and everything changed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
In case you missed Mallory McMorrow’s email below, her story is a powerful reminder of why Emerge’s work matters.

| Peter,

In case you missed Mallory McMorrow’s email below, her story is a powerful reminder of why Emerge’s work matters.

From raising her hand in an Emerge training to running for U.S. Senate, she’s proof that when women step up, everything changes.

As a proud Michigander, I can't wait to have more women like Mallory McMorrow in the U.S. Senate. But that will only happen if you support Emerge.

[_**Help us train the next generation of Democratic women by making a donation today.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113147527/562803052/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3YWExM2FjLTA1NzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-wIdosuqZIZeAxIW2nSqs57BUaBUpKWwYxI_ijrlYIs=)

—Shannon Schokora
Chief Financial Officer, Emerge
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113147529/562803054/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3YWExM2FjLTA1NzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-wIdosuqZIZeAxIW2nSqs57BUaBUpKWwYxI_ijrlYIs=)
Peter,

When I applied to train with Emerge, I was sure that I was going to be rejected.

I had no political experience. I had never worked on a campaign.

_But it’s a funny thing — when you raise your hand, you tend to be called on._

My Emerge training cohort of 22 women changed my life. We weren’t there because we dreamed of being in office. We were there because we quite reluctantly saw running as the only solution to problems nobody else seemed to be fixing.

**We learned the hard way how to make our own seats at the table, because we know damn well nobody is going to make them for us.**

Now I’m running for the U.S. Senate with that same “why.” Because if you haven’t noticed, our country is going through it. We need more women with the courage to raise their hands, step up, and lead. That’s what Emerge does best, and that's why I’m personally asking you to invest in this work right now.

[_**Can you chip in $25 or more today to help Emerge train the next generation of Democratic women?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113147530/562803055/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3YWExM2FjLTA1NzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-wIdosuqZIZeAxIW2nSqs57BUaBUpKWwYxI_ijrlYIs=)

Peter, our campaign just launched a new TV and digital ad. _Please give us a minute to tell you about it._
"Real Issues" is airing right now in the Richmond and Norfolk media markets. The ad holds our opponent accountable for dismissing the impact of Donald Trump's federal workforce cuts and attacks on Virginia jobs live on CNN.
One commentator said it's the best ad he's seen in "a long time."
_We're confident that — if more people come across the ad — it could have a real impact on the race._
But reserving air time is extremely expensive. That's why we have an urgent request for Abigail's supporters:

clean_body: We're confident that — if more people come across the ad — it could have a real impact on the race. = Peter, our campaign just launched a new TV and digital ad. Please give us a minute to tell you about it. "Real Issues" is airing right now in the Richmond and Norfolk media markets. The ad holds our opponent accountable for dismissing the impact of Donald Trump's federal workforce cuts and attacks on Virginia jobs live on CNN. One commentator said it's the best ad he's seen in "a long time." We're confident that — if more people come across the ad — it could have a real impact on the race. But reserving air time is extremely expensive. That's why we have an urgent request for Abigail's supporters: = = = = = = = Thank you, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Marina Jenkins, NDRC
subject: 60 years after the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We must recommit ourselves to keep fighting for fair maps and free elections
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113148034/562804912/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0N2ZjNmNhLTA2NzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4hXeEUXtwQhx8RmVABOQUFgRHY9SnJ0kWH07J7L4xb8=&emci=5c1788a2-c976-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=247fc6ca-0677-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Sixty years ago, the Voting Rights Act of 1965 (VRA) was signed into law. It was a hard-fought victory that advanced and defended the voting rights of Black and Brown communities. This landmark legislation became the crown jewel of the Civil Rights Movement. Since then, the VRA has been a shining pillar of our democracy and what we can accomplish through collective action. **But over the last few decades, Republicans and far-right extremists have launched a coordinated effort to dismantle this critical source of voting protection. ** In 2013, the Supreme Court’s ruling in _Shelby County_ gutted a key portion of the Voting Rights Act, effectively nullifying Section 5 — a critical tool to prevent states with a history of racial discrimination from enacting discriminatory voting laws. Under Section 5, these states were required to receive preclearance before passing new election laws. Eliminating this check opened the door for a new wave of voter suppression laws across the country — and it took only minutes following the _Shelby_ decision for gerrymandered legislatures across the country to start passing those discriminatory laws. **We have a tough fight ahead of us. Yet we remain hopeful, Peter.** In 2023, in _Allen v. Milligan_ , the Supreme Court rejected Alabama Republicans’ attempt to further undermine the VRA when it refused to invalidate Section 2 of the VRA, a provision that prohibits lawmakers from diluting the political power of communities of color. By rejecting Alabama’s effort to cut away at Section 2, the Court helped ensure that the VRA will continue to protect the voting power of marginalized voters and make our democracy more representative, and fairer. Still, too many politicians across the country are determined to hold on to unearned power by restricting and undermining the right to vote. That’s why today, the VRA is at its most vulnerable point as Republicans and Trump abuse their power to engage in extreme partisan and racial gerrymandering. Right now, they’ve proposed a congressional map that would eliminate _five_ Democratic seats in Texas, threatening to deprive thousands of voters of the chance to elect leaders who truly represent them. **As we honor the history of the VRA, we must recommit ourselves to keep fighting for fair maps and free elections. Because this is a fight that requires all of us.** Sincerely,
Marina Marina Jenkins
Executive Director of the NDRC | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113148035/562804913/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_VRAAnniversary_email_20250811-NDRC-Tier1-VRAAnniversary_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250811-NDRC-Tier1-VRAAnniversary_&utm_campaign=VRAAnniversary&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0N2ZjNmNhLTA2NzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4hXeEUXtwQhx8RmVABOQUFgRHY9SnJ0kWH07J7L4xb8=)

clean_body: We must recommit ourselves to keep fighting for fair maps and free elections | Peter, Sixty years ago, the Voting Rights Act of 1965 (VRA) was signed into law. It was a hard-fought victory that advanced and defended the voting rights of Black and Brown communities. This landmark legislation became the crown jewel of the Civil Rights Movement. Since then, the VRA has been a shining pillar of our democracy and what we can accomplish through collective action. But over the last few decades, Republicans and far-right extremists have launched a coordinated effort to dismantle this critical source of voting protection. In 2013, the Supreme Court’s ruling in Shelby County gutted a key portion of the Voting Rights Act, effectively nullifying Section 5 — a critical tool to prevent states with a history of racial discrimination from enacting discriminatory voting laws. Under Section 5, these states were required to receive preclearance before passing new election laws. Eliminating this check opened the door for a new wave of voter suppression laws across the country — and it took only minutes following the Shelby decision for gerrymandered legislatures across the country to start passing those discriminatory laws. We have a tough fight ahead of us. Yet we remain hopeful, Peter. In 2023, in Allen v. Milligan , the Supreme Court rejected Alabama Republicans’ attempt to further undermine the VRA when it refused to invalidate Section 2 of the VRA, a provision that prohibits lawmakers from diluting the political power of communities of color. By rejecting Alabama’s effort to cut away at Section 2, the Court helped ensure that the VRA will continue to protect the voting power of marginalized voters and make our democracy more representative, and fairer. Still, too many politicians across the country are determined to hold on to unearned power by restricting and undermining the right to vote. That’s why today, the VRA is at its most vulnerable point as Republicans and Trump abuse their power to engage in extreme partisan and racial gerrymandering. Right now, they’ve proposed a congressional map that would eliminate five Democratic seats in Texas, threatening to deprive thousands of voters of the chance to elect leaders who truly represent them. As we honor the history of the VRA, we must recommit ourselves to keep fighting for fair maps and free elections. Because this is a fight that requires all of us. Sincerely, Marina Marina Jenkins Executive Director of the NDRC | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Peter ,
Donald Trump just announced he’s sending the National Guard into Washington, D.C., taking over the local police force, and giving federal agents free rein to “do whatever the hell they want.”
But here’s the truth:
📉 Crime in D.C. is down – by 26% this year.
⚠️ This isn’t about public safety. It’s about control.
💥 Trump is laying the groundwork to “federalize” the capital and consolidate power
If Trump is looking for people who are a danger to D.C., he should start with himself. He’s a convicted felon who pardoned all of the 1600 people who attacked the Capitol Police on January 6th. The same people who beat officers, smashed windows, and tried to stop the peaceful transfer of power.
This is how authoritarianism creeps in, one “emergency” at a time. If he gets away with it in D.C., he’ll do it in city after city.
GOTV PAC is fighting back where it matters most:
✅ Battleground races in Congress
✅ Massive voter turnout programs
✅ The organizing needed to stop Trump’s allies from holding power
But we need you with us right now before this becomes the new normal.
Rush a donation of $15 or more now to help us stop Trump’s power grab. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08112025&amount=25]

name: Josh Harder
subject: I’ve never been more worried
body:
Peter,
Here’s the honest truth:
I’ve never been more afraid about Democrats' ability to win back the House than I am right now.
Trump’s allies are calling our race “pivotal.” GOP Super PACs are flooding our district with attack ads and misinformation targeting Latino voters, and they’ve already picked their “dream candidate” to run against me.
[_**I’m doing everything I can to hold the line, but I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in now to help us protect this seat and everything we’ve fought for?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113148254/562805628/9139517?&refcode=E14557-20250811-Worried-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzcxZWI3MDYtMDc3Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ou2sA3LY9F8eEys5eh5sIvJwANJ4Xn1nIyMTWl0ll5U=)

name: Paco Fabian, Deputy Director @ Our Revolution
subject: Trump’s DC Takeover Must Be Stopped – Tell Congress: Defend Our Democracy Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

I am writing to you from the heart of Washington, DC, where Trump has just
taken over the D.C. Metropolitan Police Department and deployed 800
National Guard troops.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33554?source=email-20250811&t=1011&akid=9157%2E5885482%2EjT5dff ]Headline: Trump zeroes in on federal takeover of DC as FBI patrols
streets

It’s completely chilling, and he isn’t stopping there. As armed patrols
take over our capitol, Trump is threatening to ‘restore order’ to cities
nationwide, laying the groundwork for a coast-to-coast crackdown.

We CANNOT wait to act to stop this authoritarian takeover, which is why
we’re rapidly deploying our DC Citizen Action Team to the streets to fight
back. But Congress must also step in and act now to rein in this power
grab.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33554?source=email-20250811&t=1012&akid=9157%2E5885482%2EjT5dff ]ALL our voices are needed RIGHT NOW to stand up to Trump before this
goes any farther. Will you speak out today and demand Congress stop
Trump’s coordinated DC occupation?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33554?source=email-20250811&t=1013&akid=9157%2E5885482%2EjT5dff ]ADD YOUR NAME

This isn’t law enforcement – it’s occupation. Trump’s unprecedented
seizure of local control is a trial balloon for full-blown
authoritarianism. If Congress does not put a stop to this, he will repeat
this playbook in other blue cities across the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33554?source=email-20250811&t=1014&akid=9157%2E5885482%2EjT5dff ]Rep. Jayapal tweet stating that Trump is grabbing power like a dictator
by seizing control of DC

Trump is using crime as an excuse to take over —violent crime in D.C. has
been declining! This is Trump’s next move to intimidate voters, crush
dissent, and cling to power by force.

Our Revolution was built for moments like this. Our DC Citizen Action Team
is in the streets and rapidly scaling up to fight back. We will also be on
Capitol Hill all week — delivering our voices and raising the demand that
Congress acts to restore local control now. Trump’s move to put troops in
our city streets cannot become the new normal.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33554?source=email-20250811&t=1015&akid=9157%2E5885482%2EjT5dff ]Tell Congress: Defend our democracy NOW. Take IMMEDIATE action to
oppose the federal takeover of DC’s police and demand the immediate
withdrawal of all National Guard troops!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33554?source=email-20250811&t=1016&akid=9157%2E5885482%2EjT5dff ]ADD YOUR NAME

This is not just about Washington, DC. It’s about stopping Trump’s
authoritarian takeover before it spreads.

When we organize, we win,

Paco Fabián

Our Revolution Deputy Director

Metropolitan Police Department and deployed 800 National Guard troops. [ ]Headline: Trump zeroes in on federal takeover of DC as FBI patrols streets It’s completely chilling, and he isn’t stopping there. As armed patrols take over our capitol, Trump is threatening to ‘restore order’ to cities nationwide, laying the groundwork for a coast-to-coast crackdown. We CANNOT wait to act to stop this authoritarian takeover, which is why we’re rapidly deploying our DC Citizen Action Team to the streets to fight back. But Congress must also step in and act now to rein in this power grab. [ ]ALL our voices are needed RIGHT NOW to stand up to Trump before this goes any farther. Will you speak out today and demand Congress stop Trump’s coordinated DC occupation? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME This isn’t law enforcement – it’s occupation. Trump’s unprecedented seizure of local control is a trial balloon for full-blown authoritarianism. If Congress does not put a stop to this, he will repeat this playbook in other blue cities across the country. [ ]Rep. Jayapal tweet stating that Trump is grabbing power like a dictator by seizing control of DC Trump is using crime as an excuse to take over —violent crime in D.C. has been declining! This is Trump’s next move to intimidate voters, crush dissent, and cling to power by force. Our Revolution was built for moments like this. Our DC Citizen Action Team is in the streets and rapidly scaling up to fight back. We will also be on Capitol Hill all week — delivering our voices and raising the demand that Congress acts to restore local control now. Trump’s move to put troops in our city streets cannot become the new normal. [ ]Tell Congress: Defend our democracy NOW. Take IMMEDIATE action to oppose the federal takeover of DC’s police and demand the immediate withdrawal of all National Guard troops! [ ]ADD YOUR NAME This is not just about Washington, DC. | **Donald Trump is once again floating the idea of privatizing the U.S. Postal Service — putting at risk a public institution that millions of Americans rely on every single day.****** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113148649/562806809/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250811_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRhNWM0MS0wODc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GOY0c5IGkwJnYnnZFEOs5m46NC4FmRgvLcYl7z7pzw=&emci=578cb66b-e676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6eda5c41-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113148650/562806810/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250811_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRhNWM0MS0wODc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GOY0c5IGkwJnYnnZFEOs5m46NC4FmRgvLcYl7z7pzw=&emci=578cb66b-e676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6eda5c41-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)

**The USPS is more than a mail carrier, it’s a vital lifeline for our democracy and our communities.**

It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans.
It ensures every American — _no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility_ — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting.

**And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in _fairness_.**

That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally.

New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, _not turn a profit for the privileged few._

**[If you agree that the USPS should stay in the hands of the people, add your name now and stand with us in this fight! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113148651/562806811/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250811_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRhNWM0MS0wODc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GOY0c5IGkwJnYnnZFEOs5m46NC4FmRgvLcYl7z7pzw=&emci=578cb66b-e676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6eda5c41-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)**

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: AIPAC is attacking me
body:
God commands me to walk in truth

| | | | |
---
Friend, the floodgates have opened.
I’m officially under attack from AIPAC for saying **"the most truthful and easiest thing to say that Oct 7th in Israel was horrific and all hostages must be returned, but so is the genocide, humanitarian crisis, and starvation happening in Gaza".**
The genocide, humanitarian crisis, and starvation in Gaza aren’t political issues for me, they are issues of my Christian faith. **God commands me to walk in truth and love.**
He commands me to walk in truth of the Gospel, that Jesus was fully divine and fully human, died for our sins, and was resurrected in victory over death.
He also commands me to walk in love, by obeying His commandments, including to love one another.
What is happening in Gaza is a violation of God’s commandments and a travesty of humanity, and I refuse to bear false witness for my own political benefit. What is political about this is that AIPAC is going to bring their immense power to bear against me.
**_[I’m one of the only members of Congress that doesn’t take money from AIPAC and who never has](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aYlf/?__vbtrk=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aYlf/?__vbtrk=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I don’t think it’s right. The truth is AIPAC needs to register as a foreign lobbyist by U.S. law because they are representing the __secular government__ of nuclear armed Israel 100%!!!
Look at what just happened, as soon as Congress was let out on recess and supposed to be working in our districts, AIPAC just took a bunch of members of Congress to Israel to make sure they don’t step out of line.
**While AIPAC is lying to their donors about me claiming I’m "betraying my American values" the REALITY is AIPAC serves and lobbies for a foreign country, Israel!!**
Patriot, I’m as AMERICAN as they come!
**_[I can’t be bought and I’m not backing down](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aYlf/?__vbtrk=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_!!**
I’m fighting for my children’s generation and for AMERICA ONLY!!!!
_If AIPAC has a problem with that, I have one message for them:_
**[BRING. IT. ON.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aYlf/?__vbtrk=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
I’ve always had the support of the conservative grassroots in my fight to force Washington to put America First, and now I’m up against the most powerful lobby in the history of our country.
**_[If you’ve been waiting to donate until something really important happened, now is the time to get back into the fight](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aYlf/?__vbtrk=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I will need it when they unleash their war chest in my primary.
_For AMERICA,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aYlf/?__vbtrk=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aYlf/?__vbtrk=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

### **_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aYlg/?__vbtrk=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwNzAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=310701&trkid=839766595&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: This is a tipping point for our campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40002%2E3422442%2EfV5DmS)
Peter, a lot has happened in our race over the last few days and we want to break it down:
**First,** Kamala Harris announced that she would not be running for California Governor. This means Katie Porter is the clear Democratic frontrunner in this ultra-competitive race.
**Then,** one of Katie’s opponents—a billionaire—attacked her in an interview, saying: “She’s a school teacher. What does she know about running anything?”
_This same billionaire opponent also purchased a staggering $1.4 million in TV ads—a rarity this far out from Election Day._
**And finally,** a brand-new poll found that in the last four months Katie’s support increased more than any other candidate, but also nearly 40% of voters are still undecided.
**This is a tipping point for our campaign.** We need the resources to share Katie’s message with voters all across California.
**[Can you donate $5 right now to help us reach the voters who will decide this election? We can’t run this campaign without your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250811_1_ak?refcode=em20250811-40002&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40002_3422442_fV5DmS&akid=40002%2E3422442%2EfV5DmS)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250811_1_ak?refcode=em20250811-40002&refcode2=40002_3422442_fV5DmS&akid=40002%2E3422442%2EfV5DmS)
Thank you,
Team Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250811-40002&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40002_3422442_fV5DmS&akid=40002%2E3422442%2EfV5DmS)**

subject: the latest GOP target: our public news services

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113148677/562806924/792550818?source=EM_NBI_MT_20250807_PT_PublicBroadcasting_0_3MO_TeamThompson_NA_NA_CPB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWJhY2VkYS0wODc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RaDGJpTGS7lyhTrPfY_sHa9PnYcbqpkAuDPB8iya5PM=&emci=81baceda-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=85baceda-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2678920) Peter, Congressional Republicans took back **_$1.1 billion_** in funding for public broadcasting. _This is money that was already Congressionally-approved!_ **This was a direct attack on our safety and our communities.**

**Millions of Americans, especially those of us in rural America, will see news services cut back:** NPR, PBS, local news stations, public radio, children’s programs and more will suffer from these funding cuts.

Congressional Republican attacks keep coming, and the answer is clear: **we must fight back.** **_[Peter, will you sign on today to stand up for our local radio and news stations?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113148678/562806925/792550818?source=EM_NBI_MT_20250807_PT_PublicBroadcasting_0_3MO_TeamThompson_NA_NA_CPB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWJhY2VkYS0wODc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RaDGJpTGS7lyhTrPfY_sHa9PnYcbqpkAuDPB8iya5PM=&emci=81baceda-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=85baceda-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2678920)_** **[SIGN ON: PUBLIC BROADCASTING IS CRITICAL](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113148679/562806926/792550818?source=EM_NBI_MT_20250807_PT_PublicBroadcasting_0_3MO_TeamThompson_NA_NA_CPB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWJhY2VkYS0wODc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RaDGJpTGS7lyhTrPfY_sHa9PnYcbqpkAuDPB8iya5PM=&emci=81baceda-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=85baceda-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2678920)** Public broadcasting is how families keep up with their kids’ and grandkids' local sports teams. This is how communities receive critical weather and emergency disaster updates. For many young children, PBS Kids is one of their first classrooms.

**This funding cut endangers American families.**

Congressional Republicans are silencing trusted voices and stoking division. They’re hiding behind “fiscal responsibility” as if they didn’t just add trillions to the national deficit. **We won’t stand for their blatant attempts to leave entire communities behind and hurt American families.**

**_[If you’re with Mike, add your name to our petition today to fight back on community services today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113148680/562806927/792550818?source=EM_NBI_MT_20250807_PT_PublicBroadcasting_0_3MO_TeamThompson_NA_NA_CPB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWJhY2VkYS0wODc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RaDGJpTGS7lyhTrPfY_sHa9PnYcbqpkAuDPB8iya5PM=&emci=81baceda-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=85baceda-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2678920)_** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113148681/562806928/792550818?source=EM_NBI_MT_20250807_PT_PublicBroadcasting_0_3MO_TeamThompson_NA_NA_CPB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWJhY2VkYS0wODc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RaDGJpTGS7lyhTrPfY_sHa9PnYcbqpkAuDPB8iya5PM=&emci=81baceda-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=85baceda-0877-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2678920)** Thank you,

While federal lawmakers leave Washington for their August recess, Democratic state legislators are keeping up the fight to preserve our democracy in state capitols across the country. | | |

While federal lawmakers leave Washington for their August recess, Democratic state legislators are keeping up the fight to preserve our democracy in state capitols across the country. **In Texas, state Democrats are standing up for their constituents by protesting Trump and the Republican Party’s scheme to draw new, rigged maps that dilute Democratic power.** Texas Democrats are not backing down in the face of authoritarianism, even as Trump’s FBI is weaponized and Republicans are threatening to make arrests. **These Democrats are the leaders we deserve.** [You can do your part by powering state Democrats nationwide as our movement fights back against the MAGA agenda. Can you make a $7 contribution? With tumbleweeds rolling through Capitol Hill this August, it’s clear that some of the most egregious assaults on our democracy and some of the most powerful acts of resistance are happening in our own backyards.
What happens in our state legislature shapes the future of our country – it’s not a trickle-down effect; progress begins in our statehouses. The best and worst of policy starts in the states.
**State Dems are on the front lines in the battle to block MAGA extremism and deliver progressive legislation that works _for_ you, not against you. **

clean_body: While federal lawmakers leave Washington for their August recess, Democratic state legislators are keeping up the fight to preserve our democracy in state capitols across the country. | | | | | ---|--- While federal lawmakers leave Washington for their August recess, Democratic state legislators are keeping up the fight to preserve our democracy in state capitols across the country. In Texas, state Democrats are standing up for their constituents by protesting Trump and the Republican Party’s scheme to draw new, rigged maps that dilute Democratic power. Texas Democrats are not backing down in the face of authoritarianism, even as Trump’s FBI is weaponized and Republicans are threatening to make arrests. These Democrats are the leaders we deserve. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | With tumbleweeds rolling through Capitol Hill this August, it’s clear that some of the most egregious assaults on our democracy and some of the most powerful acts of resistance are happening in our own backyards. What happens in our state legislature shapes the future of our country – it’s not a trickle-down effect; progress begins in our statehouses. The best and worst of policy starts in the states. State Dems are on the front lines in the battle to block MAGA extremism and deliver progressive legislation that works for you, not against you. Together, The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Not authorized by any candidate. name: Trump's America
subject: Trump wants a Fed chair who will obey him
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Trump’s at it again.
He just picked one of his loyalists for the Federal Reserve Board, but his real focus is finding a Fed chair who will bend to his political will.
This isn’t about good economic policy. It’s about control. Trump has made it clear he wants someone who will slash interest rates on command, ignore economic realities, and put his re-election ahead of the country’s stability.
We’ve seen this playbook before — surround himself with yes-men, punish dissent, and gamble with our economy for political gain.
If we let him choose the next Fed chair, he’ll hand the keys to our economy to a MAGA loyalist who works for him, not for the American people.
We need leaders in Congress who will hold him accountable, and we can’t get them there without your help.
Rush a donation today to stop Trump’s economic takeover:\
