name: Team Jayapal
subject: 📚✏️ Update on our back to school drive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our team will be on site with FamilyWorks tomorrow to help sort supplies and pack bags.
#
Hi Peter, Team Jayapal here with an update on our push to buy new backpacks for kids in need across Pramila’s district.
**Our goal is to provide 100+ kids with fully prepared backpacks** , stocked with pencil cases, binders, calculators, paper, and more — all donated by _**tomorrow**_. That’s when our team will be on site with FamilyWorks to help sort supplies and pack these new bags.
**We saw an incredible response to our first email, but we still need another push to reach our goal before tomorrow!**
[**Will you read more about the initiative below and then pitch in $3 or whatever amount you can to help us purchase school supplies for families in our community?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250811-1?refcode=em20250811-5328&refcode2=5328_420207_RW1Bmu&akid=5328%2E420207%2ERW1Bmu)
Every dollar you donate will go directly to purchasing these crucial supplies.
Thank you for your support,
Team Jayapal
\-------- Forwarded message --------
Date: August 7, 2025
From: Pramila Jayapal
Subject: 📚✏️ Help local kids start school strong
Peter,
This moment demands that all of us pitch in to help one another.
**That’s why my campaign is launching a big push to provide kids with backpacks this back to school season — and we need your help.**
My campaign is partnering with FamilyWorks to buy new backpacks for kids in need across my district. Our team of volunteers will be there on August 12, sorting supplies and packing these new bags with crucial school supplies.
Here’s our goal:
🎒 100+ backpacks fully prepared
✏️ Stocked with pencil cases, calculators, binders, and more
📆 All donated by Tuesday, August 12
This is exactly what our campaign is about. We’ve always had a year-round organizing program because I know that being a member of Congress means you can’t just fight in DC, you need to organize within the community.
Right now, in our district — which is home to some of the wealthiest people in the country — about 10% of children are living in poverty. And Trump’s Big Ugly Betrayal Bill will only deepen this crisis, plunging more families across the country into poverty.
**That’s exactly why we need a resistance at every level. Why we need to build community that stands up for one another.**
A backpack might not sound like a big cost, but there are far too many kids who are going into the next school year without one because their parents need to decide between buying a new backpack or paying the utility bill, skyrocketing grocery costs, or rising rents.
**But I know we can help. My campaign won’t sit back while families struggle to make ends meet this back to school season.**
This is a community-powered effort to make sure every student in Seattle starts the school year with the necessary tools to thrive on their academic journey.
Members of our campaign team will be on-site helping to sort and assemble backpacks, but we need your help to buy the supplies.
**[Can you pitch in by making a donation to our Back to School program today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250811-1?refcode=em20250811-5328&refcode2=5328_420207_RW1Bmu&akid=5328%2E420207%2ERW1Bmu) Every dollar raised will go to purchasing supplies for families in our community.**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250811-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250811-5328&refcode2=5328_420207_RW1Bmu&akid=5328%2E420207%2ERW1Bmu)**
Your donation will help purchase high-priority items like scientific calculators, 3-ring binders, staplers, and college-ruled paper. These are basic tools that make a big difference.
**Together, we can help hundreds of kids show up feeling confident and ready for the new school year.**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=1&akid=5328%2E420207%2ERW1Bmu)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5328%2E420207%2ERW1Bmu)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

subject: HUTT-HUTT!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
It's my favorite time of the year
|
---
Peter,

Some people like Christmas. Some people like their birthday. Some people like Thanksgiving.

**Me? The day of the year that I look forward to every single year is the start of football season, and Happy freakin ' Holidays, it's here.** [**Will you take a moment to celebrate with me and help my campaign?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=132a056776c846718d9ec381afe501c3&_e=wSf9JLPtP5g_nAEpZ5Y52K1tjDvWvmej41_C7WEUKz36phncHvNbpEEoIcDVDNPfPJ5B6o92J3wZOgRFZTNUQ60hNc6adONtmDzNKpAaqS3Q_Qatixvegwl50Nt8zx0AJt3x2zUXVN-eabCS2OhVY1wDl8yz9AxQ54aaLgsrvjuBPau5agQTOWIodg257yoYvfxDKDHZy8m9USX_E0d4PQvQ9AJ8humFUmrzlvDEsLcUkCVbXlBRCmdI5afPcbwkxFGDz94B4NBUOqrFwaBuBxKrZKK2gw0uzjglhvZnukwU0Wl0Rz1AMk39RPHv-gMPR7nl-LQpEA-tiHZnYVS9EhuG_EdmOEafJk1DRp64hMQl5HjrIGZ-TvvuvzPVDDhH49UxO4awzvTrSN_WFbRw0oJU1y93CD5HRJPkRcstOYa3HAQEe8fnkqYba83fDdSTkjLILdvuJnkT9FQx5RVdizU9Bxnc_k2PQ3gY6lCCZx0MLpCCc_AlpVMor9gN1PwtbUFIdSbY-MHY1ex0x99QPuIxpWtaBCLH6jlYt3IU7rWNsf26Cqzea7WYRbMkVpvo)

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=132a056776c846718d9ec381afe501c3&_e=wSf9JLPtP5g_nAEpZ5Y52K1tjDvWvmej41_C7WEUKz36phncHvNbpEEoIcDVDNPfPJ5B6o92J3wZOgRFZTNUQ60hNc6adONtmDzNKpAaqS3Q_Qatixvegwl50Nt8zx0AJt3x2zUXVN-eabCS2OhVY1wDl8yz9AxQ54aaLgsrvjuBPau5agQTOWIodg257yoYrKqsR4du2TuPlzqghqfvjyRG9dp_fauFrGdnzZs_S---7emwEm4YfZeueRgrChqqs64JhAFqvptZ2Hv7vyC-W3wnwddX3_xcwoPDb5-EOLFczXTAsmyQKvtkuA-RQ9c83klysvsAG62NRM2HGi-CvVDQQW-bjvxEEVTy35U8Y9fIWXsgapmJ43F9otHUa7UJLfT6FOWil9ZjNYQr-vdDiI3tvC4ImLGk3QZnD_1HTrzjevckmCXldOqZKtu9hbcNP0K_mpUqP_JpXABntxZNCRjkezNIDhV0iVeU5hmKINJyQ5zngYI23NiQ7315CBxhZ94xW61tVe6NFZ9yXE0A8lFSgN-W8JhgJNdQm3lxxm5INtLcQzhXTq2sPf4LiXRS)
**Before I ran for public office, my entire life was football.**

I'd wake up, watch some film early, get my morning exercise in, and then head over to the facility to run practice for my team. And then do it all over again the next day.

I used to live, breathe, and sweat football. And there's no better football than College Football.

Through the highs and the lows of the season, nothing was more important to me than the camaraderie you build with your players, coaching staff, and fans.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=132a056776c846718d9ec381afe501c3&_e=wSf9JLPtP5g_nAEpZ5Y52K1tjDvWvmej41_C7WEUKz36phncHvNbpEEoIcDVDNPfPJ5B6o92J3wZOgRFZTNUQ60hNc6adONtmDzNKpAaqS3Q_Qatixvegwl50Nt8zx0AJt3x2zUXVN-eabCS2OhVY1wDl8yz9AxQ54aaLgsrvjuBPau5agQTOWIodg257yoY-NF-L4mIXP0qBCvZjLRNtDFaMhRz9VwzZ5OYMd8rMVH9i0PXyXwNygUrlt2hpf2lBkOgJ-e9ydMiAEcFqotQ_JqVw11pRUlblXYU5cvwury0utB8T8g9E0lnafSKbLdtcA9XNVIfuWsA9ycqcYqqtST8_suyBRsa62DafSZxXJD1L2T4Z8VJYb9Yo1XAdOzaNhNEW1RwlqHMaaeoV11b678Bo_N8hKxMEQuW-2_LpjHAY9MqwQuQOmP3HiaV9apnA1z_foA0geaulObI-cdQ_iB9x_LnJMGFVjyAIvjMHd8-ep4HqnI04e9fqtUJIrgaKyv1IxrYfltbXAg3LdmryrfpQA1FB0NDPQW8LW71OGg6AZeZtMxeO_CboOVmoUI6)
And just because I'm no longer an active coach doesn't mean I don't tell people not to call me Coach.

**But now, I 'm running for Governor in Alabama to help President Trump advance his America-First Agenda. **

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=132a056776c846718d9ec381afe501c3&_e=wSf9JLPtP5g_nAEpZ5Y52K1tjDvWvmej41_C7WEUKz36phncHvNbpEEoIcDVDNPfPJ5B6o92J3wZOgRFZTNUQ60hNc6adONtmDzNKpAaqS3Q_Qatixvegwl50Nt8zx0AJt3x2zUXVN-eabCS2OhVY1wDl8yz9AxQ54aaLgsrvjuBPau5agQTOWIodg257yoYsFVLjgYbhUWr4APCjBDx1cox8jmprIJH9oM5IayyCvlLVj_J-YCdh09R1TWIj1kb0lGwsPsfuklCla2KadQa4kKGRSMmPpBDLrqx86QjcFmoY84WJCxL2bE1u6Z8NpKmCEl5pESIcrhDv3bDs3HQrO95DUZGve1iqd2rhG6AKdjscSh5DEwVvPjxr3RnEdIHFZyRqxeNYe7h69Eu1_cGRzR-63-nnoeLoqbiKa2DsGzpFbmmVlLTomsPsK6Px3lFJMjgl1SSzndFAZf-UPvrsKRG3sQyNBwwwTB4zDTX9xRQKRU9uMvvaOPrY1isDoRDdrLY-P2tWi_N1tb3eUoQv9lA11P8bWmsvr9AjrbuNHZkanYZMTtqs4tlfjbM5UtT)

name: Tobias Read
subject: Do you support voting from home?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250811em-ob1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250811em-ob1]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I believe voting from home gives every Oregonian a fair and secure chance to hold politicians accountable—and it saves money and time, too.
But some Republicans want to block voting from home by imposing unnecessary barriers.
There’s only one explanation for this: Opponents to voting at home want to make it harder for regular people to participate in our democracy.
So I’m standing up to them and I’m fighting to protect the right to vote from home for all Oregon voters.
But I need to know you're with me: If you support my efforts to expand vote-by-mail access, please consider donating to help me continue fighting today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250811em-ob1]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250811em-ob1]
Thank you for using your voice – speaking out is the most powerful way to make an impact, and I’m grateful to have your support.
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

Hi there, Here’s an exclusive behind the scenes of something special we captured last week – a campaign video that tells my story and why I’m running to flip California’s 22nd District. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113149220/562808623/1981932150?refcode=em-8.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzkxYzE1ZWEtMGQ3Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RUxcEM_cjSH7_jHuIGvAslVikX7Q3aKKeot0XeIXpRw=) Here’s a behind the scenes look! It’s personal. It’s honest. And it’s about more than politics – it’s about _who we’re fighting for._ For families like mine, whose parents sacrificed everything to build a better life. For kids growing up on Medicaid in the Central Valley, wondering if anyone in Washington sees them. For working families forced to watch as politicians like David Valadao rip away what little they have. This is about drawing a line in the sand – making sure the voices of teachers, farmworkers, students, and families are heard loud and clear in Washington. I can’t wait to share the finished video with you, and I hope, when the time comes, you’ll share it with your friends and family, too. **[Getting this message in front of voters across CA-22 will be expensive. So if you can, please chip in $3 today to help us make sure everyone sees this story – and understands exactly what’s at stake in this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113149221/562808624/1981932150?refcode=em-8.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzkxYzE1ZWEtMGQ3Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RUxcEM_cjSH7_jHuIGvAslVikX7Q3aKKeot0XeIXpRw=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113149222/562808627/1981932150?refcode=em-8.11.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzkxYzE1ZWEtMGQ3Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RUxcEM_cjSH7_jHuIGvAslVikX7Q3aKKeot0XeIXpRw=)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Barbarism: That's not a life.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
If we do not assert ourselves and enshrine our rights — and demand healthcare, and education, and dignity — the alternative is barbarism, which is what we are contending with now.
The fact that people are choosing between medicine and rent is barbarism.
The fact that people are worried about whether they will be on the streets every 4 weeks is barbarism.
The fact that every time a person has an ache or a pain, and they’re scared that it could either be a sore joint or cancer, but they can’t find out because they can’t afford the doctor? **This is barbarism.**
If we do not demand — and not only demand, but win — unions, healthcare, wages, and ending endless war, then we will condemn ourselves to barbarism.
I refuse to give up. I refuse to submit myself to that future. That’s not a life.
**And so to live, we have to fight for each other. We have to stand with each other. We have to fight for this vision and this world.**
[If you can, will you make a $5 contribution – or any amount that is meaningful to you – to help power our fight for transformative change? Every donation will make a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250811.jJYabX&refcode=em20250811-9523-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9523%2E2526796%2EkviAtH)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250811.jJYabX&refcode=em20250811-9523-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9523%2E2526796%2EkviAtH)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250811?refcode=em20250811-9523-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9523_2526796_kviAtH&akid=9523%2E2526796%2EkviAtH)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250811-9523-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9523%2E2526796%2EkviAtH)**
